Itaogado tori ao kae, irego  toro!
4. Paga karega, ipopeaenure aki kodi, moto ri rakarewunure aki onare iiwuge etogi.
5. Imugumode awai tada jii je, imode itagurudo akigodo kuda.
6. Amearudure inagoi iromode duji; are pagudure acewuge enoroe maku inai.
7.  Cegimejera o meri makado, o joru koduwo puregodaji, puregodaji.
8. Jetuwo boe ji Pao jekai jii je.
Aetudo ji amearudu kuriae tabo, ako boe pemegarewu tabo.
9. Oino imodukare iwuredo iragodui akie jitu piji.
Iromode nono imagoi iromode duji tu tu  meri jameduji.

2. Tu Aroe Eimejera kejere itaroere tamudo; pijire  ikinorudodae aregodure.
3. Emare tu je ino tori rema, ikinorudodae rema, iro raka rema: iwudu moduka.
4. Jii inoba boeredukejeba tarugodumode marenaru imeduji, taiamedu tabo taemarui tawo butudo du bogai, ia  moto ri puredugodure tuwoduwo du reore?
5. Emearudure tu boe eekiri pagado duji; etaidure tuwo boe eekiri pagado du bogai tu je. Emago pemegare tuwadararodu tabo, mare tudoda emago pegare.
6. Tu Aroe Eimejera kejere itaroere tamudo; pijire ikinorudodae aregodure.
7. Ema tu je ino tori rakarewu rema, ikinorudodae rema, iro raka rema. Iwudu moduka!
8. Pao keje ikinorudodae padure, irugu padure. Pao keje ino tori rakarewu mugure.
Ikijoru padure Pao keje.
9. Iwobe, tamearutorudo ji boe jamedu boe keje; tawabo jado jekai, Paore papopeae rema kodi.
10. Adão ore ere nono boe enogwamudu reore; boe ewadararodaere imedu ore remage; boe emode emugudo boe remaguda keje ma, emodu romode duku boe enogwamudu kuda.
11.  Tamearutoru kaba tarorerui boe ji duji; tagaba taekiri pagado tagiwogu tabo. Tagoroe itodumode ma, tagaba tawabo mugudo keje.
12. Pao makore mito tu je, imearudure ji pobe: "Pao ro rakare, okudure boebo, umode boe maku boe etai ero reore tu tu je".

2. Aroe Eimejera, ino Aroe Eimejeranure aki, iemarure awogai.
Itaroe akemore awogai, ikodu akemore awogai jamedu, moto kicarui pobo bogaidu reore.
3. Itaregodure awaito awogai, ioruduwo aruguji, aro rakaji.
4. Amearudu kuri mori kodure boe ee kori, dukodire inogwa jerebarire akabo.
5. Dukodire imago pemegamode ai jii iragoje utonaji, ii ikera aogado awogai du tabo.
6. Inogwa amogodumode ako boe pemegarewu tabo, inogwa jerebarimode akabo tuiegare tabo.
7. Iwiabutui awugeje ipa keje tu tabo, inudukare imearudaei ai du tabo.
8. Ikijoru padure awugeje jii je; imugui akigodo kuda du tabo inoiogwarire iegare tabo.
9. Itaroere tubodo akabo, akerabrarere ii aro raka tabo.
10. Aidure tuwo iragoja kedodowuge rema, etumode moto opo kae.
11. Emagudumode tariga rairewu kai, riedoge eke rumode emage.
12. Mare boe eimejera jekaremode Pao ji; umode togwa kurido ie tabowu jiwo aidugirimode, paga karega, batararodurewu ja mitumode.

2. Pao Aroe Eimejera, awiapagado inagoi itoragudu tabo duji. Ikinorudo ure boe epagududowu piji.
3. Iwiado ro pegarewuge, roarodurewuge etonai ii du piji.
4. Ere ceru merido tariga rairewu reore, ere tuwadaru pegarewu udo turugadu boe etugo korirewu reore, cidogodu biawo tabo ro pega bokwarewuji.
5. Eidogodure tukai boe edo boe pa du tabo, tubagudu bokwa tabo.
6. Ere pu mearudu awadudo pudui boe pegarewu bogai. Ere tumearudaedo inoba turomode tuwo jorubo mugudo tumedage ewogai  du bogai, tagoi oino pudui du tabo:
7. "Ioguduba jorudumode pai tuwo tugogado paro pegarewuji?"
Mare aiwore boe etaroe towu, boe ewabo towu, ure tugogado ei.
8. Pao itogodunure tugo tabo ei, umode etogorido kuri je.
9. Umode ewududo ekeru koia. Jorudure eiwuge eiamedu boe emode taora mekido bai je.
10. Dukodi icare, ime eiamedu boe epagudugodumode, emode Pao ro rakado, emode boe pa ro boeji.
11. Ro jetororewu jekaremode Pao ji, umode tugijoru mugudo keje; uwabo ro jetororewuge eiamedu boe eegaremode puapo.

2. Ure turugadu boewo akagaru kurido Sião keje, Pao Aroe Eimejera, boewo turomodedu to, amearudure boe enogwamaguduji kodi.
3. Boe eiamedu boe etumode akae, turo pegarewu koia.
4. Cero pegarewu rakare cero raka kori, mare akire are ceginorudo piji.
5. Are akeragu jiwu tumuguwo awororo kejewuge eiwo aidugirire.  Cedamogodure awai tadawu boe pemegarewu tabo.
6. Aro raka kurirewu tabore amagore  ewadaru jipagi, Pao Aroe Eimejera, ure ceginorudowu; moto okwa kejeboe, padu jaegirire pobo aiare tabowu moto kejeboe ekijoru panure aki.
7. Are torekaridoge emugu rakado aduru tabo, ai aro raka kogudo apeagajeje du tabo.
8. Are boekorire jiwu pobo maerewu jaruru butugugo, pobo maerewu pobuto jaruru, boe eiaruru jamedu.
9. Moto okwa kejewu boe etamagadure tubagudu koia ace. Are mugure meri rutu kudaboe, meri butu kudaboe, enoiogwarido tuiegare tabo.
10. Ature moto kae, are pobo reko joki, ai okorobadudo boe enoroe kurirewu tabo du tabo.
Pao o pobo okorobadure po tabo. Are boe eke trigo  udo turugadu boepa keje.
11. Oinore are motodo turugadu, ai pobo reko boe joki du tabo, amago pemegai boture pijiboe ji du tabo.
12. Are joru jamedu enawudo ako boe pemegarewu tabo, moto pemegarewu akoda boe rema. Boe jamedu botu kuricigore akodurewo jamedu boe keje.
13. Boebutu boture boe makodu tada. Boe aoporure tubemegado tuiegare tabo.
14.  Boku jamedu boe korobadure barege kugure ebo, boe boarewu ure tubemegado boe enari boe tabo; boe enoiogwarire tuiegare tabo, turagodu tabo.

2. Moto jamedu boe tagoiogwarido Pao Aroe Eimejera ji, tarago ie uruguji, tagogwa jerebarido apo.
3. Tagagodo oino Pao ji: "Oinore aro kuricigore!
Aro raka koiare onare aiwuge emago jerebarire akabo jamedu!
4. Moto jamedu boere tubujodo ai turagodui awogai du tabo, tui akie kurido du tabo".
5. Mato! Taeruduwo Pao roji, Pao roi Adão orei turo raka tabo duji.
6.  Ure pobo maerewu kidudo moto reore, ere pagado pobo kajeje tuwure kidu tabo.
7. Taegare kuricigodo Pao apo. Jeture boe ji turo raka tabo jii je! Joku jeture boe epadui pumekejedu jamedu boe ji, ro pegarewuge ekawo taogado.
8. Boe eiamedu boe, tamago pemegado Pao Aroe Eimejera ji, akaru awadudo tamago raka tabo.
9. Koiare ure paragoje kimodo, ukare pawure tududo iaboe iaboeto,
10. U! Pao Aroe Eimejera, are arokagado  cei, are cebemegado boe magai meriri kigadurewu pemegado joru tabo du reore.
11. Are  ewududo bukigu enarewuto, are boe motudurewu mugudo cewugeje.
12. Are ia moto tuginoiwu kejewu udo turorerudo cei. Are boe motudurewu mugudo  cewugeje. Cebadure joru kajeje, pobo kajeje, mare akire are cedo ake tawuje pugeje.
13. Inure iremo awaito ino mea tabo, inure iromodedu to akai.
14. Iromodedu aregodui iiabijiwu, inagore imoduie to ikiarigodukeje.
15. Imode ino mea baradurewu maku akai, imode tapiradoge, tapira maiwuge emagu cabritodoge eredudu tabo.
16. Taiamedu boe tabagudui Pao cedu, mato, amearuduwo  imode tawie ure to inaiboeji.
17. Inoiogwarire bogai, ikerure akaru kurido.
18. Itaidumode boe pegarewuji iwabo tada ma, Pao biapaga modukare ii.
19. Mare Pao mearudure iwadaruji, biapagare inoiogwarii tuwogai duji.
20. Boe eegarewo Pao ji, ukare inogwamagudu puduidu jaedo pudui; ukare tumearudu kurii iidu jaedo ii.

2. Pao Aroe Eimejera okuduwo pagabo, uwo boe pemegado pai, tui tuie rugudo paiogi du tabo.
3. Boe eeruduwawo tudawaraji woe moto keje, boe epadui pumekejedu boe eiamedu boe eeruduwo cinorudodaeji.
4. Boewo tuwadaru jerebarido akabo, Pao Aroe Eimejera, boe epadui pumekejedu jamedu boe ewo tuwadaru jerebarido akabo.
5. Boe epadui pumekejedu eegarewo, ai akogado moto kejeboe ji boe jetororewu tabo duji.
Are akogado boe ji boe jetororewu tabo, aeture boe ji moto keje du koia.
6. Boewo tuwadaru jerebarido akabo, Pao Aroe Eimejera, boe epadui pumekejedu jamedu boe ewo tuwadaru jerebarido akabo.
7. Motore tubijiboe botudo. Pao Aroe Eimejerare paiwo aidugirido.
8. Paowo boe pemegado pai;  moto okwa pa jamedu boe epagudumode ce.

2. Paonure taogado; onare jiwuge eregodure koda piji.
3. Anure ewogwado boe eredudu reore; ro pegarewuge etagedumode Pao jekai piobori kugudu magai jeriri kori koia du reore.
4. Ro jetororewuge eegarere Pao jekai; eegarere, ererure tuiegare koia.
5. Tarago Pao ji, tagogwa akodo ieji, awara utonado mugure boetugu kejewu ai; taegaredo Pao ji, tarerudo jekai.
6. Marenarue etuonure ema, jeture ukoge bokwarewu aremei. Oinore Paore tuwai pemegarewu tada.
7. Paore ia bai maku marenarue etai, ure mugure baicorewu tadawuge einorudo, ure etamogodudo tuge kuri tabo. Mare ure tugera ra ro arodurewuge epiji boe makodu tada.
8. Are atawuje boe ebo amerui etododai boe makodu tada.
9. Moto magadure, barure tagagirido Pao jekai, Israeldoge eno Aroe Eimejera jekai.
10. Pao Aroe Eimejera, are bubutu kuricigorewu butudo, are ako moto metugodu udo tudugu tudo.
11. Awobe emugure, are udo turugadu marenarue etaiwu moto keje.
12. Are awadaru maku, ure nono ia tugobaigarege eiarurure.
13. Tugobaigarege eimejerage eregodure, boe eimejeragore toroe rugadu pedo jamedu.
14. Ai akamudo barege kugure eeda ibora tada du tonaji, metugu ikodo ure tudo nono meriri kigadu reore, bo urugure meriri eku kaworu reore.
15. Pao ure ro rakarewuge etaodo boe joki, boetugu kigadurewu magai taodo torekari cerewu joki du reore.
16. Pao o torekari! Basan kejewu torekari! Torekari rico rairewu, Basan kejewu torekari!
17. Torekari rico rairewu, kodiba akorire Paore tugeragu jiwu tumuga cewu torekariji? Pao umode tumugudo keje jii je.
18. Pao o imaridodoge emagaguragare, boe emodukare enodo pa bu; Pao aregodure Sinai piji tumuguwo tuwai pemegarewu tada.
19. Tarudure boe ao kae, tare iera kogudodurewuge erego; tare tamorido jiwuge emagudure tagai, du tabowo Pao uwai pemegarewuwo du bogai.
20. Boe emago emagore Pao ji meri jameduji, jeture pai: ure paginorudowu Aroe Eimejeranure ema.
21. Pago Aroe Eimejera, ure boe einorudowu Aroe Eimejeranure ema.
22. Emare umode onare pudumiwuge etaora peagirido, umode merure turo pegarewu tabowuge etaora rakarewu peagirido.
23. Pao akore oino: "Imode etarego Basan piji tugera kogu tabo, imode etarego pobo maerewu opo piji tugera kogu tabo.
24. Awure metumode onare aiwu ku tada, akagu arigaodoge enogwagemode ji jamedu.
25. Boe eerudure awobe ekodui Pao apo uwai pemegarewu tada duji.
26. Urarewuge ekodure boetoji, okwa akorewuge ekodure boi, nogware kugure ekodure etoiadoda tugera akoi to ka boe jitu tabo.
27. Emago pemegare Pao ji tuiamedu tabo. Israel otojiwuge emago pemegare Pao ji!
28. Benjamim rece! Tubegagonure ema; unure Judá uwobe eimejerage, Zabulon uwobe eimejerage, Neftali uwobe eimejerage erego, tugudae atugo atugorewu tabo.
29. Pao Aroe Eimejera, amagodo, amagodo aro raka tabo. Are boe eerududo mugure Jerusalém kejewu aro tabo.
30. Boe eimejerage etumode akae, tuwo to mea maku akai.
31. Amago korido mugure kadoguru kejewugei, tapira ime, tapira maiwuge epadui pumekejedu boe ji, ewo tuiejodo akododai, ewo meriri ekurewu arego akai.
32. Egito kejewu boe kurirewuge etaregodumode, Etiópia kejewuge emode tugera aogado Pao ae.
33. Jeture moto kejewu boe eiamedu boe tarago Pao ji, tarago cewu merure to imarido tabo boetugu aogeje jii jewuji.
34. Ure boe emearududo tuwadaru rakarewuji:
35. Taeruduwado Pao ro rakaji: urugu mugure Israeldoge ewugeje, ro raka mugure boetugu aogeje.
36. Pao ro rakaguragare tuwai tada: ure boe eduru, boe eraga, maku boe etai.
Boe emago pemegawo Pao Aroe Eimejera ji!

2. Ino Aroe Eimejera, ikinorudo! Pobo rutunure jii ikidoru kae!
3. Iwogwanure ia rotu ko rairewuto, inure iremo pobo ko rairewuto, poborere tumugudo iwugeje.
4. Imedugodunure inoiogwari koia, iruwo urure; ioku akedugodunure ipagai Pao bogai du tabo.
5. Kodu kagirire ii paga tu jewuge emaga kodure itao kori. Ure itagedudowuge ero rakaguraga, etonare ii paga tu je. (Imodukana ikiwogukare jiboe maku?)
6. Ino Aroe Eimejera, aeruduware itaora baibaiji, iro pegarewu biadodukare aegai.
7. Upagare awogaiwuge epoguru kawo imi, Pao utugare makarewu!
Jemarure awogaiboe epogurae kawo imi, Israeldoge eno Aroe Eimejera!
8. Aigoiare ire idurudo boe emago pegai ii duji, ipoguraere tubodo ie tabo jamedu.
9. Aigoiare  ia moto tuginoiwure imi iwiemage etai, ia boe tuginoiwure imi imuga ore etai.
10. Paga karega, imearudu kurii awai jitu ure ikowuje; mako pegare aiwuge ewadaru pega buture iwugeje.
11. Imode itodorogado ii ma, inodu koiare emago pegare ii.
12. Imode ia aroia okwatori tugu ii ma, urumode enogwarido ii.
13. Okwa podure pui baiporo kejewuge rumode imi; ire nono kudure kuru korireboe cewuge eragodu reore.
14. Imirema, ino Aroe Eimejera, inogwamagudumode awogai! Amagodo imago jipagi, ia boe pemegarewu keje, amearudu kuri koia, ai boe einorudo boe jokodu tabo du koia.
15. Itawuje rotokuru piji, iwogwa kawo, iwo ikinorudo onare iiwuge epiji, pobo ko rairewu piji.
16. Pobore ukawo tumugudo iwugeje, rotokuru korewu ukawo ikowuje, motoia okwa ukawo tumi iiogi.
17. Amagodo imago jipagi, ino Aroe Eimejera, boe pemegarewunure amearudu kuriaece. Ae kirimi itae akogudu kurirewu koia.
18. Akaba ae biado atugare piji! Boe erorerure ii; amagodo imago jipagi guru guru tabo.
19. Apuredo ii, ikinorudo! Akeragu ii onare iiwuge epiji.
20. Aeruduware ikiariji, ipoguruji, iwo pegaji. Rorerure iiwuge eedure aegai.
21. Boe emago pegai iidu ure iwabo kado jii iwudu kae. Ipagare boe enoguduwo itabo du bogai, mare boe kimore,
Ipagare boe enogwa butuguwo ii du bogai, mare boe bokware.
22. Ere boe eku mak'inai iwo kowuje; ere parera kuru pagodurewu mak'inai ikuduwo ce.
23. Ere koboe ro pegawo ei! Enoroe kurirewu uwo nono ia jorubo pegarewure etai.
24. Boeco jowo eekuto, eerudukawo boeji! Etoriwudu koguduwo jii je.
25. Boe korii aidu redo eiogi Boe korii aidu uru aregoduwo etai.
26. Ewororo biaruwo, boe eedu kawo ewai tada!
27. Mare paga karega, eemarure are okoridowu bogai, ere are okoridowu epae ko taokae.
28. Akogado ero pegarewu boeji tu tu je, awudugugodu kaba ei pugeje.
29. Ekie pijido bapera jerewu piji, ekie padu kawo ro jetororewuge ekie tabo.
30. Imirema, marenarunure imi, iorudure boekori boeji, Pao Aroe Eimejera, aetudo ii ai ikinorudo du tabo.
31. Imode akie kurido iragodu tabo ji, imode aegaredo iegare tabo.
32.  Awu inodu umode Pao jekaredo tapira kori, ia tapira kodui maidu kigarewu buregirewu kori.
33. Marenarue eerudure inoduji, eegaregodure. Jemarure Pao bogaiwuge, tawabo jewo!
34. Paga karega, Pao biapagare roiwa bokware pudabowugei, ukare puapowuge eiaedo pudui.
35. Baru, moto, pobo maerewu, merure kejeboe eiamedu boe, eegarewo ji.
36. Pao umode Sião inorudo. Umode Judá kejewu bakurirewuge etowuje pugeje. Emugumode keje, enomode ema.
37. Etugarege etore eenamode ji; mearudu kurire ie jiwuge emugumode keje.

2. Ino Aroe Eimejera, mato, ikinorudo!
Pao, akaregodu marigudo awo akera braredo ii!
3. Aidure tuwo iragoja kedodowuge epoguruwo, eredugoduwo!
Aidure tuwo iwo pegadowuge ewo tuwure taru tugujebiji, eredugoduwo!
4. Ogwarire iiwuge ewo tuwure taru tugujebiji, epoguruwo!
5. Jemarure awogaiwuge  eegarewo taidu tabo!
Aidure ai boe einorudodu jiwuge egowo oino jii je: "Pao Aroe Eimejera kuri remawunure!"
6. Imirema, marenarunure imi, iroiwakare itabo; ino Aroe Eimejera, akaregodu marigudo! Jeture iiwu, ure ikinorudowunure aki, Pao Aroe Eimejera, awogwa rai kaba!

1. Pao Aroe Eimejera, awugejere ire imodududo, ipoguru kawo jii je!
2. Ikinorudo, aro jetororewu koia! Ikinorudo! Awiapaga marigudo iwogai!
3. Imode itamudo kejewudo aki, iwo ikinorudo. Akire akaidure awo ikinorudo.
Ino tori rakarewu, ino moto ri rakarewunure aki.
4. Ino Aroe Eimejera, ikinorudo ro arodurewu iera piji, ure boe ewido ewidowu iera piji.
5. Ipagare bogaiboe, ikijoru panure aki ikodui maidu piji. Ino Aroe Eimejera.
6. Ikijoru panure aki imuga kuri piji, inoroenure aki iwodu piji; imode akagaru kurido jii je.
7. Ia boe ero kurirewunure imi makarewuge eegai, mare aire ire imodududo.
8. Inogwa amogodure akagaru pemegarewu tabo, arugu tabo, meri jameduji.
9. Akaba ipijido ipegagodukeje. Akaba akera ra ipiji iduru akedugodukeje.
10. Paga karega, onare iiwuge emago kigodure ii; oebatodure iiwuge emearudae pegare ii tuiamedu tabo:
11. "Aroe Eimejera ure tugera ra piji: pawo bito, tageragu ji! Ia aiwore jiboe bokwa!"
12. Ino Aroe Eimejera, aragoje jaekawo ii! Ino Aroe Eimejera, akera braredodu marigudo ii!
13. Aidure tuwo iragoja kedodowuge epoguruwo, epegawo, eiwo pegawo!
14. Imirema, imodukare iwuredo ipagai awogai du piji, ii akagaru kurido du tabo.
15. Inogwamode aro jetororewu kagado meri jameduji, inogwa awadodumode ai boe einorudo duji.
16. Itaregodumode Aroe Eimejera ro raka tabo, iwo boe ewiabutudo aro jetororewu keje.
17. Ino Aroe Eimejera, are ioruduwado ikodui mai du piji. Jii woe ire aro kurirewu kagado.
18. Oino icare, akaba akera ra codurewu, ao kigadurewu ipiji, ino Aroe Eimejera, jii imode aro raka kagado aregodumodewuge ewiagai.
19. Aro raka, aro kurirewu aregodure jii boe tugu kae, Pao Aroe Eimejera, are boe kurirewu towuje, ioguduba ure nono areore?
20. Are iorududo ikiarigodae boeji, boe kori boeji, mare amode akirimi awo iragojedo kimo, amode  akirimi awo itawuje awu moto kejewu jewaduiewo piji.
21. Amode inojarodo ii, amode iwudugugo pugeje.
22. Imirema, iegaremode ai meriri iku akorewu tabo, awadaru rikirewu koia. Ikera akomode meriri akorewuji ai, Israeldoge eno Aroe Eimejera!
23. Inogwa jekaremode ai, ikera akoi ai du tabo, itaroe jamedu, are iragoje kimodo kodi.
24. Ikeru jamedu uragodumode aro jetororewuji meri jameduji, paga karega, aidure tuwo turo pegawo iiwuge eredugodure, epogurure.

1. Pao Aroe Eimejera, aro raka maku boe eimejera ai, aro jetororewu maku boe eimejera onaregedu ai.
2. Jetuwo awobei boe jetorogodurewu tabo, uwo tugogado marenaruei boe jetororewu tabo.
3. Torekaridoge epiji, boe aoporudoge epiji, boe butugugodurewu aregodumode boe etai.
4. Umode tugogado marenaruei boe jetororewu tabo, umode roiwa bokware pudabowuge etore einorudo, umode rorerure eiwuge epeagirido.
5. Rakojewo meri kuda, ari kuda, boe ewodui puregodaji puregodaji du reore.
6. Aregoduwo baru piji boedoguru magai boebutu joki du reore; bubutu magai moto pegodo du reore.
7. O meri keje boe jetorogoduwo, boe butugugoduwo jii ari joku akedu kae.
8. Jetuwo boe ji pobo maerewu piji ia pobo maerewu kae; pobo okwa piji jii moto okwa pa kae.
9. Onare jiwuge emode tuie jodo bure paru, emode ceru kabi moto uruguduji.
10. Tarsis kejewu brae eimejerage, pobo aiare tabowu motodoge kejewu brae eimejerage emode to mea arego bogai.
11. Sabá kejewu brae eimejerage emode to mea arego bogai jamedu.
Moto jamedu boe kejewu brae eimejerage emode tubujodo ji, boe epadui pumekejedu jamedu boe emode utugaregedo pudumi.
12. Umode roiwa bokware pudabowu okwamagudui puduiwuge, boe ewiapagakare jiwu marenarue, einorudo.
13. Okudumode ro rakakarewu apo, umode ocarokare puduiwuge einorudo.
14. Umode einorudo boekorire jiwuge epiji, boe erorerui pudui du piji; paga karega, eku mori kuricigore jekai.
15. (Pao utugare) jewo, Sabá kejewu meriri ekurewu makudumode ai. Boe enogwamagudumode paru tabo, boe eiamedu boe emago pemegamode ji, meri jameduji..
16. Boe eke kuricigomode moto keje jii torekaridoge etaogeje, Líbano kejeboe reore, boe jokiwu boebutu reore.
17. Akaru rakoje rakamode jii je. Boe ewiabutui kejewu rakojemode nono meri joku reore. Boe emago pemegamode boe epadui pumekejedu jamedu boe ji ie koia.
18. Boe emago pemegamode Israeldoge eno Aroe Eimejera ji; paga karega, ema tu rugadu ure boe kurirewu towuje.
19. Boe emago pemegamode ie urugurewuji jii je oino godu!
20. Davi, Jessé  onaregedu,  okwamagudae oto pa reo.

1. Boe jokodu, Pao pemegare Israeldogei, uwabo pemegarewugei.
2. Boce kodi iwure tudukare boeto, boce kodi iwure kororogodukare.
3. Paga karega, ikorire ro arodurewugei, iorudui boe keadukai ei duji.
4. Boekorikare ei, ero rakare, ekogodukare.
5. Eerudukare boe emaragodae motuduji, eeruduwakare iaboe ekiarigodaeji.
6. Ere tuguiedo tojaraece, ere tugudaedo boekorii pudui duce.
7. Ero pegarewu aregodure ewiri piji, ewabo okorobadure tumearudae pegarewu tabo.
8. Emago pegare pemegareboeji, emago pemegare pegareboeji. Emago ocarore togwarerui boe ji du tabo.
9. Emago pegare baru tadaboeji, ekerure moto jamedu boe pegado.
10. Dukodire iwobere tuiekirimi etae, tugudu kuriwo eno pobojari keje.
11, Egore oino: "Aroe Eimejera joruduwa kana? Aroe Eimejera joruduwakare iaboeji iaboeji!"
12. Oinore pegarewugere, ere toroe kuricigodo tuiedu paga tabo.
13. Paga kana ire iwabo kodu pemegado, ii ikera kabi iro pega ka du tabo?
14. Paga karega, bukigu todure ii boe jameduji; boere ido itodorogado ii meri jameduji tu tu je.
15. Imagomode: "Imagowo ei”, oino ma,  iro pega rumode awobe etorei.
16. Dukodi icare ire iwia tugu awu inoduto, mare ure nono boe motudurewure inai.
17. Jii ia meri keje ire iremo Pao uwaito, dukeje icare ire boe pa inoba boemode ei duji.
18. Ca! Are ro pegarewuge eedudo boe jejorewu keje, are akera jodo ewugeje boe pegarewuto.
19. Ewudure boe pegarewuto pi tuku je, etagedure, ewire tubagudu koia.
20. Aedadukejere are epijido boe enuiao reore, Pao Aroe Eimejera.
21. Itaroe metu pemegakare itada, iwabo kiarigodure.
22. Mare imadadu koia; ikare boe pa, dukodire irore nono barege erore aegai
23. Mare oino, iragojemode akabo jii je; are akera kogudo ikera jetororewu kajeje.
24. Amode ikodu pemegado akogituwa tabo, amode amugudo iwugeje arugu tabo.
25. Kaboba mugure baru tada apiji inai? Iragojei akabo du tabo, itaidukare iaboe iaboeji apiji awu moto keje.
26. Ikodu, iwabo, akedugodunure, mare iwabo mugure kejewu torire, inoroe,nure Pao ce jii je.
27. U! Ure tuiaedo apijiwuge ewogwamode, ro pegare aiwuge eiamedu boe are epijido.
28. Imirema, iragojei Pao Aroe Eimejera apodu boe pemegarewunure ema inai.
Ire imodududo Aroe Eimejera keje. Ireadoduwo  aro jamedu boeji.

1. Pao Aroe Eimejera, inoba ure kodiba are cebijido jii je, akorigodui aeture jiwu barege kugurei?
2. Awiajetudo awu are akeragu ji boe paru pijiwu boe ewugeje; are inorudowu akaiwu boe, amugure kejewu awu Sião torekari.
3. Arudu kae, aeruduwo boe pegarewu akedu bokwarewuji:
Onare aiwuge ere boe rugadu pegado awai tada.
4. Rorerure boe eiwuge emago pegare awobe ere tudo puiwu keje.
5. Ere to kruca tuginoiwu bu baiporo kurirewu aogeje.
6. Boe emagai paro to iguru jitu reorere, ere baiporodoge epegado paro tabo, meriri toriwudurewu tabo.
7. Ere joru tugu awai pemegarewuto. Ere akie padure kejewu bai rugadu butudo moto kae, ere pegado.
8. Egore oino tuwabo tada: "Pawo eeda kedodo rugadu!"
Ere joru tugu Pao uwobe ere tudo tudo puiwu baidogeto.
9. Ceerudukare ceno kruca boeji pugeje, makore Pao bataru jiwuge eeda kedore. Ia cedodaboe eerudukare inoba boemodedukejeba awu inodu akedumode.
10. Jii inoba boemode dukejeba rorerure boe jiwu mako pega akedumode? Onare aiwuge emodukana akie perodudo jii je?
11. Kodiba are akera taru, ai akera jetororewu biado amo keje du tabo?
12. Akirema, ino Aroe Eimejera, Ikimejeranure aki boe paru piji; akire are boe einorudo moto jamedu boe keje.
13. Are Pobo maerewu kado puiato aro rakarewu tabo; are pobo tadawu barege kurirewuge ekidoru kado.
14. Are Aroe tarigo aora peagirido, are kodu maku boe kaowu barege eke ce.
15. Are pobojaridoge etawuje, are poboredoge etawuje jamedu. Are pobo akedumodukarewu kidudo.
16. Akonure merice, akonure boecoce; are boe rugudo, are meri joku mugudo.
17. Are moto okwa bu, are joru to, are butao towuje.
18. Awiagodu kaba onare aiwuge emago pegaji, boe pegarewuge emago pegai akie jituji.
19. Akaba akagu metugu gigiri maku  boekorire jiwu barogo ai. Awiagodu rai kaba awobe marenarue epiji.
20. Awia jetudo ai awadaru maku du kae; paga karega, moto jeke jamedu boe okorobadure boe korigodae tabo.
21. Boe erorerure jiwuge ekawo tuwiado tuboguru koia. Marenarue, roiwa bokware pudabowuge emago pemegawo akieji.
22. Pao Aroe Eimejera, aragojedo, akogado aiboeji, awia jeto ro pegarewu mako pegai ai meri jamedu jituji!
23. Awiagodu kaba rorerure aiwuge eiaruru piji, ure taogado atogiwuge eiaruru ricodurewu piji.

2. Pao Aroe Eimejera, cemago pemeganure ai, cemagonure akieji, ceragodunure aro kurirewuji.
3. "Itaidumode dukeje, imi rugadu imode ikogado boe jetororewu tabo.
4. Moto amagadumode mugure kejewuge ebo, mare imire ire bure tugu.
5. Inagore ocarore puduiwugei: Tagojarokaba tai! Imagore ro pegarewugei: Tagaba tagaora aogado.
6. Tagaba tae aogado tagojaroi tai du tabo, tamago kaba tai tagidoru rakado du tabo".
7. Paga karega, meri rutu piji karega, meri butu piji karega, boe makodu piji karega, torekaridoge epiji karega Pao aregodumode tuwo tugogado boe ji.
8. Ia ure udo turodo gu moto kae, ia ure udo taogado.
9. Pao iedure boe ekudure towu ruwoboji, okorobadure parera kuru okoi pugao du tabo. Umode redo, boe ekudumode ce jii boe gigudu jetui opo keje du kae. Moto kejewu ropegarewuge eiamedu boe ekudumode ce.
10. Imirema, imago pemegamode ji jii je, inogwa akomode Jacó o Aroe Eimejera ai.
11. Imode ropegarewuge eiamedu boe eeri bowuje, du tabo ro jetororewuge emode tuie aogado.

2. Boe eeruduware Aroe Eimejera ji. Ie kuricigore Israeldoge etada.
3. Salém kejere uwai mugure; Sião keje muga padure.
4. Nonore ure baiga uruberi kado, ure onare boe jiwu meriri aiarewu, tariga rairewu, kado, ure boe erugodui puidu okwado.
5. Ae padure arugu tabo, amedui atoda du tabo, boere tugeragu jiwu onare puduiwuge enoroe aogeje.
6. Pagudu bokwarewuge ewire, tugobaigarege eiamedu boe ekana rokare turomode duji.
7. Amago okori keje, imaridodoge, kawarudoge, ere tuwuredo.
8. Boe epagudaenure aki, ioguduba rakojemode aegai akorigodukeje?
9. Are boe emearududo aromode duji baru piji, icare moto pagudugodure, makokare.
10. Pao umode turagojedo tuwo tugogado, tuwo moto kejewu marenarue eiamedu boe einorudo.
11. Ime ekorigodu ure akagaru kurido jamedu. Ure cinorudo akorigodu pijiwuge ere akagaru kurido jamedu.
12. Taromodedu towuje tago Aroe Eimejera ai. Tagire tare akaru kurido, tago meado ure boe epagududowu Aroe Eimejera ai.
13. Ure moto kejewu brae eimejerage epeagirido, moto kejewu brae eimejerage epagudaenure ema!

2. Itaidure imagowo Aroe Eimejera ji imago raka tabo!
Itaidure imagowo ji imago raka tabo, mearudure imagoji.
3. Ikiarigodure jiwu meri keje iemarure Pao bogai; boecoji ikare itamudo ii ikera aogado du tabo. Itaroe aidukare boewo tuwudugugo.
4. Iwiabutui Pao keje dukeje, itoragudu aregodure ipiji. Imearudaei ji dukeje, imorora kugudugodure.
5. Are norekori barigu ioku piji, imorora amagadure ii, iroiwakare imagowo.
6. Imearudaere mariguduboe keje, iwiabuture mariguduwu joru keje.
7. Boecoji imagore iwabo tada, imearudaere, itaroe unaragodure:
8. Pao Aroe Eimejera umodukana cebijido jii je? Umodukana tuwudugugo cei pugeje?
9. Mearudu kuri akedu kanure jii je? Bataru akedu kana aregodumode puregodaji puregodajiwuge etai?
10. Pao biagodukana toiagudu piji, iarema ukana tuwabo mi boekori tabo?
11. Inagore: "Ire boe pa iwo pegaji: Pao iera ukare nono tugerare; ierare tuginoi".
12. Mare iwiabuture Pao Aroe Eimejera ro boe keje, ro mariguduwu keje.
13. Ire imearudae tugu ro jamedu boe keje, ro kurirewu keje.
14. Pao Aroe Eimejera, akawara pemegare! Ia aroe eimejera umodukana nono Pao Aroe Eimejerare?
15. Aroe Eimejera ro kurirewunure aki; are boe epadui pumekejedu eerududo aro rakaji.
16. Are awobe Jacó ore, José ore, einorudo akana tabo.
17. Pobodoge eerudure ai dukeje etamagadure, jewaduiewo boe etamagadure jamedu.
18. Boetugure butaodoge ewududo; boetugu motudurewuge eiarurugodure, atugo ure tumegido jice woje jice woje.
19. Ako boiaruru jaruru rekodure boe kao; ako boe jeragudu urugure moto joki, motore tamagadudo.
20. Akawara kodure pobo maerewu oiagi, akoda kodure pobore kurirewu keje. Boe ekare boe pa akoda boeji.
21. Are awobe erego barege kugure ereore, Moisés, Aarão mage ekera tabo.

1. Iwobe, tawiapagado ii boe eroiaguduji; tawiapaga pemegado imagomode tawiegai boeji.
2. Imode iia barido bakaru tabo, ireadodumode jaowu bakaruji.
3. Cemearudure jiboe, ceeruduware jiboe jamedu boe, ceomage ereadodure cewiagaiboe jamedu boe,
4. cemodukare biado etore epiji, cereadodumode ceregodajiwuge ewiagai:
Pao urugu, ro raka, ure to cenai boe kurirewu jamedu boe.
5. Ure tuwadaru maku Jacó ai; ure eromodedudo Israeldoge etai, makore ceomagei ewo  inodu kagado tore etai,
6. Butumode eregodajiwuge, etore, ewo boe pa ji du bogai. Eragojewo, ereadoduwo tore ewiagai.
7. Ewo tugijoru bu Pao keje, ewiagodu kawo Pao ro piji, erowo nono ui boe eroiagudu reore.
8. Ekawo nono tuomage ereore, duwugere emearutorukare, ekera kiarire, ewabo kodu jetorogodukare, etaroe mearutorukare Pao bataruji.
9. Efraim ore, roiwarewu tugobaigarege, boe erugodui pui dukejewu meri keje ere taodo boe joki.
10. Ekare Pao akoi puduidu pado pemegado, etaidukare tugoduwo nono ui boe eroiagudu rekodaji.
11. Ewiagodure ro raka jamedu boe piji, ui eerududo turo kurirewu jitu piji.
12. Ure boe kurirewu to etuomage eegai, Egito kejewu moto keje, Tânis kejewu boku keje,
13. Ure pobo maerewu kado puiato, ure edo pagado kajeje, tui pobodo nono ia mitu reore.
14. Meriji ure ia boetugu ko etododai, ure ia jorugu reoreboe ko etododai boeco jameduji.
15. Ure tori bowuje oiado boe makodu tada, ure ekududo pobo rerewuce.
16. Ure pobojari tawuje tori piji, icare pobore ceredo pobo kurirewu reore.
17. Mare ero pegare ji kimo, tui taora aogado Pao ji boe makodu tada du tabo.
18. Ere turokowo Pao ji tuwabo tada, togwamagudui taidure tuwo kowu boe bogai.
19. Egore oino Pao ji: "Pao umodukana ia irá korobadudo boe eke tabo boe makodu tada?
20. Boe jokodu ure tori bowuje, pobo aregodure tui tumaedo boe joki du tabo. Umodukana amirewu maku, kodureboe maku tuwobe etai?"
21. Tumearudui inodu jitu keje, Pao korigodure. Ia joru urugodure Jacó otodai, Pao korigodure Israeldogei.
22. Emearutorukare Pao ji kodi, epagakare ui boe einorudodu bogai.
23. Du inodu tabo ure boetugu udo baiporo jado baru tada.
24. Ure maná butudo tuwo enogwagedo, ure baru tadawu amirewu maku etai.
25. Eiamedu boe ere nowu amirewu ure boe edurudowu kowuje tu tu je, ure boe arego du kuricigodo ewogai.
26. Ure ia bakuru arego meri rutu piji; ure paribureadoge eiaogwaiwu bakuru arego turo raka tabo.
27. Ure kodureboe butudo ewugeje bubutu reore, kiege barege emagaguragare, ere nono pobo maerewu okwaiwu kugaru gugudu reore.
28. Ure ewududo ewororo oiagi, ewai boe parugajeje.
29. Ere kowuje, enogwa amogodure, rore ei nono etaidu reore kodi.
30. Mare enogwa amogodukare roga, eke meture eiadoda kimo du tabo,
31. Pao korigodae jore ewugeje. Ure ro rakarewuge epeagirido, ure Israeldoge ipare ewududo.
32. Du inodu tabo, ero pegare kimo, emearutorukare ro kurirewuji.
33. Eno meri akedure boe enogwamudu reore, eno joru raigirikare tubagudukeje.
34. Ui ewido dukeje icare eemarure bogai, ere tuiedorodo, tuiemaru tabo bogai.
35. Ewiabuture tugijoru padui Pao keje duji, Pao baru tadawu koiaie ure  inorudo duji.
36. Ewadaru ocarore apo togwa tabo, mare ere jekiri pagado tugeru tabo.
37. Ewabo jetorokare ji, emearutorukare ui tuwadaru maku pudai duji.
38. Mare togudu koia, butugugodure ero pegarewuji, ukare eeda kedodo. Ure tugorigodu metu metudo tudada, ukare tugorigodui eidu jamedu awadudo.
39. Biabuture boekodu iure emage duji, eie nono ia bakuru aregodu reore, umodukare tugirimi tuibagi pugeje du reore.
40. Ere turokagado jidu maedo boe makodu tada, ere boekori boekorido ji boe biaru tada.
41. Ere turokagado Pao ji pugeje, ere Israeldoge Etuo Pemegarewu korigo pugeje.
42. Ewiabutukare ierai einorudo onare puduiwuge epiji dukeje,
43. Ui turo rakarewu towuje Egito tada dukeje, ui turo kurirewu tawuje Tânis boku keje dukeje.
44. Ui pobo koda, pobore boe, edo nono boe eku reore, ukai ekududo ce dukeje.
45. Ure rukue etarego etae ure edo ekowuje, ure braetaetaedoge edo tumaedo eiogi.
46. Ure marugodudoge edo eno boepa tadaboe rugadu oiko, ure emaragodae maku bokokuadoge etai.
47. Ure eno parera iguru rugadu pegado boporira tabo, ure eno iguru rugadu bito biaku rakarewu tabo.
48. Boporirare eegu tapiradoge eeda kedodo, baigabere eegu barege kugure eeda kedodo.
49. Ure tugodu kagiri jamedu boe butudo ewugeje, tui ekiarigodu, epagudugodu kuricigodo du tabo.
Ure ure boe pegadowu tupadoge etarego etae. Ure tugodu kagirii eidu kodu awadudo.
50. Ukare edo cinorudo tuwi piji pugeje, mare ure emagu boe kogodae pegare kae.
51. Ure boetojiwu boe etore eiamedu boe etogorido Egito keje, ure Cam uwai kejewu boetojiwu boe etore eeda kedodo.
52. Ure tuwobe etawuje barege kugure ereore, ure erego boe makodukeje.
53. Ure erego emorora amagadukai pudui du tabo. Mare pobo maerewu ure taodo onare eiwuge eiogi.
54. Ure edo turemo turagoja pemegarewuto, ure tugeragu jiwu torekari keje.
55. Ure boe epadui pumekejedu ewarigu ekoda piji, ure moto remagu bukigu tabo etai, ure Israeldoge epadui pumekejedu emugudo tuwai tada.
56. Du inodu tabo ere turokagado Pao baru tadawuji, taidukai turowo nono ui boe eroiagudu reore.
57. Ere tugodu pegado, erore nono tuomage ereore, ia baiga iku kugudurewu reore.
58. Ere Pao korigo tui tubujodo Aroe Eimjerakare emawugei eno aoporu keje du tabo.
59. Pao jorudure, korigodure, ure epijido rugadu.
60. Ure Sião kejewu, mugure tadawu ime ebowu, tuwai pijido.
61. Ure eduru maku ia moto tuginoiwu kejewuge etai, ure erugu mugudo rorerure eiwuge ekera keje.
62. Ure tuwobe emagu tariga rairewu kai, korigodure togei kodi.
63. Jorure eno ipare eeda kedodo, eno nogware kugure eroiwakare tuwo tugogedo tuiegare tabo pugeje.
64. Eno sacerdotedoge ewudure tariga rairewu keje, eno areme ukoge bokwarewuge etoragudukare.
65. Pao jetadure nono ia imedu unudurewu reore, ia pagudu bokwarewu imedu aora baibaire parera kuru kori koia du reore.
66. Ure rorerure eiwuge etogorido eporuto, ure emagu tuboguru kai jii je.
67. Ure José uwai pijido, ukare tugeragu Efraim uwobei pudai.
68. Ure tugeragu pudai Judá uwobei, mearudu kurire jiwu Sião torekariji,
69. Ure tuwai mugudo baru tadawu tuwai reore, ure mugudowu moto reore.
70. Ure tugeragu tudugare Daviji, ure tawuje barege kugure eeda piji.
71. Ure arego barege kugure epiji, jetuwo tuwobe Jacóji, tore Israeldogei.
72. Jeture ei tuwabo pemegarewu tabo, ure erego tugera joruduwarewu tabo.

1. Pao Aroe Eimejera, mearutorukarewuge ere tugeragu akoroeji, ere awai pemegarewu pegado, ere Jerusalém rugadu butudo.
2. Ere atugarege ewido, ere emagu kiege barege etai ewo kowuje.
3. Ere eku redo pobo reore Jerusalém oiei, boe bokware tuwo etugu mototo.
4. Boe ewadaru keadaenure cegi mugu puredure ceiwuge etai; boe eegareae, boe ewadaru keadaenure cegi cenoieiwuge etai.
5. Jii inoba boemodedukejeba akorigodumode, Pao Aroe Eimejera?
Jii boe akedu kae? Akimaredu korimodukana joru uru kori reore?
6. Boekorii aidu maedo awu boe epadure pumekejedu joruduwakare aiwuge eiogi, awu boe enogwamagudukare akie jiwuge  eiogi.
7. Paga karega, ere Jacó kowuje, ere muga rugadu pegado.
8. Awiajetu kaba cedododaiwuge ero pegarewuji. Akogudui cedabodu aregodu marigudo cedogi, cegugudugodunure kodi.
9. Akerabraredo cei, ure ceginorudowu ceno Aroe Eimejera, akie urugu koia. Awudugugo cei cero pegarewu boeji, ceginorudo akie koia.
10. Kodiba padure pumekejewu boe egomode: "Kaiba eno Aroe Eimejera mugure?" Padure pumekejewu boe ewo boe pa ai atugarege eku redodu morido duji.
11. Boe erorerure jiwuge eragudu aregoduwo akae, bitodumodewuge einorudo akana ro rakarewu tabo.
12. Mugu puredure  eiwuge emago pegai aidu moridodu makado etai.
13. Cegirema, awobe, akagu barege kugure, cemago pemegamode ai jii je. Cemode akagaru kurido boe ewodui pudato pudato du tabo.

2. Jeture Israeldoge eiwu, awiapagado, akire are José uwobe erego barege kugure ereore, akire are amugudo tupadoge etaogeje.
3. Ae rugudo Efraim, Benjamim, Manasés mage eegai. Aragojedo aro raka tabo, mato, awo akerabraredo cei!
4. Pao Aroe Eimejera, cedo cegirimi! Ae rugudo ceiogi, cewo ceginorudo.
5. Pao Aroe Eimejera, jii inoba boemode dukejeba akorigodumode, awobe enogwamagudure awogai dukodi karega.
6. Are enogwagedo amirewui eekuruguru ceduji, are ekududo turagudu kuricigoce.
7. Are mugu puredure ceiwuge emago pegado cegi. Onare ceiwuge ewadaru keadure cei.
8. Pao utugare makarewu, cedo cegirimi! Ae urugudo ceiogi, cewo ceginorudo!
9. Parera ikunure awobece, are etawuje Egito piji, are boe ewarigu awu moto piji awo etugu keje.
10. Are moto pemegado akododai, ukwa boe boture, ure taodo moto joki.
11. Tugure torekaridoge eiogi, iku boe ere tubodo Pao o cedro iguru tabo.
12. Ure cigu arego jii pobo maerewu kae, ure  enogugodu arego pobo kae.
13. Kodiba are ibora butudo merurewuge ewo tugeragu ji?
14. Boe tadawu jugodoge ewo pegado, boe kaowu barege ewo kowuje?
15. Pao utugare makarewu, ae kirimi aibagi, akaiwodo baru piji, aerududo, atudo awu parera iguru kae.
16. Aetudo akerare tugu boeji!
17. Ere kowu joru tabo boe magai boe gigudu kowu du reore.
Ewogwamode ae korigodu koia.
18. Akera bu aeture jiwu imedu ao keje, are akeragu jiwu Adão naregedu ao keje.
19. Cemodukare ceiaedo apiji jii je; ceragojedo jii je, du tabore boe emago pemegamode akieji.
20. Pao utugare makarewu, cedo cegirimi, ae urugudo ceiogi, cewo ceginorudo!

2. Taegare kuricigodo Pao ji, padurunure ema kodi. Tamago pemegado Jacó o Aroe Eimejera ji.
3. Tarago boe erare jiboe ji, tagera akodo kaji, tagera akodo meriri iku akorewu boeji.
4. Tagogwa akodo meriri iworewuto ari maiwu keje, ari korobadukeje, paegarere jiwu meri keje.
5. Paga karega, boe eroiagudunure awu inoduce Israeldoge etai, oinore Jacó o Aroe Eimejera aidure, awu boe eroiagudu makudure José ai, boe ji tudawuje Egito piji dukeje.
6. Ca! Boe emearudure  ia tuioruduwakare jiwu iaboe emagoji:
7. "Ire oredure taboboe rawuje kanaora piji, iera iedukare kodoji pugeje.
8. Boe erorerure ai dukeje akoiogwarire, ire akinorudo. Imagore amago jipagi, ii iwiado boiaruru tada du tabo, ire irokagado ai Meriba kejewu po tada.
9. Iwobe, imagonure tai, tawiapagado. Israeldoge, tamearuduia tu iwadaruji!
10. Ia aroe eimejera paga pagawu ukawo tagabo. Tagaba tabujodo ia aroe eimejera tuginoiwuji.
11. Ako Aroe Eimejeranure imi. Ire arududo Egito moto piji. Aiabarido, imode akogwa amogodudo.
12. Mare iwobe emearudukare imagoji. Israeldoge etaidukare tumearutoruwo iwadaruji.
13. Dukodi icare ire emagu tuwabo rakarewu ai: ekoduwo tudawara mitoduji!
14. Iwobe emearuduia imagoji, Israeldoge emeruia itawaraji...
15. Dukeje imode onare aiwuge ewududo, imode ikerado tuiekirimi onare eiwugei.
16. Kodo kagirire Pao jiwuge emode tuwadaru ocarodo apo jii je.
17. Imode enogwagedo trigo kuduji, imode enogwa amogodudo tori tadawu moiawe eweguru tabo.

1. Paore tugogado ure tugogado boe jiwugei, ure tugogado aroe eimejeragei, akore ei:
2. “Jii inoba boemodedu taboba, tamode tagogado boe ji, tai taiodo ro pegarewuge ero pega keje du tabo?
3. Taiodo ro rakakarewuge ewugeje, marenarue ewugeje, tagogwa pemegado marenaruei, oroe bokwarewugei.
4. Ro rakakarewuge, roiwa bokware pudabowuge einorudo, edo cinorudo ro pegarewuge ekera piji!"
5. Mare eeruduwakare, ekare boe pa, emerure boeco tada, enure moto bure kudaboe jamedu boe amagadudo.
6. Inagore: "Aroe Eimejeragenure tagi. Pao baru tadawu orenure tagi.
7. Du tabo tawimode ia paga pagawu ime ewi reore, tawudumode brae eimejerage ewudu magadu reore".
8. Pao Aroe Eimejera, aragojedo, akogado motoji; paga karega, moto padui pumekejedu jamedu boe eonare ai.

2. Pao Aroe Eimejera, akaba aia mi, amago bokwa kaba, aepaga kaba tu je!
3. Onare aiwuge ere turirigo pudui, kodu kagirire aiwuge ere taora aogado.
4. Emearudaere inoba turomode awobe eiduji, etaidure tuwo turo pegado aeture jiwugei.
5. Egore: "Marigu, pawo ewarigu boe etoia piji; boe ewiabutu modukare Israeldoge ekie keje pugeje".
6. Emago pegare tuiamedu tabo, ia boe ewobei mito tu je du reore, ere tuwadaru maku pudai aiboeji:
7. Edom uwai, Ismaelitadoge, Moab, Agar ore,
8. Gebal, Amon, Amalec, Filisteia kejewuge, Tiro kejewuge;
9. Assur jamedu ure tudo pui ebo, tuwo tugera braredo Ló orei.
10. Arodo nono aro magai Madiã, Sísara, keje du reore, aro magai Jabonji Quison keje du reore ei.
11. Eeda kedore Edon keje, ere tudo nono barege epere moto kai.
12. Arodo eimejeragei aro magai Oreb, Zeb, Zebá, Sálmana, eimejeragei du reore.
13. Duwuge egore: "Pawo pageragu Aroe Eimejera jeture jiboe ji".
14. Ino Aroe Eimejera, edo nono tudureboe enaga butui moto kaedu roi bai bai bai je du reore, bakuru magai raru roto du reore.
15. Joru magai itura kao du reore, joru magai torekaridoge erugudo du reore.
16. Ako eregodaji ako boe pegago du tabo, ako bakuru rakarewu rorido eiogi.
17. Epogurudo tubodo ee tabo ma, eemaruwo akie bogai, Pao Aroe Eimejera!
18. Epoguruwo, emorora amagaduwo jii je, emorora amagaduwo, eredugoduwo, epegadoduwo.
19. Du tabo eeruduwamode tu akie akiere Pao iece; akire akore moto jamedu boece.

2. Pao Aroe Eimejera, oinore awai moture! Imearudu kuricigore ji.
3. Itaroe bigodunure tugiarigodu koia bogai, akemore Pao uwororo bogai. Iwabo, ikodu, jekare kuricigore  Pao jerewu bogai.
4. Metugue kugure eerudure tumugumodewoji awai tada, piroje kugure ere tuwaradu pemegado tada jamedu, tuwo tore eewodudo tada: Ako i ra boe, Pao utugare makarewu, ikimejera, ino Aroe Eimejera!
5. Jiwo aidugirirewuge emugure awai tada, emode akagaru kurido jii je.
6. Jiwo aidugirirewu ime eduru padure awugeje, emerure puapo tuiegare tabo.
7. Tugodui moto kidurewu kori du tabo, ere udo nono ia pobojarire, boetojiwu butaodoge ere boe botudo du kuricigodo piji.
8. Emerure goro goro je tuioruduwo Aroe Eimejera ji Sião keje.
9. Pao utugare makarewu, awiapagado inogwamagudui ai duji. Awiapagado, Jacó o Aroe Eimejera!
10. Akaiwodo, onare ceiwu meriri biarewuji, akaiwodo mugure amugatowu jeji.
11. U! Imugui awai tadadu kodure imugu raicigoi piji du kori.
Imugui ino Aroe Eimejera uwai poro kejedu  kodure imugui roarodurewuge ewai tadadu kori.
12. Paga karega, onare boe jiwu meriri aiarewu reorenure Pao ce, meri joku reorenure Pao ce.  Paore to boe pemegarewu, turugu, maku boe etai. Pao Aroe Eimejera jetorikare merure turo jetororewu tabowugei.
13. Pao utugare makarewu, mearutorure aiwuge eiwo pemegare!

2. Pao Aroe Eimejera, are ako moto jiwo aidugirido, are boe erorerure jiwu Jacó uwobe edo tugirimi to moto kae.
3. Are awobe ero pegarewu okwado, are awiago ero pegarewu piji.
4. Akare boe korii aidu awadudo, akorigodukare pugeje.
5. Ure ceginorudowu Aroe Eimejera, cedo cegirimi, boekorii ai ceidu pijido!
6. Akorigodu modukana cei jii je, boekorii ai boe kodui puregodaji puregodaji du tabo?
7. Amodukare akirimi cewogai awo ceedo pugeje, awobe eegarewo akabo?
8. Pao Aroe Eimejera, ceerududo amearudu kuriaeji, ai ceginorudo du tabo.
9. Imearudumode Pao Aroe Eimejera makomode jiboe ji: makomode boe butugurewuji tuwobei, mearutorure jiwugei, ekawo tugirimi turo pegarewu kae.
10. Ui boe einorudodu puredugodure pagudure cewugei, urugu jomode  pago moto keje.
11. Boe emearudu kuri, boe rikirewu, eerudumode pui; boe jetorogodurewu, boe butugurewu emode todomu pui.
12. Boe jetorogodurewu botumode moto piji, boe jetororewu aiwomode baru piji.
13. Pao Aroe Eimejera mitodu umode boe eiwo pemegado: boe pemegarewu botumode moto piji.
14. Boe jetororewu merumode otodai, boe einorudodu kodumode bure barigudui puregodajidu rekodaji.

1. Pao Aroe Eimejera, ae jodo, awiapagado ii, marenarunure imi iwo kiogakare!
2. Aetudo ii, ameduianure imi! Ikinorudo, imearutorure ai kodi!
3. Ino Aroe Eimejeranure aki, akogududo itabo, aire inogwamagudure meri jameduji.
4. Atugare jekaredo, awogaire ire itaroe  reko!
5. Apemegare, awudugugodure boe ji, Pao Aroe Eimejera, amearudu kurire okwamagudure aiwuge eiamedu boe ji.
6. Amearududo inogwamagudui ai duji, awiapagado inagoi inogwamagudu tabo duji.
7. Inoiogwarimode awogai, boe pegai ii dukeje, paga karega, amagomode imago jipagi.
8. Aroe Eimejerage etada, ia ekare mito areore. Iaboe iaboekare awu moto keje amaragodae reore.
9. Boe epadui pumekejedu eiamedu boe etaregodumode tuwo tubujodo ai, tuwo akagaru kurido du bogai.
10. Paga karega, akuricigore, are boe kurirewu towuje. Aroe Eimejeranure aki, akire are mito tu je.
11. Pao Aroe Eimejera, ioruduwado akawaraji, imerumode amago rikirewu rekodaji; iwabo kodu pemegado akabo, ipaguduwo akiece.
12. Inure tukutaido ai itaroe jamedu tabo, Ikimejera, imode akagaru kurido jii je.
13. Paga karega, amearudu kuricigore ii kodi, are itawuje jewaduiewo opo piji.
14. Pao Aroe Eimejera, ocarore puduiwuge ere turagojedo itogi, ro pegarewuge ere tudo pui ii, ewiapagakare ai.
15. Ino Aroe Eimejera, akire okudurewu, oiagudurewu ure aki, akorigodukare kuri je, amearudu kuricigore, aro jetorogodure.
16. Ae kirimi itae, akogududo itabo,
atugare ro rakado, atugareredo onaregedu inorudo!
17. Boe eerududo amearudu kurii ii duji.
Onare aiwuge eerudumode ma, epogurumode; paga karega, akire aeture ii, are iegaredo.

2. Pao mearudu kurire ture towuje torekari pemegarewu aogejewu bakurirewuji; mearudu kurire Sião kejewu baiporodogei, Jacó uwaidoge ekori.
3. Readodure aruguji, Pao o bakurirewu!: 4."Iwiabuture Raab keje, Babilônia keje, ei tubujodo ii dukeje;
Iaboe buture Filistéia keje, iaboe buture Tiro  keje, iaboe buture Etiópia keje".
5. Mare Siãoji boe egomode: "Ime eiamedu boe ewudure nono,  Pao koiare ure mugu rakado".
6. Pao atugore oino, ture boe eiamedu boe ekie bu kejewu bapera keje: "Awu imedu buture nono".
7. Boe eimejerage, boe etore, eiamedu boe, emuga jeture awugeje.

2. Ino Aroe Eimejera, ure ikinorudowu, meriji, boecoji, inoiogwarire awogai.
3. Inogwamagudui awogaidu aregoduwo jii akae. Ae jodo awiapaga tabo inagoi ikiarigodu tabo duji.
4. Boe pegarewu kuricigore itaroe tada, iragojere jewaduiewo okwai.
5. Boe eerudure ii ure turawuje tuiaro towu jitu reore; imedu duru rakakarewunure imi.
6. Ipa padure birewuge eeda keje marigudu, ia imedu metu magai tuiaro to du reore, awiagodu magai piji jii je du reore, rawujedure akera piji kodi.
7. Ikimejera, are itugu boe emeda ko rairewuto boeco oiado, jewaduiewo tada.
8. Boekorii aidu motudure iwugeje; ako pobuto kurirewure turorido iiogi.
9. Are iwobe, imedage, edo tuiaedo ii, boe pegarewunure imi etai. Imedure boe rutu tada, iroiwakare iwo itawuje.
10. Ioku akedugodure ikiarigodu kuricigorewu koia. Ino Aroe Eimejera, inogwamagudure ai meri jameduji,  ii ikera aogado awogai du tabo.
11. Amodukana aro kurirewu ta birewuge etai? Boetugu kana taogado tuwo akagaru kurido?
12. Boe emago kana amearudu kuriji boe eeda pegarewu keje?
13. Boe eeruduwa kana aro kurirewuji boeco tada? Boe eeruduwa kana aro jetororewuji boe ewiagodu ewiagodure tadawu tuieda keje?
14. Imirema inoiogwarire awogai, ino Aroe Eimejera, inogwamagudae aregodure awogai baa aregodu tabo.
15. Kodiba are ipijido, are ae biado jaegiri ipiji, ino Aroe Eimejera?
16. Iwo pegare, iwigodunure, jii ikodui mai du tabo, ire itagedudo boekorii ii du tabo, akorigodui ii du koia.
17. Boekorii aidu kodure itaoji; ipagudui acedu, ure imago bokwado.
18. Ere taiado itabo pobuto reore meri jameduji, ere tugeragu ii, ere tubodo itabo tuiamedu tabo.
19. Are iwobe, imedage edo tuiaedo ii, are imeduiado boecoce.

2. Iragodumode jii je Pao mearudu kuriaeji, imode kodure  puregodaji puregodajiwuge ewie ako boe rikirewuji.
3. Paga karega, akagore: "Imearudu kuriae mugudodure jii je, ako boe rikirewu mugu rakado baru otoji.
4. Ire iwadaru maku ire ikeragu jiwu itugare ai; ire iwadaru maku itugare Davi ai.
5. Imode aregodajiwu mugudo jii je. Imode aetui boe eidu mugudo kodure puregodaji puregodajiwuge etai".
6. Baru tadaboe ure aro kurirewu kagado, pemegarewuge ei tudo puidu ere amearudu kuriae awadudo.
7. Ioguduba ure nono Paore boetugu aogeje? Aroe eimejerage etore etada kakoduwuba ure nono Pao Aroe Eimejerare?
8. Boe epagudaenure Pao ce pemegarewuge ere tudo puidu tada. Kurire, ro rakare ure taiado apowuge etai.
9. Pao utugare makarewu, ioguduba ure nono areore? Aro rakaguragare, awadaru rikirewu ure tubodo akabo.
10. Akire are amorido pobo maerewu ocaroi pudui duji, umode to pobuto aogado dukeje, akire are butugugo.
11. Are Raab peagirido bireboe ereore; akana ro rakarewu ure onare aiwuge edo taodo boe joki.
12. Akore baru rema, akore moto rema; are moto towuje, are mugure kejeboe jamedu boe towuje.
13. Are Bace Iwararewuge eiaogwaiboe towuje, are Paribureadoge eiaogwaiboe towuje.
14. Akana ro rakare, akera durure, akana pemegarewu ure taogado.
15. Amuga kudaboe boe jetororewu rema; boe emearudu kuriae, boe rikirewu emerure akododai.
16. Uragodurewu boe, eiwo aidugirire: merumode ae urugu kuda.
17. Eegarere meri jameduji akie tabo, eegare kuricigore ako boe jetororewuji.
18. Akire edurure aki, akire erugure aki; akerabrarei cei du tabo are cedo cedaora aogado.
19. Meriri aiarewu onare ceiwugere Pao Aroe Eimejera rema; emare jeture cei, Israeldoge eno Aroe Eimejeranure ema.
20. Ia boe keje amagore atugare pemegarewuge enuiao tada, akagoi oino ei du tabo: "Ire boe etaogajejewu tugu ia tugobaigare pagudu bokwarewu aoto, ire ikeragu itaidure jiwuji boe etoiabiji.
21. Ire ikeragu itugare Daviji, ire boekaguru pemegarewu redo ao joki, boe eimejerawo ema.
22. Emare ire mugudo, ikanare ro rakado.
23. Onare jiwuge emodukare je to pui, roarodurewuge emodukare boe redugodudo ji.
24. Imode rorerure jiwuge epeagirido otodai, imode kodu kagirire jiwuge etogorido.
25. Iwadaru rikirewu, imearudu kuriae, mugumode apo, ro raka ricodumode ikie koia.
26. Imode iera bu pobo maerewu aogeje, imode kana jetororewu bu pobodoge ewugeje.
27. Okwamagudumode ii tagoi oino du tabo : "Ioganure aki, ino Aroe Eimejera, ure ikinorudowu ino torinure aki”.
28. Imode itonaregedu boetojiwudo ema, imode boe eimejerage eimejerado ema.
29. Imearudu kurimode ji jii je, ii iwadaru maku aidu mugu rakamode.
30. Imode rekodajiwuge eragoje rakado jii je; muga rakojemode jii je baru mugu reore.
31. Ore emode ii boe eroiagudu pijido ma, emerumodukare nono imagore jiboe rekodaji ma,
32. Emode ii boe eroiagudu redugodudo ma, ewiapaga modukare ii boe eroiaguduji ma,
33. Imode iwara to ei, ero arodurewu koia, imode bukigu to ei, ero pegarewu koia.
34. Mare imodukare imearudu kurii eidu pijido, imodukare iwadaru rikirewu  okwado.
35. Imodukare ii iwadaru maku etaidu pegado, imodukare iiabijiboe udo tuginoi.
36. Ipemega tabo ire iwadaru maku mito; iwadararodu modukare Davi biegai.
37. Rekodajiwuge eragojemode jii je, mugure kejeboe rakojemode nono meri joku reore iegai.
38. Umode nono arire jii je, ure nono ia krucare boetugu oiadoda.
39. Akirema are boekaguru reko ao jokiwu are pijido, are redugodudo, akorigodure ji.
40. Are atugare ui tuwadaru makudu pijido, are aogejewu barigu moto kae.
41. Are o bakurirewu aiare apowu moto ri butudo, are utugobaigarege ewai mugu rakarewuge epegado.
42. Kodure awara jiwuge eiamedu boe ere tugeragu oroeji.
Ure nono boe epoguraere mugu puredure jiwuge eegai.
43. Are rorerure jiwuge ero raka ko tao kae, are onare jiwuge eiamedu boe eegaredo.
44. Are utariga rairewu kado torito, akare akera braredo ji rugodukeje.
45. Are brae eimejerage ekedure jiboe aru iera piji, are muga butudo moto kae.
46. Are iparedui emadu o joru koborido, are pogureaedo tubodo apo.
47. Jii inoba boemode du taboba amode awiado, Pao Aroe Eimejera?
Jii oto pa kae kana? Joru uru kori magadu reore kana, akorigodu korimode?
48. Pao Aroe Eimejera, Awiabutudo iragoje kobori keje; oinore are towujewu ime eragoje raimodukare.
49. Ioguduba rakoje raicigomode tuwi ka du tabo? Ioguduba umode cinorudo jewaduiewo piji?
50. Kaiba mariguduwu amearudu kuriae mugure? Are awadaru rikirewu maku Davi ai.
51. Awiabutudo boe eredugodui atugare jituji; ire boe epadui pumekejedu emago pega jamedu boe mugudo imorora tada.
Onare aiwuge emago pegare atugare utawaraji.
52. Boe emago pemegawo Pao ji jii je. Oino godu! Oino godu!

1. Pao Aroe Eimejera, awugejere cegidoru padure boe kodui puregodaji puregodaji jii je.
2. Torekaridoge ewodu otodai, moto kejeboe jamedu boe towujedu otodai, Aroe Eimejeranure aki boe paru piji jii boe oto kae, boe oto pa kae jii je.
3. Are bireboedo tugirimi moto uruguduce, akagoi oino du tabo: "Adão ore, tagirimi!"
4. Paga karega, joru makaguragarewu ure nono jawujiwu meriji, ia boeco kobo reore.
5. Etagedure nono barogwa tabowu boe enuiaore, ere nono boebutu botui barogwa kododu tabo du reore:
6. Barogwato ure tuwowuje, boture; meri rekodu tabo kidure.
7. U! Boekorii ai du koia cedagedure, boekorii aidu ure cebagududo, ure  cedamagadudo.
8. Are cero pegarewu bu ae keje; are cero biarewu bu ae urugu tada.
9. Ceno meri jamedu boe ekodure boekorii ai du kuda; ceno joru akedure nono boe enogwamudu reore.
10. Ceno joru aregodumode 70 kae; dururewu aregodumode 80 kae: boe paga paga, boe ecebaenure ema: akedure kuri je; cegi jamedu cegodunure.
11. Ioguduba umode boekorii aidu remagu? Ioguduba umode boe pa akorigoduji tubagudu tabo?
12. Ceeruduwawo cewo ceno meri oto pa bu, cewabo joruduwawo!
13. Pao Aroe Eimejera, akirimi! Jii inoba boemodedukejeba?
Akogududo atugarege ebo!
14. Cedamogo amearudu kuriae tabo baa aregodu tabo, ceegaremode meri jameduji.
15. Ceegarewo ai ceiwo pegadodu morice.
16. Amaragodae awadudo atugarege etai, arugu awadudo cedore ewugeje.
17. Pao o boe pemegarewu muguwo cedabo! Cere towuje cegera taboboe mugu rakado.

1. Mugure Pao baru tadawu iera kejewu, mugure Pao ro rakarewu tugu kudawu,
2. akore Oino Pao ji: "Akire aeture ii, ikijoru padure awugeje; ino Aroe Eimejeranure aki, awugejere ire imearutorae jamedu boe mugudo".
3. Emare umode akinorudo merurewu o bukigu piji, boe ewadaru ui boe pegadu du piji.
4. Umode awiado cigodo kuda, umode tugera braredo ai to meriri aiarewu tabo.
5. Apagudu modukare boeco tadawu boekorice, akururewu meri jiwu tugoce,
6. merure boecojiwu boe ekogodae pegarewuce, ure tumaedo meri brae etaiadodawu brae ekogodaece.
7. Makarewuge ewudumode amegi,  makarewuge ewudumode akana pemegarewu jaogwai ma, iaboe iaboe puredumodukare ai.
8. Aeku jorudumode ro pegarewuge eiwo pegaji.
9. Paga karega, akire akijoru pado Pao Aroe Eimejerace, amugure Pao baru tadawu iera keje.
10. Boe puredumodukare ai, boe pegarewu umodukare boeto awai poroji.
11. Paga karega, ure to tupadoge edo tugerabraredo ai iaboe iaboe kawo ai akawaraji.
12. Umode arego tugera tabo, awure jetu kawo ia tori boeji.
13. Amerumode adugo agarewu kujiagi, ewo kujiagi, awure jomode adugorogu keje, aroe tarigo keje.
14. Ure tumodududo ii dukodi imode inorudo, imode ikerabraredo ji, joruduware ikieji kodi.
15. Okwamagudumode iwogai, imagomode mako jipagi:
"Kiarimode dukeje iragojemode apo, imode inorudo, imode akaru kurido, imode rakoje raicigodo, imode jorududo ii boe einorudo duji".

2. Pemegaguragare boewo tukutaido Pao ji, boe eragoduwo Pao baru tadawu ieji.
3. Boewo amearudu kuriae awadudo baa aregodu tabo, boewo  aro jetorogodurewu awadudo boecoji.
4. Boe ekera akoi bukigu akorewu jamedu boe jitu tabo.
5. Paga karega, are iegaredo aro boe tabo, iegarere are towuje akera tabo boeji.
6. Aro boe kuri remawunure, ino Aroe Eimejera! Amearudaere awo towujeboe oto pa padukare.
7. Mearudae bokwarewu ukare boe pa boeji. Matadurewu ukare boe pa inoduji.
8. Mearutoru bokwarewuge ewodumode boebutu botu reore; roarodurewuge enoroe kurimode, mare eeda kedomode jii je!
9. Akirema, akagaru kurimode jii je.
10.  Ca! Onare aiwuge eeda kedomode, roarodurewuge emode taodo boe joki.
11. Are idurudo nono tapira imedu duru reore, are boekaguru pemegarewu redo iiogi.
12. Itaiwomode inojaro tabo onare iiwugei, imearudumode eegoi toragudu tabo duji.
13. Ro jetorogudurewu boture nono noido boture, ricodumode nono Líbano kejewu noakodu i ricodu reore.
14. Bure tugudumode Pao uwai keje, botumode Pao uwororo keje.
15. Tudu boture tubegadodu inodu tabo ikuru kuricigore, aru, aka boe kaawadure.
16. Tuwo boe eerududo Pao ro jetorogoduji, ino tori ro jetorokarewu bokwaji.

1. Boe eimejeranure Pao ce, ure turugu kuricigodo pudabo, ure turo raka, tuberi, tugu pudui.
Are moto mugu rakado, amagadu moduka.
2. Amugure kejeboe mugu rakare boe paru piji, aragojere jii boe jameduji.
3. Pobo boe ere tumago aogado, Pao Aroe Eimejera, pobo boe ere tumago aogado, pobo boe ere tuiaruru aogado.
4. Pao Aroe Eimejera ro rakare baru oto keje, ro raka kodure pobodoge eiaruru boe kori, pobo maerewu pobuto boe kori.
5. Awadaru riki remawure, boe pemegarewu mugure awai tada boe jameduji jii je, Pao Aroe Eimejera.

1. Ure togwamoridowu Pao Aroe Eimejera, ae padudo,  Pao ure togwamoridowu!
2. Ure tugogado moto jiwu, aragojedo. Ocarore puduiwuge ero mori maku etai!
3. Jii inoba boemode dukejeba, Pao Aroe Eimejera, jii inoba boemode dukejeba ro pegarewuge emode tumorido?
4. Ere tuwadaru pegarewu awadudo, ewadaru ocarore pudui turo pegarewu boeji.
5. Ere awobe epeagirido, ere boe redugodudo akoroeji.
6. Ere ukoge bokwarewu areme ewido, moto tuginoiwu kejewuge jamedu. Ere marenarue ewido jamedu.
7. Emearudaere oino: "Aroe Eimejera jorudu moduka, Jacó o Aroe Eimejera umodukare boe pa".
8. Tado boe pa, mearudae bokwarewuge, matadudoge, inoba boemodedukejeba tamode boe pa?
9. Ure boe ewiaja towujewu mearudu modukana? Ure boe eeku towujewu jorudu modukana?
10. Ure boe epadui pumekejedu eeruduwadowu umodukare boe eedorodo? Ure boe eeruduwadowu joruduwa modukare?
11. Pao Aroe Eimejera joruduware ime emearudaeji, duwure ure nono boe enogwamudure.
12. Are joruduwadowu imedu, are kodu jetorodo boe eroiagudu awara jiwu imedu, jiwo pemeganure.
13. Are udo tamudo boe pegare jiwu meriji jii boe ei motoiado ropegarewu ai du kae.
14. Pao umodukare tuwobe ewarigu tubiji, umodukare toroe pijido,
15. Jii boe ji tugogadodu udo pudumi du kae, jii uwabo pemegarewuge ekodumode rekodaji du kae.
16. Ioguduba umode turagojedo inai ro pegarewuge etogi? Ioguduba umode turagojedo iiaogwai ro pegarewuge etogi?
17. Pao aregodu modukare tuwo tugera braredo ii ma, kuri je imedumode birewuge eiao tada.
18. Inagomode: "Iwure tudumode iaboeto ma, amearudu kuriae umode tugerabraredo ii".
19. Imorora amagadu kuricigomode ii dukeje, amode itaroe butugugo, amode iegaredo.
20. Are ameduiado ure tugoga pegado, ure boe ero pegado boe eroiagudu ie tabowu imedu apo?
21. Emago pegare ro jetororewugei, ere ropegakarewuge eiwo pegado.
22. Mare bai mugu rakarewure Pao ce inai. Ino tori rakarewunure Pao ce, kejere ire ikijoru bu.
23. Umode ero pega butudo ewugeje. Umode epeagirido ero pega kodi. Pao Aroe Eimejera umode eeda kedodo.

1. Mato, paegarewo Pao ji; pawo ure paginorudowu tori akaru kurido;
2. Pawo paremo paegare tabo jekai. Paegarewo ji pagogwa akoi ai du tabo.
3. Paga karega, Paore Aroe Eimejera kurirewunure ema; aroe eimejerage Eimejeranure ema.
4. Moto oiako rairewuge emugure iera keje, ore torekari rico rairewugece.
5. Ore pobo maerewuce, emare ure towuje kodi, ore ure towuje tugera tabowu motoce.
6. Taremo, tae jodo, tawarigu mototo, tabujodo ure padowujewu Aroe Eimejera jekai.
7. U! Pago Aroe Eimejeranure ema, ure okwagedowu uwobenure pagi, jeture jiwu barege kugurenure pagi.
Tamearuduia makoji awuji!
8. Tagaba tawabo rakado Meriba keje du reore, Massa keje du reore, nowu meri keje, boe makodu tada.
9. Taomage ei turo kowo ii du tabo; ere turokagado ii, tuiorudui ire towujeboeji, kodi karega.
10. Jorui 40 cedu tabo nowu boe ere ikorigo. Icare imagore: "Okware boetowuge reo! Eeruduwakare itawaraji". Dukodi icare ire iwadaru maku boekorii ii du tabo : "Emodukare turemo ire itamudowo keje".

1. Tarago Pao ji ia boe eragodae maiwu ji; moto jamedu boe, tarago Pao ji.
2. Tarago ji, tamago pemegado ie pemegarewuji!
Tawadodudo ui boe einorudo duji meri jameduji tu tu je.
3. Tawadodudo  uruguji moto padui pumekejedu etai. Ro pemegarewuji boe eiamedu boe ewiagai.
4. Paga karega, Boe kurirewunure Pao ce; ure turugadu boewo akaru kurido. Emare ro raka kodure aroe eimejerage eiamedu boe ero raka kori.
5. Boe eno aroe eimejerage boe karega ure emage.
Pao Aroe Eimejera ure baru towuje.
6. Boe urugu, boe kurirewu kodure otodai. Uwai urugu motu kunure!
7. Boe epadui pumekejedu jamedu boe, Pao urugu kurido, ro raka kurido.
8. Pao ie urugu kurido.
Taremo tagomea tabo uwororoto.
9. Tabujodo Pao ji urugu pemegarewu jekai. Moto jamedu boe, tagamagadudo jekai.
10. Tamagodo boe epadui pumekejedu etoiado: "Boe eimejeranure Aroe Eimejerace. Moto mugu rakare, amagadu moduka. Emare jeture boe epadui pumekeje duji boe jetorogodu tabo.
11. Baru, moto, eegarewo! Pobo maerewu, tadaboe jamedu boe, jamedu boe eiaruruwo!
12. Boku, mugu kejeboe jamedu boe, eegarewo. Itura tadawu iguru boe enoiogwariwo tuiegare tabo!
13. Eegarewo Pao jekai, aregodumode tuwo tugogado motoji.
Umode tugogado motoji boe jetorogodurewu tabo, umode tugogado boe ji boe jetororewu tabo.

1. Boe eimejeranure Aroe Eimejerace, moto jekarewo, pobo aiare tabowo motodoge eegarewo!
2. Moto, butugudoge, ere tubodo apo; jeture boe ji boe jetororewu tabo.
3. Joru kodure otodai, ure onare puduiwuge ekowu, ekowu.
4. O jeragudu ure moto urugudo, motore tamagadudo tuiorudui jitu keje.
5. Torekaridoge ekugudugodure piobori kugudugodu reore ore moto cewu jekai.
6. Barure ro jetorogodu kagado, boe eiamedu boe eerudure uruguji.
7. Ure tubujodo aroe eimejerage paga pagawuge eiwuge, ocarore pudui to aroe eimejerage paga pagawuge eiwuge, epogurugodure. Aroe eimejerage eiamedu boe ere tubujodo Pao jekai.
8. Sião mearudure icare jekarere; Judá ore areme eegare kuricigore ai akogado boe ji duji, Pao Aroe Eimejera.
9. U! Aroe Eimejeranure aki, akire amugure baru oto keje, moto jamedu boe keje, akire  amugure aroe eimejerage eiamedu boe ewugeje.
10. Pao Aroe Eimejera mearudu kurire kiarire boe pegarewu jiwuji, jeture mearutorure puduiwugei, ure einorudo ro pegarewuge ekera piji.
11. Jorugure taogado ro jetororewuge etai, boe eegareae taogado uwabo pemegarewuge etai.
12. Ro jetororewuge, taegaredo Pao ji, akaru pemegarewu kurido.

1. Tarago Pao ji ia boe eragodu maiwu ji, ure boe kurirewu towuje.
Iera, kana pemegarewu, ero rakarewure udo tumorido.
2. Paore boe eerududo tui boe einorudo duji, ure turo jetororewu awadudo boe epadui pumekejewuge etai.
3. Biabuture tumearudu kuriji, turoi tuwadaru rekodaji Israeldoge ewai jituji.
Moto okwa pa jamedu boe eerudure Paoi boe einorudo duji.
4. Moto jamedu boe, tamago pemegado Pao ji! Tagoiogowarido taegare tabo!
5. Tagera akodo Pao ji meriri iku akorewu tabo.
6. Taegaredo Pao Aroe Eimejera ji tagogwa akoi meriri iworewuto, ika meririto du tabo.
7. Pobo maerewu, jeture tadaboe, moto, mugure kejeboe eiamedu boe, eiaruruwo!
8. Pobo jamedu boe, tagera to pui! Torekaridoge, tagoiogwarido taegare tabo, Pao jekai.
9. Aregodumode tuwo tugogado motoji. Umode tugogado ji boe jetororewu tabo, umode tugogado boe ji boe rikirewu tabo!

1. Boe eimejeranure Pao ce. Boe etamagadugodure! Ure tumugudo tupadoge etaogeje: moto ure tamagadudo!
2. Pao Aroe Eimejera kurire Sião keje;
mugure boe eiamedu boe etaogeje.
3. Boe emago pemegawo akie kuricigorewuji, pemeganure!
4. Boe eimejera durure, tumearudu kurii boe jetororewu jitu rema. Akire are boe jetororewu mugudo, are boe jetororewu udo pudumi Jacó keje.
5. Taegaredo Pao Aroe Eimejera ji, tabujodo bure paru, pemegaguragare kodi!
6. Burejoiage Moisés, Aarão, Samuel jamedu, enogwamagudure Aroe Eimejera ji, icare makore emago jipagi.
7. Makore ei boetugu piji, ere makore jiboe, ui boe eroiagudu, padu pemegado.
8. Pao Aroe Eimejera, amagore emago jipagi, Pao okudurewunure aki etai, mare are ero pegarewu morido etai jamedu.
9. Taegaredo Pao Aroe Eimejera ji, tabujodo ji o torekari otodai, Pao Aroe Eimejera pemegare kodi.

Moto jamedu boe, taegaredo Pao ji.
2. Tarodo ia taro ai, taegare tabo. Tadudo ae tagoiogwari jekarerewu tabo.
3. Taeruduwado Aroe Eimejeraie ure Pao ce, ure padowuje, oroenure pagi, uwobenure pagi, okwagere to moto kejewu barege kugurewugere pagi.
4. Taremo uwai poroto, tai tukutaido jitu tabo, taragodui uwororo kao du tabo; taegaredo ji, tamago pemegado ieji.
5. U! Mare Pao Aroe Eimejera pemegare kodi, mearudu kurire jii je; bataru rikirewu uture boe ekodui puregodaji puregodajiwuge ebo.

1. Iragodumode amearudu kuri ji, aro jetororewu ji. Itaidure inogwa akowo ai, ino Aroe Eimejera!
2. Imerumode awara pemegarewuji: inoba boemodedukejeba atumode itae? I
Imerumode iwabo pemegarewu tabo iwobe etada.
3. Imodukare iaboe iaboe pegarewu bu ioku otodai.
Ikodu kagirire aidukare aiwuge ero pegaji: emodukare tumugudo iwugeje.
4. Imugu jaemode uwabo pegarewuji, itaidukare ioruduwawo ro pegarewu ieji.
5. Imode mako pegare podu tabo tumedage eiwuge edo tuia mi. Itaidumodukare aiwore tojaro tabo boe ji, uwabo ocarore puduiwugei.
6. Ire ie kirimi awu moto kejewu ro jetororewugei, emugu pureduwo ii. Merure ro jetororewuge etawara jiwu,  awure imeduiamode ema.
7. Ure boe eekiri pagadowu mugu modukare iwai tada, batararodurewu rakojemodukare ioku otodai.
8. Baa aregodu reore imode awu moto kejewu ro pegarewuge edo tuia mi. Imode ro arodurewuge eiamedu boe ewarigu Pao o bakurirewu piji.

2. Pao Aroe Eimejera, awiapagado inogwamagudu ji, inoiogwari aregoduwo akae!
3. Akaba ae biado ipiji ikiarigodure jiwu meri keje; awia puredo ii; inogwamagudui awogai jiwu meri keje amagodo imago jipagi guru guru tabo!
4. Ino meri akedure boe jeredudu reore, ira kowujedure nono joradu kowujedure.
5. Iwabo kidunure boe butu magai boe ewure joi tuwugeje du reore. Iwiagodure iwo ike amirewu kowuje.
6. Inoiogwari kuricigo tabo, itoragudu kuricigo tabo, ira boe jeture iwiriji.
7. Ire nono ia turubare reoreboere boe makodu tada; ire nono tagogore boe eiamedu boe akedu reia keje.
8. Inudukare itoragudu koia, ia kiogo koadurewu reore bai aogeje.
9. Onare iiwuge emago pegare ii meri jameduji, mako jerebarire itabowuge icare emago pegare ii jamedu.
10. Ire jorugudo ko amirewu mugato, ikudure ceboe okore iokuguru tabo.
11. Boekorii ai du koia, are itaogado, are iwarigu moto kae pugeje.
12. Ino meri akedugodunure boetugu reore; ikidugodunure boebutu kidugodu reore.
13. Mare akirema, aragojemode jii je. Boe ewodui puregodaji puregodajidu ewiabutumode awugeje.
14. Amode aragojedo akoiagudui Sião apo du tabo; boe aregodunure akoiaguduwo apo kodi. U! boe aregodure pudae.
15. Paga karega atugarege emearudu kurire jeta kedoji, enogudure urugudu tabo.
16. Boe epadui pumekejedu epagudumode Pao Aroe Eimejera iece, moto kejewu brae eimejerage eiamedu boe epagudumode aruguce.
17. Pao aregodumode turugu tabo, tumode Sião bure tugu dukeje.
18. Umode tuie kirimi boe ewiapagakare jiwuge enogwamaguduji, umodukare enogwamagudui bogaiboe pijido.
19. Awu inodu atugododumode bapera keje aregodumodewuge etai, ia boe maiwuge emode togwa jerebarido Pao apo.
20. Paore tuie jodo tuwai mugu jaegiriwu piji, baru piji aiwore moto kae.
21. Tumearuduwo mugure baicorewu tadawuge etoraguduji tuwo bimodewu ro pegarewuge einorudo.
22. Boe enoiogwariwo Pao ieji Sião keje! Boe enogwa jerebariwo apo Jerusalém keje!
23. Boe epadui pumekejedu ei tudo pui turowo nono Pao aidu reore dukeje.
24. Iduru akedure awaraji, ino meri oto pa biegarewu bu.
25. Akaba irego ino meri oia keje, ako joru rakojere boe ewodui puregodaji puregodaji du reore.
26. Are moto mugu rakado marigudu, are baru towuje akera tabo.
27. Etagedumode mare akirema aragojemode jii je; eiamedu boe etagedugodure nono boe ekudae reore; amode etududo boe ekudae reore, emode tudo tuginoi.
28. Akirema aragojere, ako joru akedu moduka.
29. Atugarege etore eragojemode boe puredu kai pudui du tabo. Eregodajiwuge eedumode aegai.

1. Itaroe, amago pemegado Pao ji, iiamedu boe, amago pemegado ie pemegarewuji.
2. Itaroe, amago pemegado Pao Aroe Eimejera ji, awiagodu kaba ro pemegai ai du piji.
3. Emare ure aro pegarewu jamedu okwado, ure akogodae jamedu boe barigu apiji.
4. Emare ure atawuje motoia piji, ure tumearudu kuri opodo akabo, togudu tabo.
5. Emare ure ako joru korobadudo boe pemegarewu tabo; iparedui aki du tonaji ure atugo ato, aroeceba maiwu reore.
6. Pao Aroe Eimejera ro jetorogodure tui tugogado boe erorerure jiwuge eparu tabo.
7. Ure Moisés jorududo tudawaraji, ure Israel ore eerududo turo kurirewuji.
8. Pao okudu oiagudure, butugure pudui tugorigodukeje; mearudu kurire boe ji.
9. Ukare tao tugu tugiarire jiboe ji, korigodu raikare jii je.
10. Rokare nono paro jetorokarewu pai. Ukare boe maku pagai paro pegarewu reore.
11. Baru mugu magai moto aogeje du reorere oinore mearudu kuriae rakaguragare pagudure puduiwugei.
12. Meri rutu mugu jaegirire meri butu jitu reorere, ure paro pegarewu jaedo pai.
13. Ia boe etuo okudu magai tore ebo du reorere, Pao okudure pagudure puduiwuge ebo.
14. Paga karega, joruduware padowujedure moto tabo duji, biabuture moto urugudu iure pagi.
15. Imedu o merire nono boebutu reore; oku boture nono boku kaowu okureboe botu reore.
16. Bakuru jetumode ji ma, okwamode pi tuku je, boe eeruduwakare muga bogai pugeje.
17. Mare Aroe Eimejera mearudu kuriae ure jii je, mugumode jii je pagudure puduiwuge etai, ro jetorogodurewu umode jii ore etore etai,
18. Rore nono ui tuwadaru makudu rekodajiwuge etai, biabuture turowo nono ui turoiagudu reorewuge etai.
19. Pao Aroe Eimejera ure tumuga mugudo baru tada, jeture moto jamedu boeji.
20. Pao utugare tupadoge, ure bataru ko ko puduiwuge, ure tudo turugadu tu tu tumearuduwo bataru jiwuge, tamago pemegado Pao ji.
21. Pao o tugobaigarege eiamedu boe, rore nono Pao aidu reorewuge, tamago pemegado Pao ji.
22. Paore towujeboe jamedu boe, tamago pemegado Pao ji jeture boe ji kejewu moto jamedu boe keje.
Itaroe, amago pemegado Pao ji.

1. Itaroe, amago pemegado Pao ji. Ino Aroe Eimejera, akuricigore! Are arugu, akuri, tugu ai.
2. Jorugu opore akabo ia aroia opoi boe ebodu reore. Are baru oto jado boe magai aroia jado du reore.
3. Are amuga mugudo pobodoge etaogeje; are ako imaridodo boetuguce, amerure bakuru ikodo aogeje.
4. Are ako rojaidodurewugedo bakurudogece, are atugaregedo joru uruce.
5. Are moto mugudo tumugumodewu keje, romodukare du du du tumuga piji jii je.
6. Are jewaduiewo opodo apo, ia aroia boarewu reore. Pobodoge ere tumugudo torekaridoge etaogeje.
7. Mare amagore dukeje eregodure, amago jaruru keje ere tuwarigu.
8. Turudui torekaridoge etao kae, tui turawuje boe boarewu joki du tabo, eture akaidure jiwu emugumodewo kae.
9. Are etaregodumode kaeboe okwa bu, emodukare tugo kori, tukawo tumaedo moto joki pugeje.
10. Are pobojaridoge edo tudawuje boe boarewu piji, ekodure torekaridoge etoiagi.
11. Ere boe kaowu barege ekududo, boe tadawu burudoge ere pobo boi puduidu bito.
12. Baru tadawu kiege barege ere tumugudo okwai, tagoi raruguru kao du tabo.
13. Are toridoge epegodo amugu rairewu piji, motore tamogodudo are towujeboe tudu boe tabo.
14. Are boebutu  botudo boe eguiee ekeje, are iguru botudo tududu tabo ime etai,
tuwo kowujeboe tawuje moto piji.
15. Parera kuru uwo imedu uwabo jekaredo, boekaguru uwo imedu je urugudo, amirewu uwo imedu duru pemegado pugeje.
16. Pao Aroe Eimejera o iguru boe emedure tudoda, ure tugu Líbano kejewu noakodu iguru.
17. Nonore kiege baregere tuwaradu to, itura oto keje bace ure tuwai mugudo.
18. Rico rairewu torekaridogere cabradoge etai. Aoporidoge etadare aigorewuge ere tamudo.
19. Are ari to uwo boe remagu. Meri joku joruduware tumode tuioku okwado duji.
20. Are boeco tawuje, icare boeco aregodure, boekorire  jiwu barege ekodure kao.
21. Adugodoge kugure egore tuiemaru tabo tumode bitoboe bogai, enogwamagudure Pao ji tuge bogai.
22. Barogwa kododu tabo ere tuwiado tuiari boe to.
23. Dukeje imedu ure tudawuje tumaragodae kae.
24. Oinore aro rakaguragare, Pao Aroe Eimejera, are jamedu to aeruduwa tabo. Moto okorobadure are to boe tabo.
25. Pobo maerewu reo: kana  raicigore, barege biegarewuge, barege kurirewuge emagaguragaredu emerure tada.
26. Nonore ika rerewuge emerure, nonore bakuru rakarewu, are towuje awoadae cedu, merure jamedu.
27. Eiamedu boe epagare awogai, awo tuge maku pudai boemode turugadu dukeje.
28. Are maku, ere ako; are akera jado, ere tamogodudo boe pemegarewu tabo.
29. Are ae biado, du tabore epagudugodure; are ake tawuje epiji, ewire tui tugirimi moto urugudui pudumi du kae.
30. Are akoroe arego icare bo eiamedu boe etowujedumode pugeje, du tabore amode moto jamedu boe maidodo.
31. Pao Aroe Eimejera urugu rakojewo jii je, Pao jekarewo ture to boeji.
32. Aiwore motoji, ure tamagadudo; ure tugera bu torekaridoge ewugeje, icare  eredudure.
33. Iragodumode Pao ji iragoje utonaji; inogwa jerebarimode Pao apo iragoje utonaji.
34. Jekarewo iragodure jiboe ji; imirema iegaremode Pao ji.
35. Ro pegarewuge eeda kedowo moto keje; roarodurewuge eragoje kawo pugeje.
Itaroe, amago pemegado Pao ji!

1. Taegaredo Pao ji, tagogwamagududo ieji, ro kurirewu awadudo boe epadui pumekejedu boe ewiegai.
2. Tarago ji, tagogwa akodo ji, tamagodo tu tu ro kurirewu boeji.
3. Tagojarodo tai ie pemegarewu tabo; jemarure Pao bogaiwuge ewabo jekarewo.
4. Taemarudo Pao bogai, duru bogai; taemarudo je bogai jii je;
5. Tawiabutudo ure towujewu boe kurirewu keje, ro kurirewu keje, ure tugogado boe ji togwa tabo dukeje.
6. Utugare Abraão ore, ure tugeragu pudaiwu José ore.
7. Emare Pao Aroe Eimejera rema, jeture moto jamedu boeji.
8. Biabuture tui tuwadaru maku dukeje jii je, bataru makudure boe ewodui puregodaji puregodajidu etai.
9. Ure tuwadaru maku Abraão aidu, ure turomodedu maku Isaac aidu.
10. Ure turomodedu to Jacó ai, Israeldoge etai tui tuwadaru maku etai du tabo,
11. Tagoi oino du tabo: "Imode  Canaã kejewu moto maku akai, akowo ema du bogai".
12. Boe emode enodo pa kimo du tabo, emagagirikare; ia moto tuginoiwu kejewuge ereorere moto keje .
13. Ekodure jice woje boe eeda boe kae.
14. Ukare boe erorerudo ei, eigoia icare ure brae eimejerage etogorido.
15. "Tagera amagadu kaba ire kruca bu kejewugei, taro pega kaba itugarege profetadogei".
16. Ure boe eke boi eidu butudo moto keje, ure eke amirewu  bokwado.
17. Ire ia imedu utudo etododai, cewu ere makuwu, José.
18. Ere bure gogudo meriri tabo, ere meriri bu itoru keje,
19. Jii makore jiboe aregodui pudae du kae, Pao bataru ure jiwo pemegado du kae.
20. Brae eimejerare edo bure goga kiwuje, jeture boe epadui pumekejedu jiwu ure inorudo.
21. Ure jetudo tuwai tadaboeji, ure aiwodo toroe jamedu boeji.
22. Uwo boe eimejerage eeruduwado taidu rekodaji, uwo codurewuge eeruduwado.
23. Dukeje icare Israel ure turemo Egito o mototo; Jacó mugure Cam o moto keje.
24. Ure tuwobe eidodudo du kuricigodo tui eduru kodudo rorerure puduiwuge ekori du tabo.
25. Ure ewabo rakado ekodu kagiriwo tuwobei, ero kioga kawo tudugaregei.
26. Ure tudugare Moisés utudo etai, ture tugeragu jiwu Aarão apo.
27. Ure edo tumagore jiwu boe kurirewu towuje, turo kurirewu Cam o moto keje.
28. Ure boeco utudo ewogai, icare boecodure; emagerema, emearutorukare bataruji.
29. Ure eke pobo udo nono boe ekure, tui meture tadawu kare eeda kedodo du tabo.
30. Braetaetaedoge ere tumaedo moto joki, jii brae eimejera uwaito jamedu.
31. Ure eno parera ikuguru rugadu korido, ure eno moto kejewu iguru rugadu kado.
32. Ure boporira butudo bubutu mugato, ure joru  cedo moto joki.
33. Ure eno parera ikuguru rugadu korido, ure eno moto kejewu iguru rugadu kado,
34. Ure bokokuadoge makaguragarewuge etarego
35. duwuge ere eno moto kejeboe rugadu oikó.
36. Ure boetojiwu etore eiamedu boe etogorido, ure boetojiwu etore ewido.
37. Ure tuwobe edo tudawuje meriri ekurewu, meriri kigadurewu, tabo; etada erokare dara dara je.
38. Egito jekaregodure ei tudawuje dukeje, pagudugodure ece kodi.
39. Ure ia boetugu udo tumaedo eiogi boe eerudukawo ei, ure ia joru ko etododai boecoji.
40. Enogwamagudure dukeje, ure riwodu reodoge etarego etai, ure etamogo baru tadawu amirewu tabo.
41. Ure tori bowuje, pobo aregodure piji, rere boe joki pobo reore.
42. Tuwiabutui tuwadaru pemegarewu keje tumagoi Abraão jitu keje.
43. Ure tuwobe edo tudawuje tuiegare tabo, ure ture tugeragu ji puduiwuge edo tudawuje toiogwari rakarewu tabo.
44. Ure boe epadui pumekejedu eno moto maku etai, ere tugeragu emaragodae boeji,
45. Erowo nono ture eroiagudu reore.

1. Paegarewo!
Taegaredo Pao ji, pemegare kodi, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
2. Ioguduba readodumode Pao ro kurirewu jamedu boeji? Ioguduba bataru jerebarii apodu umode turugadu?
3. Rore nono ui boe eroiagudu reorewu, ro jetorogodure jii jewu, jiwo pemegare.
4. Ino Aroe Eimejera, awiabutudo iwugeje, amearudu kurii awobe ei du koia.
Atudo itae awo ikinorudo!
5. Ioruduwo awobe eiwo aidugiraeji. Iegarewo awobe egoi tuiegare tabo duji, inojarowo akoroe koia.
6. Cero pegare ceomage ero reore; cere cewure taru akawara pemegarewu piji, cemearutorukare ai.
7. Ceomage ewiapagakare aro kurirewuji Egito keje,
ewiagodure amearudu kuricigorewu piji, ere Pao korigo Pobo Maerewu okwai.
8. Tugie koiare ure einorudo, tuwo edo boe pa turo rakarewuji.
9. Ure tumago rakado pobo maerewuji, icare kidure; ure erego jewaduiewo kajeje, boe makodu kajeje.
10. Ure einorudo onare puduiwuge ekera piji; onare puduiwuge ekera pijire ure einorudo.
11. Pobore tumaedo rorerure eiwuge eiogi, iaboe iaboe ekare cinorudo pudabo mito tu je.
12. Dukeje icare emearutorure bataruji, eragodu jerebarire apo.
13. Boe raikare dukeje ewiagodure rore pudaidu piji, epagakare Pao romodedu bogai.
14. Boe makodu tada ere tumagu tagemo pegarewu kae, ere turokowo Pao ji boe makodu tada.
15. Ure etaidure jiboe maku etai, ure etagemore bogaiboe maku etai.
16. Ekorire Moisesji, Pao utugare pemegarewu Aarãoji, ture baadowu  keje.
17. Motore tuiado, ure Datã kowuje,  ure  Abiram apowuge eiamedu boe ewogwado tudo.
18. Jorure turirigo kodure apowugei, ure ekowuje.
19. Horeb keje, ere ia tapira botugodu towuje, ere tubujodo meririji.
20. Ere to Aroe Eimejera maku ia tapira botugodu, ure boebutu kowujewu, jipagi.
21. Ewiagodure ure einorudowu Pao Aroe Eimejera piji. Ure boe kurirewu towuje Egito keje du piji,
22. Ure turo kurirewu to Cam o moto keje, ure boe epagudae towuje keoguru kejewu pobo maerewu keje.
23. Dukodire icare aidure tuwo eeda kedodo, mare rokare ino tudugare Moisés koia, duwure okwamagudure ji, uwo boekorii puduidu ko epiji.
24. Ekiarire ia boe pemegarewu kejewu motoji, emearutorukare Pao bataruji.
25. Emago pegare tuwai aroia tada,  ewiapagakare Pao akoji.
26. Ure tugera aogado ei, tuwo eeda kedodo boe makodu tada.
27. Tuwo eregodajiwuge eeda kedodo  moto padui pumekejedukeje, tuwo edo taodo boe kao.
28. Dukejere ere tumagu Baal, Fegor kejewu, ai, ere makudure birewuge etaiboe kowuje.
29. Ere Pao korigo turo boe tabo, dukeje icare ia boe ekogodae pegarewu jore ewugeje.
30. Dukeje icare Fineiare turagojedo, ure tugogado, du rekodaji kuri je ekogodae pegarewu akedure.
31. Dukodi icare boe emode togwa jerebarido apo boe jameduji jii je.
32. Ere Pao korigo Meriba po okwai; nowu inodu koia ia boe pegarewu buture Moisés keje.
33. Paga karega, ere utaroe korigo, dukodi icare makore tukai tumearudaedo du tabo.
34. Ekare Pao makore jiwu boe eeda kedodo.
35. Ere tugo tugo boe epadui pumekejedu ia moto tuginoiwuge ebo, dukodi icare eeruduware turowo nono ero pega reore.
36. Ere tubujodo eno aroe eimejerage paga pagawuge ei, duwuge ere boe pegado pudui.
37. Ere tore ewido, ere tore areme emagu bopedoge etai.
38. Ere ropegakarewuge eku redo, ere tore ime, areme, eku redo Canaã kejewu aroe eimejerage paga pagawuge etai, dukodi icare moto kujagure boe eku tabo.
39. Ere turorogodudo turo pegarewu tabo;
40. Pao korigodure tuwobei, dukodi icare aidukare toroeji pugeje.
41. Ure emagu boe epadui pumekejewuge ekera kai, dukodi icare onare eiwuge ere tumorido ei.
42. Onare eiwuge erorerure ei, ere tuie jodo ekera kuda.
43. Ure edo cinorudo tu je, mare ere tuboru barigu ji, ere tao tugu turo pegarewuto.
44. Mare tumearudui enoiogwari jitu keje, okudu oiagudure tuwobe ebo.
45. Biabuture tui tuwadaru maku etai dukeje, okudure ebo tumearudu kuri koia ei.
46. Ure rorerure eiwuge eiamedu boe enogududo ebo.
47. Pao Aroe Eimejera, ceginorudo, cedo pui moto padui pumekejedu piji, cewo cewadaru jerebarido akie pemegarewu tabo, cenojarowo  cei arugu tabo.
48. Boe emago pemegawo Israeldoge eno Aroe Eimejera ji boe jameduji jii je!
Boe eiamedu boe egomode: Oino godu!

Paegarewo!
1. Taegaredo Pao Aroe Eimejera ji, pemegare kodi. Mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
2. Ure einorudowu Israeldoge egowo!
Ure einorudo rorerure puduiwuge ekera piji.
3. Ure eto pui moto padui pumekejedu piji, meri rutu piji, meri butu piji, Bace Iwararewuge eiaogwai du piji, Pariburedoge eiaogwai du piji.
4. Ekodure jice woje, boe makodu tada, tuiorudukai ia bakurirewu boe eedure kejewu towu awaraji.
5. Eke boire ei, pobo boire ei, ewi puredugodunure.
6. Enoiogwarire Pao bogai tugiarigodu tabo, ure einorudo ekiarigodae piji.
7. Ure ekodudo awara jetorogodurewuji, ekoduwo boe eedure kejewu ia bakurirewu kae.
8. Boe eegarewo Pao ji, mearudu kuriae koia; ure boe kurirewu to Adão ore etai du koia.
9. Ure pobo boire eruwo jitu amogo, ure uke boire eruwo jitu amogodudo.
10. Emugure boetugu tada, boe tada; meriri iku, boe pegarewu, kogure ebo.
