11. Mare paga karega, ere tuboru barigu Pao makore jiboe ji, tui Pao baru tadawu mearudae redugodudo du tabo.
12. Ure boe kado ewaboce emedugodae tabo, ewudugodure mare boe etaiwokare ei.
13. Enoiogwarire Pao bogai tugiarigodukeje, ure einorudo tugiarigodae piji.
14. Ure etawuje boetugu piji, boeco piji, ure ekera ra paru gajejeboe rugadu kado.
15. Boe eegarewo Pao ji, mearudu kuri koia boe ji; ure boe kurirewu to Adão ore etai du koia.
16. Ure baiporodoge meriri ekurewu cedu rugadu pegado, ure kogure baiporo taboboe rugadu pegado.
17. Aora baibairewuge tugodui awara pegarewu jitu tabo, eiwo pegare, turo pegarewu koia.
18. Etaidukare tuwo boe ko, ere boe to boe ewi kaewu baiporoji.
19. Enoiogwarire Pao bogai tugiarigodukeje, ure einorudo tugiarigodae piji.
20. Ure tuwadaru utudo tuwo epemegago du bogai, ure einorudo boiako piji.
21. Boe eegarewo Pao ji, mearudu kuri koia boe ji, ure boe kurirewu to Adão ore etai du koia.
22. Boewo to mea maku ai tuiegare tabo, boe emago rakawo tuiegare tabo ure to boeji.
23. Ere turawuje ika rerewu tabo pobo maerewu joki, tui akirodo toroe tabo du tabo pobo maerewu aoji.
24. Eerudure Pao roji, eerudure ro kurirewuji pobo maerewu  oiadoda.
25. Makore, ure bakuru rakarewu butudo ure pobo maerewu o pobuto aogado.
26. Erudure baruto, ere turawuje jewaduiewoto, ere tamagadudo boe pegai pudui du koia.
27. Erore guri  ca guri ca je, aora baibairewuge ereore cewu eeruduwa rakarewu boe karega ure ema.
28.Icare enoiogwarire Pao bogai tugiarigodukeje, icare ure einorudo tugiarigodu piji.
29. Ure nowu bakuru rakarewu butugudo, icare nowu pobuto makodure.
30. Eegarere nowu butugugoduji, ure erego etaidure jiwu pobo okwato.
31. Taegaredo Pao ji, mearudu kuri koia boe ji, ure boe kurirewudo Adão ore etai du koia.
32. Boe enogwa jerebariwo apo, ture tudo puidu oiado, boewo akaru kurido  codurewuge ere tudo puidukeje.
33. Ure boe makodudo pobodogece, ure pobojarido moto kirewuce.
34. Ure moto okore sal tabowudo moto pemegarewuce, mugure kejewuge ero pegarewu koia.
35. Ure boe makodudo nono kurugadoge ereore, ure pobojarido  moto kirewuce.
36. Nono ure uke boire jiwuge emugudo, duwugere bakurirewu mugudo boe eedace.
37. Ere boe a tugu motodo, ere parera iguru tugu, duwure  enari boe towuje.
38. Ure eiwo pemegado, ere tugidodu tugidodudo tu tu je, ukare taguiee etagedudo.
39. Dukeje icare etagedugodure boe pegai pudui du koia.
40. Ure ro rakarewuge  eeruduwa bokwado, tui eko boe makodu kao, eeruduwakare kaiba tumode tudawuje piji.
41. Mare ure roiwa bokware pudaboboe eragojedo, ure emagaguragado nono barege kugure emaga reore.
42. Uwabo jetororewuge eerudumode inoduji, eegaremode. Boe jetorokareboe emode tuia mi.
43. Ioguduba joruduwarewunure ema? Oebatoduwo boe oino duji, tuwo boe pa Pao mearudu kuriaeji.

2. Iwabore turugadu, Aroe Eimejera; itaidure iragoduwo, inogwa akowo. Itaroe, aedadudo!
3. Meriri iku akorewu boe, taedadudo! Iedadumode barogwa kododu tabo.
4. Itaidure inogwa jerebariwo akabo boe etoiadoda, Aroe Eimejera!
5. Amearudu kuriae kodure baru oto kori, awadaru riki kodure boetugu ao kori.
6. Ino Aroe Eimejera, arego  baru ao kae, arugu jetuwo moto jamedu boeji.
7. Amearudu kurire jiwuge einorudoduwo. Akera braredo cei, amagodo cei!
8. Pao makore tuwai pemegarewu tada: "Iegaremode ii Siquém kado oiado duji, ii boe remagu boe boarewu Sucot jituji.
9. Inore Galaad rema, inore Manasés rema, itao towu meririnure Efraimce, ieture boe ji tabowu iwara meriri Judá rema.
10. Ire itaimo towu pobo aiarewu Moab rema. Edom keje imode iwurekia kejewu mugudo. Imode imorido Filistéia kejewugei.
11. Ioguduba umode irego ia bakurirewu rakarewuto? Ioguduba umode irego jii Edom kae?
12. Tu aki rugadu, Pao Aroe Eimejera, duwure are cebijido, akodukare ceno tugobaigarege ebo pugeje.
13. Akera braredo cei boe erorerui cei dukeje; paga karega, ime ei boe einorudodu, boe karega ure ema.
14. Pao Aroe Eimejera apo, pamode boe todu kuricigodo! Emare tuwure jodo rorerure paiwuge ewugeje.

1. Inogwa jerebarire apowu, ino Aroe Eimejera, akaba aia mi.
2. Paga karega, ia mako pegarewuge, ure boe eekiri pagadowuge ere tuia barido tumago pegawo ii. Emagore tugeru batararodu tabo ii.
3. Boe ewadaru pegare tugodu kagiri tabodu ure tubodo itabo, erugodure ii paga tu je.
4. Imearudu kurii ei du jipagi emago pegare ii.
5. Ere boe pegado ii iro pemegai puduidu jipagi, ekodu kagirire ii, imearudu kurii puduidu morice.
6. "Ia ro pegarewu mako pegado ji. Ia mako pegarewu mugudo kana pemegarewu jaogwai.
7. Boei tugogado ji dukeje jiwo pegawo, okwamagudae udo nono ro pegarewure!
8. O meri maka kawo, iaboe emuguwo mugato.
9. Ore emarenaruwo, oreduje ukoge bokwawo.
10. Ore emeru paga pagawo tuiemaru tabo tuge bogai, ewarigududoduwo tubega boe piji.
11. Iwogurewuge ekiwoguwo enoroe boeji. Ia moto tuginoiwu kejewuge ewo tugeragu enoroe boeji.
12. Iaboe iaboe ekawo togududo apo, boe enogudu kawo ore marenarue ebo.
13. Kodure rekodajiwuge eeda kedowo. Ie bokwawo botumodewuge ekie piji.
14. Pao Aroe Eimejera biabutuwo uomage ero pega keje, uce ro pegarewu bitu kawo.
15. Ro pegarewu paduwo tu Pao je keje, uwo boe ewiabutui kejedu okwawo moto piji".
16. Biabutukare turowo togudu tabo; ro pegare marenaruji, roiwa bokware pudabowuji, uwabo kiarigodurewuji, jii bi kae.
17. Mearudu kurire boe emago pegaji: butuwo keje. Aidukare boe emago pemegaji, uwo tugera ra piji.
18. Ure tumago pegarewu tugu pudui boe magai ia aroia boarewu opodo pudabodu reore, uwo turemo ra boeto, pobo, boekaguru magai turemo boe era to du reore.
19. Uwo nono ukudae metui jitu reore, uwo nono ia boe epeagajejewu kogu magai boe epeagajeje du reore.
20. Pao Aroe Eimejerawo mako pegare iiwuge ero pega morido.
21. Akirema, ino Aroe Eimejera, akaiwodo ii akie reore; ikinorudo, amearudu kuriae pemegare kodi.
22. Imirema, marenaru, roiwa bokwarewunure imi. Iwabo korire itada.
23. Ikodunure nono boetugu kodu reore; iwarigudu jaegirire bokokua reore.
24. Itodorogare ii dukodire  ipogodao kugudugodure, ikodu rakicarure boekaguru bokwa tabo.
25. Ire nono boe emago pegarewu reore etai, jorudure iiwuge ere taora amagadudo itabo.
26. Akera braredo ii, ino Aroe Eimejera, ikinorudo, amearudu kuri koia ii.
27. Emode boe pa awu inodu aregodui akera piji duji, akie, ino Aroe Eimejera, are towuje.
28. Emago pegare, akirema, amago pemegamode. Ere taogado: epoguruwo, atugare jekarewo.
29. Mako pegare iiwuge epoguru uwo tubodo ebo, ia aroia boarewu opoi boe ebodu reore.
30. Imode inogwa jerebarido Pao apo boe etoia keje inoiogwari rakaguraga tabo.
31. Paga karega, ure tumugudo roiwa bokware pudabowuge eiaogwai, tuwo einorudo ure tugogado eiwuge epiji.

1. Pao Aroe Eimejera akore oino ikimejera ji: "Amugudo ikana pemegarewu jaogwai jii imode onare aiwuge emugudo awure kuda du kae".
2. Pao ure aetumode boe ji tabowu iwara meriri aogado Sião piji, dukodire aetumode boe ji onare aiwuge etoiadoda.
3. Boe eimejerare aki awodu tonaji. Boere akagaru kurido ace kuri piji, akodui maidu paru piji.
4. Paore tuwadaru maku, kodumode tuwadaru rekodaji. "Pao burejoianure aki jii je, Melquisedec bataru rekodaji".
5. Pao mugure akana pemegarewu jaogwai, umode boe eimejerage epeagirido tugorigodukeje.
6. Ure tugogado boe epadui moto kejewugei, ure boe etaora peagirido moto jamedu boe keje.
7. Awaraji kudure pobo rerewuce, kodire ure taora aogado.

1. Paegarewo!
Iegarere Pao ji iwabo jamedu tabo ro jetororewuge ei tudo pui du etoiadoda.
2. Pao Aroe Eimejera ro pemegarewu kuricigo, ure turugadu boewo boe pa ji tumearudu kurii jitu tabo.
3. Ro jamedu boe motu kunure, ro jetororewu umode jii je.
4. Ure boe ewiabutudo turo kurirewu keje. Okudureboe oiagudureboenure Pao ce.
5. Ure pagudure puduiwuge eke maku etai, tuwiabutui tu tu tui tuwadaru maku dukeje.
6. Ure tuwobe eerududo turo rakaji, tui boe epadui pumekejedu enoroe  maku etai du tabo.
7. Maragodure jiboe boe rikirewu boe jetororewu rema. Ui boe eroiaguduboe boe emearutoraenure ema.
8. Mugumode boe jameduji jii je: boe emode towuje boe rikirewu, boe jokodu tabo.
9. Ure tuwobe einorudo, ure tuwadaru makudu mugu rakado jii je. Ie pemegare, ure turugadu boe ekawo redugodudo.
10. Boe eeruduwa paru boe epagudui Pao cedu rema; pagudure cewu jamedu boe imedu joruduwarewunure ema; boe emode togwa jerebarido apo jii je.

1. Paegarewo!
Pagudure Pao cewu, aidure ui boe eroiagudu jiwu imedu, jiwo aidugirire.
2. Rekodajiwuge emagaguragamode moto keje; ro jetororewuge eregodajiwuge eiwo pemegamode.
3. Enoroe kuricigomode ewai tada, ero jetororewu mugumode jii je.
4. Urugu jomode boeco kao ro jetororewuge etai: ro pemegarewunure ema, okudurewu, oiagudurewunure ema.
5. Okudure boe ebowu, ro pemegare boe jiwu, ro jetororewu imedu, jiwo pemegare.
6. Ro jetororewu butumodukare jii je; boe ewiabutumode keje jii je.
7. Pagudukare bakaru pegarewuce; tumearutorui Pao jitu tabo, morora amagadukare pudui.
8. Boe puredukare uwaboji, pagudukare iaboe iaboece. Ure tuwure tugu rorerure puduiwuge etogi.
9. Ure boe maku roiwa bokware pudabowuge etai, ro jetorogodu umode jii je; ro raka, urugu, kurimode.
10. Ro pegarewu jorudumode inodu jitu keje, korigodumode, umode to akodo grr grr pui, umode tagedudo boekori koia. Mare ro pegarewuge etagemore jiboe boe karega ure ema.

1. Paegarewo!
Tawadaru jerebarido Pao apo. Pao utugarege, tawadaru jerebarido Pao apo.
2. Boe emago pemegawo Pao ieji, oino, boe jameduji jii je.
3. Meri rutu piji jii meri butu kae, boe emago pemegawo Pao ieji.
4. Pao mugure boe epadui pumekejedu boe eiamedu boe etaogeje, urugu mugure baru oto keje.
5. Ioguduba ure nono Pao Aroe Eimejerare? Ure taogado tuwo tumugudo.
6. Ure tuie jodo taiwowo baruji, motoji.
7. Ure duru akedugodurewu udo turagojedo moto urugudu piji; ure roiwa bokware pudabowu tawuje boe gigudu piji.
8. Ure mugudo kurirewuge ebo, tuwobe eimejerage emegi.
9. Ure ore bokwarewudo mugudo tuwai tada tuiegarei tore ei taiado pudabo duji.

1. Paegarewo!
Israeldoge ei tudawuje Egito piji dukeje, Jacó ui tudawuje ia moto tuginoiwu piji dukeje,
2. Judare Pao uwaido pudumi, Israeldogere Pao uwobedo pudumi.
3. Pobo maerewu jorudure, icare rekodure. Jordão Po ure tugirimi tuibagi.
4. Torekaridoge ere taredo barege kugure ei taredo du reore; aoporudoge ere taredo barege kugure etore kugure ei taredo du reore.
5. Pobo maerewu, inoba ure kodiba aregodure? Aki Jordão, kodiba are akirimi aibagi?
6. Torekaridoge, kodiba tare tagaredo barege kugure ereore? Tagi aoporudoge, tare nono barege kugure etore kugure ereore?
7. Moto, akamagadudo Pao jekai, Jacó o Aroe Eimejera otodai.
8. Ure toridogedo kurugado pudumi, ure tori pega boedo pobojarido pudumi.

1. Boe enogwa jerebariwo akabo, Pao Aroe Eimejera, cedabo karega; paga karega, okudu oiagudurewunure aki, boe rikirewunure aki.
2. Kodiba boe epadui pumekejedu egomode oino: "Eno Aroe Eimejera pa?"
3. Ceno Aroe Eimejera mugure baru tada, ure taidure jiboe jamedu boe towuje.
4. Eno aroe eimejeragenure meriri kigadurewuce, meriri ekurewuce, boe ere to tugera taboboe.
5. Enogware, mare emagokare; eekure, mare eerudukare;
6. ewiajare, mare emearudukare boeji; ekenojare, mare emearudukare boe jerimagaji;
7. ekerare, mare  ekare tugera bu iaboe iaboe keje; ewurere, mare emerukare; ia boe emago podurewukare eruwo ja tada.
8. Ure etowujewuge ere nono ereore, cewu mearutorure eiwuge eiamedu boe.
9. Israeldoge ewai, amearutorudo Pao ji, emare tugera braredo ai, meriri aiarewu onare boe jiwu rema akai.
10. Aarão uwai, amearutorudo Pao ji, emare tugera braredo ai, meriri aiarewu onare boe jiwu rema akai.
14. Pagudure Pao cewuge, tamearutorudo Pao Aroe Eimejera ji; emare tugera braredo tai, meriri aiarewu onare boe jiwu rema tagai.
12. Pao biabuture pawugeje, umode tuwadaru pemegarewu bu pawugeje. Umode tuwadaru pemegarewu bu Israeldoge ewai keje, umode tuwadaru pemegarewu bu Aarão uwai keje.
13. Umode tuwadaru pemegarewu bu pagudure Pao cewuge ewugeje, biegarewuge, kurirewuge.
14. Pao Aroe Eimejerawo tagidodudo, uwo tagore eidodudo!
15. Pao Aroe Eimejera, ure baru, moto, towujewu, uwo tuwadaru pemegarewu bu tawugeje.
16. Pao ore baru rema, ore moto rema, ure maku Adão ore etai.
17. Birewuge emago jerebari modukare Pao apo, ure turawuje boe makodurewu towuge jamedu.
18. Jerewuge pagi pamago pemegamode Aroe Eimejera ji, oino, boe jameduji jii je.
Salmos  116 (114-115)
Paegarewo!
1. Imearudu kurire Pao Aroe Eimejera ji, mearudure inogwamagudui tuwogai duji kodi.
2. Ure tuie jodo tuwiaja tabo itae, inogwamagudure pudui jiwu meri keje.
3. Iwogwamodedu ure tubodo itabo to bukigu tabo, jewaduiewo o bukigu ure tubodo rakado itabo. Iwudure ikiarigodae keje.
4. Dukodi icare inogwamagudure Pao ieji:
"Ino Aroe Eimejera! Ikinorudo!"
5. Pao Aroe Eimejera pemegare, okudure; Pao Aroe Eimejera oiagudure.
6. Aroe Eimejerare tugera braredo ure tuwiegadowugei: ikugudugodure, ure ikinorudo.
7. Itaroe, akinorudo ai akamudodu kae, Pao okudure akabo kodi.
8. Ure ikinorudo iwi piji, ure ikinorudo iokuguru piji, ure ikinorudo iwudumode du piji.
9. Imerumode Pao jekai jerewuge eno moto keje.
10. (115,1). Imearutorure, inagore: "Itagedunure!" oino dukodi karega.
11 (2). Imorora amagadui ii dukeje inagore: "Ime eiamedu boe ewadararodure!"
12 (3). Kaboba imode maku Pao ai, ro pemegare iiboe jamedu jipagi?
13 (4). Imode ure boe einorudowu ruwobo aogado, inogwamagudui Pao ieji du tabo.
14 (5). Imode iromodedu to Pao ai, utugarege eiamedu boe eegai.
15 (6). Mearutorure Pao jiwuge ewi pemegamode jekai.
16 (7). Pao Aroe Eimejera, are ikera ra paru gajejeboe rugadu kado, atugarenure imi kodi, atugareredo onaregedu.
17 (8). Imode ino mea jekarerewu mak'akai, inogwamagudui akie jitu tabo.
18 (9). Imode iromodedu to Pao ai, utugarege eiamedu boe eegai,
19 (10). Pao Aroe Eimejera uwai kejewu  bororo keje, Jerusalém akoiadoda.

Paegarewo!
1. Boe epadui pumekejedu eiamedu boe, tagogwa jerebarido Pao apo, boe epadui pumekejedu boe eiamedu boe, taegaredo ji!
2. Paga karega, mearudu kurire rugadu, bataru rikirewu ure jii je.

Paegarewo!
1. Taegaredo Pao ji, pemegare kodi, okudu oiagudure jii je kodi.
2. Israel uwai akowo: Okudu oiagudure jii je!
3. Aarão uwai akowo: Okudu oiagudure jii je!
4. Pagudure Pao cewuge egowo: Okudu oiagudure jii je!
5. Imorora amagadui ii dukeje, inoiogwarire Pao bogai, biapagare ii, ure iwudugugo.
6. Pao rakojere itabo: ipagudu modukare. Inoba ia imedu romode ii?
7. Pao mugure itabo, ure tugera braredo ii: itumode onare iiwuge etogi!
8. Boei tugijoru bu Pao kejedu pemega kodure boe ji tugijoru bu imedukejedu kori.
9. Boe emearutorui Pao jidu pemega kodure boe emearutorui boe eimejerageidu kori.
10. Boe epadui pumekejedu ere bakuredo itabo, mare Pao ie tabo ire erugadu pegado.
11. Ere bakuredo ii, ere bakure mi ii, mare Pao ie tabo ire erugadu pegado.
12. Ere bakuredo itabo atuge magai bakuredo du reore, ere turirigo pudui joru magai turirigo botoguru jitu reore, mare Pao ie tabo ire erugadu pegado.
13. Ere tuiodo iwugeje tuwo iwududo, mare Paore tugera braredo ii.
14. Iduru, iragodu,nure Pao ce, ure ikinorudo.
15. Boe enoiogwarire tuiegare tabo, tui tumorido du tabo, ro jetororewuge ewai tada.
16. "Pao kana pemegarewu ure boe kurirewu towuje. Pao kana pemegarewu kuricigo. Pao kana pemegarewure boe kurirewu towuje.
17. Iwimoduka; iragojemode iragoduwo Pao roji.
18. Paore itogorido itogorido, mare ukare imagu iwi kai".
19. Ure boe jetororewu uwaiporo jado inai, imode iremo, iegarewo Pao ji.
20. Pao uwaiporo reo, ro jetororewuge emode turemo ji.
21. Iegarere ai, awiapagare ii kodi, are ikinorudo kodi.
22. Moto ri epage etaidukare jiwu tori ure bai paru kudawu torido pudumi.
23. Awu inodu aregodure Pao piji, ure ceeku kidudo pudui.
24. Paore towujewu meri reo. Pawo padugu pado, paegarewo ji.
25. Pao Aroe Eimejera, ceginorudo! Cedo cemorido, Pao Aroe Eimejera!
26. Boe emago pemegawo aregodure Pao ie tabowuji; Pao uwai piji cemago pemeganure ai.
27. Aroe Eimejeranure Pao ce: ure parugudo!
Tawirido kodoro boe tabo jii Pao ira pemegarewu okwa kae.
28. Ino Aroe Eimejeranure aki, iegarere ai. Ino Aroe Eimejera, inure akagaru kurido. Iegarere ai, awiapagare ii kodi, are ikinorudo kodi.
29. Taegaredo Pao ji, pemegare kodi, okudu oiagudure jii je kodi.

Álef (I)
1. Ro pegakare tudawara kejewu imedu, uture todobiji Pao ui boe eroiagudukejewu imedu, jiwo aidugirire.
2. Jemarure Pao bogai tuwabo jamedu tabowu imedu, rore nono ui boe eroiagudu reorewu imedu jiwo pemegare.
3. Ro pegakare tudawara keje, mare merure Pao utawaraji.
4. Are boe eroiagudu maku boe etai, boe ekodu pemegawo ji du bogai.
5. Iduruwo, irowo nono ai boe eroiagudu reore.
6. Dukodire ipoguru modukare iwo imearudae tugu ai boe eroiaguduji.
7. Iegaremode ai iwabo jetorogodu tabo, ioruduwai ai boe eroiagudu jetororewuji.
8. Itaidure irowo nono ai boe eroiagudu reore, akaba akera rawuje ipiji pi tuku je.
Bet (II)
9. Inoba ia iparedu romode tuwo tugodu pemegado?  Tuwiapaga tabo awadaruji.
10. Iemarure iwabo jamedu tabo awogai, akaba ido ikera rawuje ai boe eroiagudu piji.
11. Ire awadaru padu pemegado iwabo tada, iro pegakawo ai.
12. Boe emago pemegawo ai, Pao Aroe Eimejera, ioruduwado akaidure jiboe ji.
13. Inogwa tabo imode amagore jiboe jamedu boe oto pa bu.
14. Ikodui akawara jitu tabo iegaremode boe enoroe jamedu boe kori.
15. Imode imearudae tugu amagore jiboeto, imode ioku tugu akawara boeto.
16. Iegarere iroi nono akaidu reore duji, iroiwakare iwiagoduwo awadaru piji,
Guimel (III)
17. Aro pemegado atugareji, du tabore iemode, iromode awadaru rekodaji, Pao Aroe Eimejera.
18. Iokudo tuiado, du tabo iorudumode ai boe eroiagudu uruguji.
19. Ia awararenure imi moto aogeje tu je, akaba ai boe eroiagudu biado ipiji.
20. Itaroe akedugodunure togea tabo amagore jiboe bogai boe jameduji.
21. Are amago korido ocarore puduiwugei, ro pegarewugei; rokare nono ai boe eroiagudu reorewu jiwo pegamode.
22. Ikinorudo boe emago pegai ii du piji, boe ji iredugodudo du piji, ire amagore jiboe padu pemegado kodi.
23. Boe eimejerage emode tudo pui tumago pegawo ii,  mare atugare biapagare ai boe eroiaguduji.
24. Iegaraenure awadaruce,  okituware iiboere ai boe eroiagudu rema.
Dalet (IV)
25. Iruwo ra mugure moto urugudu kajeje; awadaru umode iragojedo.
26. Ireadodure iiboeji awiegai, amearudure imagoji. Ioruduwado ai boe eroiaguduji.
27. Ido boe pa ai boe eroiagudu utawaraji, imode iwia tugu aro kurirewuji.
28. Itaroe akedunure ikiarigodu koia; iragojedo, awadaru rekodaji.
29. Ido iaedo boe ewadararodae utawara piji, iegaredo ai boe eroiagudu tabo.
30. Ire ikeragu boe rikirewu utawaraji, imearudu kurire ai boe eroiaguduji.
31. Iwudure awadaru keje, ino Aroe Eimejera, akaba boedo ipogurudo.
32. Iregodumode ai boe eroiagudu utawaraji, are iwabo kurido kodi.
Hê (V)
33. Pao Aroe Eimejera, ioruduwado ai boe eroiagudu  utawaraji, itaidure ikodu pemegawo ji.
34. Ido boe pa ai boe eroiaguduji, ido towuje, iwiapagawo ji iwabo jamedu tabo.
35. Ikodudo ai boe eroiagudu utawaraji, iegarere ji kodi.
36. Iwabodo tuie jodo amagore jiboe keje, boe enoroe keje karega.
37. Akaba ioku jorududo boe pagawuji; iedo awadaru tabo.
38. Arodo nono ai aroiagu atugare jituji, ai aroiagu pagudure acewuge ei duji.
39. Boe emago pegai iidu jaedo ipiji, ipagudure ce kodi; ai boe eroiagudu pemegaguragare.
40. Itagemore ai boe eroiaguduji; iedo, aro jetororewu koia.
Waw (VI)
41. Ino Aroe Eimejera, ako boe pemegarewu arego jii itae, amagore jiwu ai boe einorudodu.
42. Imagowo oino mako pegare iiwuji: "Imearutorure Pao makore jiboe ji".
43. Akaba awadaru rikirewu tawuje iiabiji, ipagare ai boe eroiagudu bogai.
44. Iwiapagamode ai boe eroiaguduji boe jameduji jii je.
45. Akawara pemegare ii, iemarure ai boe eroiagudu bogai dukodi.
46. Imagomode amagore jiboe ji boe eimejerage eegai, ipoguru bokwa tabo.
47. Iegarae mugure ai boe eroiagudukeje, imearudu kurire ji.
48. Imode ikera aogado imearudu kurire jiwu ai boe eroiagudu bogai; imode imearudae tugu ai boe eroiaguduto.
Záin ((VII)
49. Awiabutudo amagore atugare jiboe keje, are ido ipagado bogai.
50. Awu inodure iwudugugodae rema boe pegai ii dukeje; amagore jiboe ure iedo.
51. Ocarore puduiwuge ere tuwadaru keadaedo imi taidu tabo; mare imodukare iiaedo ai boe eroiagudu piji.
52. Pao Aroe Eimejera, iwiabuture mariguduwu ai boe eroiagudukeje, dure ure iwudugugo.
53. Ikodu kagirire ro pegarewugei, ere tugera ra ai boe  eroiagudu piji.
54. Ai boe eroiagudu ure nono boe eragodu reore inai, awarare iwai keje.
55. Iwiabuture akie keje boecoji, ino Aroe Eimejera; irore nono ai boe eroiagudu reore.
56. Awu inodure ienare ji, iwiapagawo ai boe eroiaguduji.
Het (VIII)
57. Pao Aroe Eimejera, oinore inagore: ienare jiboe iwiapagwo ai boe eroiagudu jitu rema.
58. Iemarure iwabo jamedu tabo iwo ae butugugo. Akogududo itabo akago magadu reore.
59. Ire imearudae tugu itawaraji, ikodui ai boe eroiagudukeje.
60. Akere ii, boe raimodukare, irowo nono ai boe eroiagudu jamedu reore.
61. Pegarewuge emode ikogudo to bukigu tabo, mare iwiagodu modukare ai boe eroiagudu piji.
62. Ire iragojedo boeco oia keje inogwa jerebariwo ai boe eroiagudu tabo.
63. Inure imedagedo pagudure acewuge eiamedu boece, biapagare awadaru jiwugece.
64. Pao Aroe Eimejera, moto okorobadure amearudu kuriae tabo; ioruduwado ai boe eroiaguduji.
Tet (IX)
65. Pao Aroe Eimejera, aro pemegare atugareji, awadaru rekodaji.
66. Boe eeruduwa, boe emearudae pemegarewu, mak'inai, imearutorure ai boe eroiaguduji kodi.
67. Ai itogoridodu otodai, ire iwogwado boeto, oinore icare iromode nono amagore jiboe reore.
68. Apemegare, aro pemegare: ioruduwado ai boe eroiaguduji.
69. Ocarore puduiwuge emago pegare ii, imirema imode ai boe eroiagudu padu pemegado iwabo tada.
70. Ewabore bararodure kaawadu tabo, imirema itamogodure ai boe eroiagudu tabo.
71. Pemegare ii ai itogorido dukeje, ioruduwawo ai boe eroiaguduji.
72. Aiabijiwu boe eroiagudu boe pemegarewu rema inai: pemega kodure meriri ekurewu, meriri kigadurewu makaguraga kori.
Yod (X)
73. Akerare ipemegado, ure itowuje; ioruduwado, ido boe pa ai boe eroiaguduji.
74. Pagudure acewuge eeruduwo ii tuiegare tabo, ipagare awadaru bogai dukodi.
75. Pao Aroe Eimejera, ioruduware boe jetororewuie ure ai boe aroiaguduce. Amearudu kuri koia ii are itogorido.
76. Amearudu kurii iidu uwo iwudugugo, akago magai atugare jitu reore.
77. Mato itae akoiagudu tabo, nono iemode; ai boe eroiagudu iegaraenure ema kodi.
78. Ocarore puduiwuge epogurugoduwo, emago pegare ii kodi. Ire iwia tugu ai boe eroiaguduto.
79. Pagudure acewuge, joruduware  ai boe eroiagudu jiwuge, ewo tugirimi itae.
80. Iwabo jetorogoduwo ai boe eroiagudukeje, ipogurugodu kawo.
Kaf (XI)
81. Itagemore ai boe einorudodu bogai; ipagamode awadaru bogai.
82. Ioku akedugodure ai boe eroiagudu rekodaji; inoba boemode dukejeba  amode iwudugugo?
83. Ire nono ia porire boe eredudu tada, du tabo iwiagodukare ai boe eroiagudu piji.
84. Inoba atugare o merimode kimo? Inoba boemode dukejeba amode akogado rorerure iiwugei?
85. Ocarore puduiwuge ere motoiakodo inai, emerukare ai boe eroiagudu reore.
86. Ai boe eroiagudu jamedu boe  boe jokodunure ema; akera braredo ii boe ewadararodae onamode ii dukeje.
87. Boce kode ekare itagedudo moto keje; imirema imodukare ikera ra ai boe eroiagudu piji.
88. Pao Aroe Eimejera, iedo, amearudu kuri koia ii; iwiapagamode aiabijiwu awadaruji.
Lamed (XII)
89. Pao Aroe Eimejera, Awadaru okwamoduka, umode jii je; awadaru padu rakare baru tada.
90. Awadaru rikirewu rakojemode boe ewodui puregodaji puregodaji du reore; rakojemode nono are towujewu moto mugu raka reore.
91. Boe jamedu boere jii oino, awadaru rekodaji; boe jamedu boe emearutorure awadaruji.
92. Ai boe eroiagudu umodukare itaidudo ma, iwimode marigudu ikiarigodu koia, kodi karega.
93. Iwiagodu modukare ai boe eroiagudu piji, koiare are iragoje kimodo kodi.
96. Iorudure boe pemegarewu jamedu boe okwa paji, mare ai boe eroiagudu okwamodukare.
Mem (XIII)
97. Imearudu kuricigore ai boe eroiaguduji, ire imearudae tugu ji meri jameduji.
98. Ai boe eroiagdu ure ioruduwado onare iiwuge ekori, mare jeonare ii jii je dukodi.
99. Ioruduwa kodure ure ioruduwadowuge eiamedu boe eeruduwa kori, mare ire imearudae tugu awadaru jamedu boeji kodi.
100. Imearudae pemega kodure codurewuge emearudae pemega kori, mare iwiapagare ai boe eroiaguduji kodi.
101. Ire iwure taru awara pegarewu jamedu boe piji, iwiapagawo awadaruji.
102. Imodukare iwure taru ai boe eroiagudu piji, mare akire are ioruduwado kodi.
103. Awadaru betu kuricigore iiagi; betu kodure moiawe ewedu kori iiagi.
104. Ai boe eroiagudu tabo ioruduwamode ikoduwo awara pegarewu piji.
Num (XIV)
105. Jorugunure awadaruce iwure kai, urugure itawaraji.
106. Ire iwadaru maku, iromode nono imago reore: "Ikodumode ai boe eroiagudu jetororewu rekodaji".
107. Imedugodu remawunure ikiarigodae kori koia; Ino Aroe Eimejera, iragojedo awadaru rekodaji.
108. Ino Aroe Eimejera, akeragu iiabijiwu ino meaji; ioruduwado ai boe eroiaguduji.
109. Boe puredugodunure ii jii je, mare iwiagodu modukare ai boe eroiagudu piji.
110. Ro pegarewuge ere bukigu bu itogi, mare imodukare iwure taru ai boe eroiagudu piji.
111. Inoroenure awadaruce jii je, iwabo jekareaenure ema.
112. Iromode nono ai boe eroiagudu reore iwabo jamedu tabo, imearutoruwo awadaruji jii je.
Samec (XV)
113. Ikodu kagirire ure boe ekiri pagadowu ewaboji; imearudu kurire ai boe eroiaguduji.
114. Ikijoru panure aki, ino meriri aiarewu onare boe jiwunure aki; ipagamode awadaru bogai.
115. Ro pegarewuge, taiaedo ii, iwiapagamode Pao ui boe eroiaguduji.
116.  Akedu rakado ii, awadaru rekodaji, nono iemode; akaba ipogurudo ipagare awogai dukodi.
117. Aiodo iwugeje, du tabo ikinorudodumode; iwiapagamode ai boe eroiagudukeje jii je.
118. Are ure tuwure taro ai boe eroiagudu pijiwuge eiamedu boe eredugodudo; paga karega, emearudaere jiboe boe jokodu karega.
119. Amode moto kejewu roarodurewuge eiamedu boe edo nono boe gigudu reore; dukodire imearudu kurire amagore jiboe ji.
120. Ikodu amagadure tubagudu koia ace, ipagudure ai akogado boe ji dukodi.
Ain (XVI)
121. Iro pemegare, iro jetorore, akaba imagu rorerure iiwuge ekera kai.
122. Akedu rakado atugare o boe pemegarewuji, ocarore puduiwuge erorerukawo ii.
123. Ioku akedugodure tubaga tabo awo ikinorudodu bogai, ako boe jetororewu bogai.
124. Arodo atugareji amearudu kurii jitu du reore, ioruduwado ai boe eroiaguduji.
125. Atugarenure imi, ioruduwado iwo  boe pa awadaruji.
126. Pao Aroe Eimejera, boere turugadu arowo ia aro ei: ere ai boe eroiagudu redugodudo pudui kodi.
127. Dukodire imearudu kurire ai boe eroiaguduji, meriri ekurewu kori, meriri ekurewu jorui kurudo du kori.
128. Dukodire ikodu pemegare ai boe eroiaguduji, ikodu kagirire awara kodu jetorokarewuji.
Pê (XVII)
129. Awadaru pemegaguragare, dukodire iwiapaga pemegare ji.
130. Awadarui tawadudo dukeje, urugure ii, ure biegarewuge eeruduwado.
131. Ire iiabarido, ire ake tawujedu kuricigodo, itogeare ai boe eroiagudu bogai kodi.
132. Ae kirimi itae, akogududo itabo, aro magai mearudu kurire  ekie jiwuge ei du reore.
133. Iwure tugudu rakado ai boe eroiagudukeje, boe pegarewu ukawo tubodo itabo.
134. Ikinorudo imedu rorerui ii du piji, dukeje icare iromode nono ai boe eroiaguduji.
135. Ae urugudo atugare ae, ioruduwado ai boe eroiaguduji.
136. Iokuguru rere ie joki pobore reore, mare iwiapagakare ai boe eroiaguduji kodi.
Çade (XVIII)
137. Pao Aroe Eimejera, ro jetororewunure aki rugadu, ai boe eroiagudu jetorogodure jamedu.
138. Boe jetororewu, boe rikirewu remawui aki du tabo, are boe eroiagudu towuje.
139. Itagedunure boe kori koia, onare iiwuge ekodukare ai boe eroiagudu rekodaji kodi.
140. Aromodedu pemegaguragare, atugare mearudu kurire ji.
141. Iwiega torire, boe ewiapagakare ii, mare iwiagodukare ai boe eroiagudu piji.
142. Ako boe jetororewu ure jii je, ai boe eroiagudu boe jokodunure ema,
143. Ikiarigodure, boe erorerure ii, mare ai boe eroiagudu ure iegaredo.
144. Awadaru boe jokodunure ema jii je; akera braredo ii iwo boe pa ji, icare iemode.
Qof (XIX)
145. Inogwamagudure ai iwabo jamedu tabo, Pao Aroe Eimejera, amagodo iwadaru jipagi.
146. Inogwamagudunure awogai, ikinorudo, imode amagore jiboe padu pemegado.
147. Inogwamagudure ai baa aregodu otodai, ipaga tabo awadaru bogai.
148. Iedadure baa aregodu otodai, iwo iwia tugu awadaruto boecoji.
149. Pao Aroe Eimejera, amearududo iwadaruji amearudu kuri tabo, iwo itugu ito awadaru rekodaji.
150. Rorerure iiwuge ere tuburedo tumearudae pega tabo, ere tuiaedo ai boe eroiagudu piji.
151. Aragoje puredure ii, Ino Aroe Eimejera, ai boe eroiagudu jamedu boe boe jokodunure ema.
152. Iorudure awadaruji marigudu, are awadaru padu rakado jii je.
Resh (XX)
153. Akaiwodo ipega boeji, ikinorudo, iwiagodukare ai boe eroiagudu piji kodi.
154. Akera braredo ii, ikinorudo, ido itugu ito awadaru koia.
155. Boe einorudodu mugu jaegirire ro pegarewugei, eemarukare ai boe eroiagudu bogai dukodi.
156. Pao Aroe Eimejera, akogudu kuricigo; iedo pugeje, awadaru rekodaji.
157. Onare iiwuge, rorerure iiwuge, emagaguragare, mare ikare iwure taru amagore jiboe piji.
158. Iorudui ure tuiaedo apijiwugei dukeje, ikiarigodure, ewiapagakare amagore jiboe jitu kodi.
159. Aerududo imearudu kurii ai boe eroiaguduji, iedo kimo, amearudu kuri koia ii.
160. Boe jokodure awadaru paru rema; ai boe eroiagudu boe jetororewu rema jii je.
Shin (XXI)
161. Boe eimejerage etonare ii paga tu je, mare iwabo pagudure tu awadaruce.
162. Iegarere amagore jiboe ji, boe eegare magai tuiorudui boe enoroe kurirewu jitu reore.
163. Ikodu kagirire boe ewadararodaeji, itaidukare ji, imearudu kurire ai boe eroiaguduji.
164. Iwadaru jerebarire akabo ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto meri jameduji tu tu je, ai boe eroiagudu jetororewu koia.
165. Mearudu kurire  ai boe eroiagudu jiwuge ewugugodae kuricigo, ewure tudukare boeto.
166. Ino Aroe Eimejera, ipagare awo ikinorudo du bogai; irore nono ai boe eroiagudu reore.
167. Iwiapagare awadaruji, imearudu kurire ji rugadu.
168. Iwiapagare ai boe eroiaguduji, amagore jiboe ji; itawara boe kodure akododai.
Taw (XXII)
169. Inoiogwari aregodure jii akae; ido boe pa, awadaru rekodaji.
170. Inogwamagudu aregoduwo akae, ikinorudo, awadaru rekodaji.
171. Inogwa awadoduwo akagaruji, are ioruduwado ai boe eroiaguduji dukodi.
172. Ikeru uragoduwo amagore jiboe ji, paga karega, ai boe eroiagudu boe jetorogodurewunure ema.
173. Akerabraredo ii, itaidure ikoduwo ai boe eroiagudu rekodaji kodi.
174. Ino Aroe Eimejera, itogeare ai boe einorudo du bogai iegarae padure ai boe eroiagudukeje.
175. Iragojere kimo, iwadaru jerebariwo akabo, ai boe eroiagudu uwo tugera braredo ii.
176. Ire iiaedo nono ia barogo kuguri ui tuiaedo du reore, aemarudo atugare bogai. U! Iwiagodu modukare ai boe eroiagudu piji!

1. Ikiarigodukeje, inoiogwarire ino Aroe Eimejera bogai, makore inoiogwari jipagi.
2. Ino Aroe Eimejera, ikinorudo batararodurewuge enogwa piji, ure tuiaedo apijiwuge ekera piji.
3. Ure boe eekiri pagado tugeru tabowuge, kaboba morimode ema tagai?
4. Tugobaigarege etugo merirewu, urugure uruberirewu tabowu.
5. Inogudure awarare itabo Mosoc moto keje, imugui Edar uwai aroia tada.
6. Marigudure imugui kodu kagirire boe butugurewu jiwuge etada!
7. Itaidure boe butugurewuji, mare imago keje, etaidure boe erugoduji.

1. Ire ioku aogado torikaridoge etao kae. Ioguduba umode tugera braredo ii?
2. Pao Aroe Eimejera umode tugerabraredo ii. Emare baru, moto towuje.
3. Umodukare awure tududo boeto; jeture aiwu unudu moduka.
4. U! Jeture Israeldoge eiwu unudu modukare.
5. Pao Aroe Eimejera jeture ai, boetugunure ema akai; Pao rakojere akana jetororewu jaogwai.
6. Merijire meri joku umodukare akogorido, boecoji ari umodukare turopegado ai.
7. Pao jetumode ai boe pegarewu jamedu boe piji, jetumode akaroeji.
8. Pao jetumode ai, ai aebu dukeje, akaregodukeje, oino jii je.

1. Iegarere boe egoi oino ii dukeje: "Paduwo Pao uwai kae!"
2. Cewurere tuwuredo awaiporo keje, Jerusalém.
3. Mugu pemegare tubemega tabowu bakurirewu Jerusalém!
4. Torore Pao uwobe Israeldoge epadui pumekejedu erudure toro.
Dukodire Israeldoge eegarere Pao ieji.
5. Nonore boe jetororewu muga mugure. Davi uwai kejewu muga mugure.
6. Tagogwamagududo boe butugugoduwo Jerusalemji, tagagodo: "Awai uwo tamudo,
7. boe butugurewuwo motori aiare akabowu bukeje, boewo tamudo awai kurirewuge etada".
8. Iwiemage, imanamage, imedage etai, inogwamagudumode oino: "Boe butugurewu muguwo akabo!"
9. Pao Aroe Eimejera uwai bogai inagomode oino: "Aiwo pemegawo!"

1. Ire ioku aogado akai, akire amugure baru tadawu bogai.
2. U! Boe etugare joku kidu magai cimejera iera kae du reore,
ia boe etugareredo joku kidu magai cimejerago iera jitu reore, du reorere paeku kidure Pao Aroe Eimejera ji jii umode togududo pagabo du kae.
3. Akogududo, Pao, akogududo!  Cenogorobadure boe ji  ceredugodudo du tabo!
4. Cemedugodure ocarore puduiwuge emago pegai cei du koia!

1. Pao rakoje modukare pagabo ma - Israeldoge egowo -
2. Pao rakoje modukare pagabo boe erugodui pai dukeje ma,
3. Emode pagowuje pae inodu tabo, oinore ekodu kagirire pai!
4. Pobo umode tumaedo paiogi, pobore aregodumode pagidoru kae,
5. pobo otaro boe etaregodumode pagidoru kae, kodi karega!
6. Boe emago pemegawo Pao ji! Ukare pamagu etai ewo to jodo ca ca pawugeje.
7. Pare paginorudo pae tabo ia kiogo magai cinorudo aidure tuwo tugeragu puduiwu o bukigu enarewu piji. Bukigu enarewu ure tugado, pare paginorudo.
8. Pagijoru panure Pao iece, ure baru, moto, towujewu.

1. Mearutorure Pao jiwuge ere nono Sião aoporure: pegadodu moduka, mugu rakaguragare jii je.
2. Jerusalém bakurirewu... torekaridogere tubodo apo; Pao Aroe Eimejera ure tubodo tuwobe ebo, oino, boe jameduji jii je.
3. Ro pegarewuge emodukare ro jetororewuge enoroe mugu raido pudabo, ro jetororewuge ekawo tugera raido tuwo boe ewido.
4. Aro pemegado ro pemegarewugei, uwabo jetororewugei.
5. Kodure awara pegarewu jiwuge rema, Paowo ewarigu ro pegarewuge ebo.
Boe butugugoduwo Israeldogei!

1. Paore barigudure Sião  pijiwuge edo tugirimi tuibagi dukeje,
pare nono unuiaoreboe ereore.
2. Pagogwa okorobadure pagogwari tabo, pageru okorobadure paragodu tabo. Mearutorukare Pao jiwuge egore jamedu: "Aroe Eimejera ure boe kurirewu towuje etai!"
3. Paore turo kurirewu towuje pagai, dukodire paegarere.
4. Paore barigudure pabijiwuge edo tugirimi, pobore re magai boe makodu oiagi du reore.
5. Ure boe a tugu toragudu taboboe, emode boe enari boe kado turagodu tabo.
6. Etumode toragudu tabo tui boe a reko du tabo, emode tugirimi dukeje emode to opo arego turagodu tabo.

1. Pao umodukare pawai towuje dukeje, maragodure jiwuge emaragodu pagamode. Pao jetu modukare bakurirewuji ma, paga tu jere jeture jiwuge eetumode ji.
2. Paga tu jere taedadumode baa aregodu otodai, paga tu jere tamodukare tawu boecoji kuri je, tamaragodu rakawo tawo tage amirewu kowuje.
3. Pao umode boe maku mearudu kurire jiwu ai, unudu tonaji.
U! Pao o meanure boe etorece, Po ui boe emaragodu moridodu boe etonaregedu rema.
4. Tugobaigare iedu magai tudugo opo jitu reorere, oinore imedu maiwure tore etore ebo.
5. Imedu ore makarewu jiwo pemegamode; paga karega, poguru modukare turagojei tuwaiporo keje onare puduiwuge etogi.

1. Pagudure Pao cewuge, merure utawara jiwuge, eiwo aidugirimode!
2. Akogwagemode akera tabowu amaragodaeji, amorora amagadu modukare, aiwo pemegamode:
3. Parera ikuguru enari makaguragare du reorere akoreduje umode awai tada; akore emode nono oliveira enogu botu reore ako irá okwaji.
4. Oinore pagudure Pao cewu imedu jiwo aidugirimode.
5. Pao Aroe Eimejera mako pemegawo ai Sião piji, aerudumode Jerusalém utui todobiji duji jii je, aragoje utonaji.
6. Aerudumode akore etorei jamedu.
Boe butuguwo Israeldogei!

1. Inoba erorerure ii ikodui mai du piji!
- Israeldoge egowo! -
2. Inoba erorerure ii ikodui mai du piji! Mare eroiwakare ii!
3. Maragodurewuge emagai moto bowuje du reorere ere iporu bowuje, ere oia raicigodo;
4. Mare Pao pemegaguragare, ure ro pegarewuge erugodu erugodure tabowu bukigu kado.
5. Kodu kagirire Sião jiwuge edo tugirimi tuboguru tabo.
6. Edo nono boebutu botui bai aogejedu reore: kidu marigure boe ji boe kado du otodai.
7. Ukare maragodure puduiwuge ekera korobadudo, ukare boe ji tugana upodo pudabodu korobadudo.
8. Kodure koriwuge ego kawo: "Paore taiwo aidugirido reo".
 Cemode  cewadaru pemegarewu bu tawugeje Pao ie tabo!

1. Boiako rairewu pijire inoiogwarire awogai, Pao Aroe Eimejera!
2. Pao Aroe Eimejera, amearududo inoiogwari ji! Awiapaga pemegado inogwamagudui awogai duji!
3. Awiapagamode boe ero pegaji ma, ioguduba rakojemode kimo?
4. Mare akabore boe ewudugugodae jeture, boe epaguduwo ace.
5. Ipagamode, ino Aroe Eimejera, itaroe upagamode, imearutorui awadaru jitu tabo.
6. Itaroe upagare awogai, aiworewuge epagai baa aregodu bogai du kori.
7. Israeldoge epagare Pao bogai, aiworewuge epagai baa aregodu bogai du kori. Paga karega, Boe emearudu kuriae, boe pemegarewu, boe ei cinorudodu jeture Pao apo.
8. Emare umode Israeldoge einorudo epega boe piji.

1. Ino Aroe Eimejera, iwabo ukare turego,  ioku ukare taogado, imerukare kurireboe rekodaji, ia boe eroiwa kodure iroiwa kori du rekodaji.
2. Boro! Iwiapagakare itogeare jiboe ji, ia negedurogu ui togwa ra tuje mokuro piji du reore. Negedrogu ui togwa ra tuje mokuro piji du reorere, itogeare jiboere.
3. Israeldoge tabagado Pao Aroe Eimejera bogai, oino jii je!

1. Pao Aroe Eimejera, awiabutudo Davi keje, metugodae jamedu boe keje.
2. Ui tuwadaru maku ai dukeje, ui tuwadaru maku Aroe Eimejera ai dukeje.
3. "Imodukare iremo iwaito irudu modukare ire itamudo kejewu ipa kae,
4. Imodukare nore kori butudo iokuto, imodukare iokubiri udo tamudo,
5. Jii iorudui ia Pao Aroe Eimejera mugumode kejeboeji, Jacó o Aroe Eimejera mugaji, du kae".
6. Cemearudure akaruji Efrata keje, ceerudure ji Naar moto keje.
7. Pawo paremo mugurewuto, pawo pabujodo bure paru.
8. Pao Aroe Eimejera, arududo amugumodewu kae, aki, ako irá rakarewu tabo.
9. Awurejoiage eegarewo, awobe eiamedu boe eegarewo.
10. Atugare Davi koia, akaba ae barigu are rojaidowu piji.
11. Paore tuwadaru maku Davi ai, umodukare tuwia rawuje piji: “Ia botumode apijiwure imode mugudo amuga keje.
12. Akore eromode iwadaru rekodaji ma, eromode nono ii turoiagudu reore ma, etore emode tumugudo amuga keje jii je jamedu".
Paga karega, Paore tugeragu Siãoji muguwo keje du bogai.
14. "Kejere imode itamudo jii je, kejere imugumode, itogeare ji kodi.
15. Imode oroe jamedu boe ko tao kae, imode to marenarue etamogo amirewu tabo.
16. Imode to iwurejoiage epemegado; mugure kejewuge eegare kuricigomode.
17. Imode ia Davi rekodajiwu ro rakarewu botudo, imode ia jorugu pemegado ire rojaiwu bogai.
18. Imode onare jiwuge  epoguru udo tubodo ebo, ia boe etaogajejewu urugumode bukeje”.

1. Mato, taeruduwo inoba boe ji tubodo puapodu, tui nono boe etuwie, boe etuwiemage, etumanamage, etuduiemage ereoredu, pemegare, moture.
2. Ure nono boekaguru rorewu ui turedo Aarão aora keje, okwabu joki, ukudae okwa joki du reore.
3. Ure nono boedoguru ui turawuje Hermon joki, Sião aoporu joki.
Paga karega, Pao umode tuwadaru pemegarewu, boe eragoje rai, bu keje jii je.

1. Oinore icare tamago pemegado Pao ji, Pao Aroe Eimejera utugarege eiamedu boe!
Tagire tamaragodure Pao uwai tada boecoji, Pago Aroe Eimejera uwororo keje.
2. Tagera aogado Pao uwai kae, tamago pemegado Pao Aroe Eimejera ji.
3. Pao Aroe Eimejera mako pemegawo tai Sião piji. Emare ure baru, moto, towuje.

1. Paegarewo!
Tawadaru jerebarido Pao ieji,
Tawadaru jerebarido ji, Pao utugarege!
2. Tagire tamaragodure Pao uwai keje, Pao uwai uwororo keje.
3. Tawadaru jerebarido Pao ji: Pao pemegaguragare kodi.
Tagogwa akodo ieji, du pemegare.
4. Paga karega, Paore tugeragu Jacoji pudai, ure toroedo Israeldogece.
5. U! Ioruduware: Pao kuricigore. Pao Aroe Eimejera kodure aroe eimejerage eiamedu boe ekori.
6. Paore taidure jiboe jamedu boe to, baru tada, moto keje, pobo maerewu tada, jewaduiewo jamedu boe tada.
7. Ure boetugu rutudo baru paru piji, ure boe jeragududo bubutuwo. Ure bakuru tawuje tuia piji.
8. Ure Egito kejewu boe etore boetojiwuge etogorido, ime, barege jamedu.
9. Ure turo kurirewu towuje Egito keje, Faraó jekai, utugarege eiamedu jekai.
10. Ure boe makaguragarewuge etogorido, ure boe eimejerage ro rakarewuge eeda kedodo.
11. Seon, amorrewudoge eimejera, Og, Basan kejewuge eimejera, Canaã kejewu boe eimejerage eiamedu boe.
12. Ure eno moto maku tuwobe Israeldoge etai.
13. Pao Aroe Eimejera, akienure jii je. Boe ewiabutui awugejedu kodure boe ewodui puregodaji, puregodajiwuge etai.
14. Paore tugogado tuwobei, okudure tudugarege ebo.
15. Moto padui pumekejedu eno aroe eimejeragenure meriri kigadurewuce, meriri ekurewuce, boere to tugera taboboe.
16. Eiare mare emagokare, eekure mare eerudukare boeji.
17. Ewiajare mare emearudukare boeji, enogwamudu bokware tuia piji.
18. Ure etowujewuge ere nono ereore, mearutorure eiwuge eiamdu boe.
19. Israeldoge ewai, amago pemegado Pao ji! Aarão uwai, amago pemegado Pao ji!
20. Levi uwai amago pemegado Pao ji! Pagudure Pao cewuge, tamago pemegado ji!
21. Boe emago pemegawo Pao ji Sião keje, emare mugure Jerusalém keje!

Paegarewo!
1. Taegarewo Pao Aroe Eimejera ji, pemegare kodi, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
2. Taegaredo Pao Aroe Eimejerage Eimejera ji, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
3. Taegaredo boe eimejerage Eimejera ji, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
4. Tu emare boe kurirewu towuje, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
5. Ure baru towuje tuioruduwa tabo, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
6. Ure moto mugu rakado pobodoge etaogeje, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
7. Ure boerugu kurirewuge etowuje, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
8. Ure meri joku towuje uruguwo meriji, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
9. Ure ari, kuiejedoge, etowuje eruguwo boecoji, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
10. Ure Egito korido tore boetojiwuge ebo, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
11. Ure Israeldoge edo tudawuje piji, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
12. Tugera ro rakarewu tabo, tui tugana aogado du tabo, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
13. Ure pobo maerewu kado puiato, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
14. Du oiagi ure Israeldoge edo pagado, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
15. Mare ure Faraó barigu to tudugarege ebo, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
16. Ure tuwobe emerudo boe makodu kajeje, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
17. Ure brae eimejerage akaru kurirewuge etogorido, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
18. Ure ro rakarewu brae eimejerage ewido, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
19. Seon, amorrewudoge eimejera, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
20. Og, Basan kejewuge eimejera, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
21. Ure eno moto maku enoroece, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
22. Utugare Israeldoge enoroece, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
23. Biabuture pawugeje, boe pegai pai dukeje, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
24. Ure paginorudo rorerure paiwuge epiji, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
25. Ure jereboe eiamedu eke maku etai, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.
26. Taegaredo Pao baru tadawuji, mearudu kurire jii je kodi.

1. Babilônia kejewu pobodoge enogwa ji cere cemugudo cedoragudu tabo,  cegiarigodu tabo Sião bogai.
2. Nonore cere ceno meriri iku akorewu boe bararedo iguru itura boeji.
3. Toro rorerure ceiwuge egore cei ceragoduiagu. Oebatodure ceiwuge etaidure  ceegarewo cegiarigodukeje, tagoi oino du tabo: "Tarago ia taragodure Sião kejeboeji cewiagai!"
4. Kodiba paragodumode paragodure Pao jiboe ji, ia moto tuginoiwu keje?
5. Iwiagodumode, Jerusalém, apiji ma, ikera pemegarewu kiduwo.
6. Ikeru tuduwo ikeru bureokeato, imearudae butumodukare awugeje dukeje, iegareae kuricigomodukare Jerusalemce dukeje.
7. Pao Aroe Eimejera, Edom ore ewiabutudo inoba boere Jerusalém jituji, egoi oino dukeje: "Jeta kedodo, jeta kedodo jii bai paru kae!"
8. Ro pegarewu Babel onaregedu aredu, jiwo pemegamode umode aro pegai ceidu moridowu.
9. Umode akore kugure epeagirido toritowu imedu jiwo pemegamode.

1. Ino Aroe Eimejera, iegaremode ai iwabo jamedu boe tabo, amearudure iiabijiwu iwadaruji kodi. Iragodumode ai tupadoge eegai.
2. Imode ipujodo awai pemegarewuji.
Iegaremode akieji, amearudu kuriae koia, awadaru riki koia.
3. Inoiogwari keje, amearudure ii, are iduru ko tao kae itada.
4. Pao Aroe Eimejera, moto kejewu brae eimejerage eiamedu boe eegarewo ai, paga karega, emearudure ai awadaru maku akogwa tabo duji.
5. Eragoduwo Pao utawaraji tagoi oino du tabo: "Pao urugu kuricigo!"
6. Pao kuri remawunure! Jorudure biegarewuji, ure boe pa ocarore puduiwugei jaegiri.
7. Imerumode ikiarigodu tabo ma, amode iragoje kimodo. Amode akana aogado onare iiwu kodu kagirii ii duji, amode ikinorudo akana jetororewu tabo.
8. Pao Aroe Eimejera umode boe jamedu boe to inai. Pao Aroe Eimejera, amearudu kurire jii je. Akaba akera maragodae pijido.

1. Pao Aroe Eimejera, aeku remodure ito, aeruduware ii.
2. Aeruduware ii imugudo duji, aeruduware ii iragojedo duji,  jaegiri piji aeku remodure imearudaeto.
3. Akoebatodure ii  imeruji, akoebatodure ii iwuduji, aeruduware itawara jamedu boeji.
4. Iwadaru aregodukare ikeru oto kae raga, mare aeruduware jamedu boeji marigudu.
5. Are apodo itabo ikujebiji, itogea keje, are akera bu iwugeje.
6. Boe eeruduwa motu rakaguragarewunure awu inoduce; padu jae remawunure inai, iroiwakare iwo boe pa ji.
7. Kaiba imode iwiado akaroe piji? Kaiba ikodu jaegirimode ae piji?
8. Irudumode baruto ma, aragojere toro; imode iwu jewaduiewo tada ma, nono iorudumode ai.
9. Baa aregodu umode cigodo mak'inai ikoduwo jii pobo maerewu okwa kae imuguwo nono ma,
10. Akerare rugadu ure irego toro, akana pemegarewu tabore akedure ii.
11. Imagomode: "Boecowo turorido iiogi, boecowo nono ipeagajejewure inoiei", oino,
12. Mare boekarega ure boecoce akai, boeco urugure meri reore.
13. U! Are itoriwudu towuje, are iwu pugajeje imuga kuri tada.
14. Inogwa jerebarimode akabo aro kurirewu jamedu boeji, ioku kidure aro kurirewu awaduji.
Aeruduware ii itada.
15. Ira boe biadodukare akai, itowujedui boe biarewu keje, ipadui pugajeje moto ko rairewu tada dukeje.
16. Aeku jorudure ikenogugo duji, aeruduware ino meri jamedu boeji, jamedu boe padure ako bapera keje.
17. Imirema, amearudaere jiboe bia remawunure inai, boe emodukare oto pa bu, ino Aroe Eimejera!.
18. Imode oto pa bu dukeje, enodo padure kugaru jamedu boe kori, itaregodumode oto pa kae ma, iragoje kimore akabo.
19. A! Pao Aroe Eimejera, amoduia ro pegarewu bito! ...
Ure boe ewidowu ime, taiaedo ii!
20. Ewadaru keadure ai, tui akaidae redugodudo du tabo.
21. Ikodu kagiri modukare kodu kagirire
aiwugei, ino Aroe Eimejera? Ikiari modukare onare aiwugei?
22. Ikodu kagirii eidu akedu modukare. Onare iiwugenure emage inai..
23. Aeku remo ito, aeruduwado iwaboji. Arokagado ii, aeruduwado imorora amagadure ii boeji.
24. Mato, aeruduwo imeru kamodu kana ia awara pegarewu jituji; irego awara kodui boe eerewo kae duji.

2. Ioga Aroe Eimejera, ikinorudo imedu pegarewu piji, aetudo ii imedu rugodu kigodurewu piji.
3. Tuwabo tada emearudaere tuwo turo pegado tu rugadu, meri jameduji ere boe erugo tu tu je.
4. Ere ceru merido awague ereore, jorubo pegarewu okorirewu mugure eiadoda ewo reore.
5. Ino Aroe Eimejera, aetudo ii ro pegarewu iera piji, akera braredo ii boekorire jiwu imedu piji. Emearudure tuwo iwure tududo boeto,
6. Ere buke, bukigu, bu iwure epace; ocarore puduiwuge ere iwudumode kejeboe biado, ere iwure jetumode jiboe bu ikodumode jiwu awaraji.
7. Inagomode oino Pao ji: Ino Aroe Eimejeranure aki, awiapagado inogwamagudaeji!
8. Ikimejera Aroe Eimejera, umode ikinorudowu boe ero rakanure aki, amode boe bu itaora keje, irugodumode kejewu meri keje.
9. Pao Aroe Eimejera, aiokaba ro pegarewuge etogeare jiboe keje, akaba akera braredo ei emearudae keje!
10. Ure bakuredo itabowuge ekawo taora aogado, eiabijiwu ewadaru pegarewu uwo tubodo ebo.
11. Joradu ururewu butudo ewugeje bubutu reore, ewuduwo boiakoto ma, ekawo turagojedo.
12. Mako pegarewu ukawo tuwure tugu moto keje, boe pegarewu jeonawo rugodu kigodurewuji jii bimode du kae.
13. Ioruduware Pao umode tugogado marenaruji turo jetorogodurewu tabo, jetumode roiwa bokware pudabowugei.
14. Pemegarewuge eegaremode akieji; ro jetororewuge eragojemode aegai.

1. Ino Aroe Eimejera, imagomode awogai, akera braredo ii ake tabo! Amearududo imagoji, imagoi awogai dukeje!
2. Inogwamagudure bogaiboe rutuwo awogai bokwadoboe uredudu rutu reore. Ii ikera aogado awogaidu uwo nono meri rekodu tabowu ino mea reore.
3. Ino Aroe Eimejera, ia jeture inogwa jiwu jetudo inogwaji; ia jeture boeco jiwu jetudo inogwa uwaiporo keje.
4. Iwabo kado tuiejodo boe pegarewu keje, ro pega kawo ro pegarewuge ebo.
Iegare modukare ebo enogwagere jiboe utonaji.
5. Ro jetororewu uwo boeto ii, pemegarewu okituwawo ii. Ro pegarewu o boe kaguru ukawo itaora jerimagado, paga karega, umode irodo nono ero pega reore kodi.
6. Ewarigodure tori joki, ere tuiegaredo inagoi awu inodu  keje:
7.  "Tori ure boe amudowu ui tugado moto keje du reorere, para boe epadure boe joki jewaduiewo okwai".
8. Ino Aroe Eimejera, ire ioku aogado akae, awugejere ire ikijoru bu, akaba ipijido akai akera braredo ii du tabo.
9. Aeto ii ere towuje tuwo boe pegado ii boe piji, ro pegarewuge ei tubagado awara okwai iwogai du piji.
10. Ro pegarewuge ewuduwo ture towuje tuwo boe pegado ii boeto, iregodui, ii ikinorudo du tonaji.

2. Inogwamagudure Pao bogai inogwa raka tabo ji; inoiogwarire Pao bogai inogwamagudu tabo ji.
3. Ire iokuguru redo bure paru, ire ikiarigodu bu jekai.
4. Itaroe puredugodunure tuwogwawo; mare akire aeruduware itawaraji.
Ikodui itawaraji du tonaji, ere ia icebae bu keje inai.
5. Akaiwodo ikana pemegarewu jaogwai: iaboe iaboekare boe pa ii;
iorudukare kaiba imode iwiado: iaboe iaboe aiwokare ii!
6. Inoiogwarire Pao awogai, inagore: "Ikijoru panure aki, ieonare jiboenure aki jerewuge eno moto keje".
7. Awiapagado inoiogwari ji, ikugudugodure kodi.
Ikinorudo onare iiwuge epiji, eduru kodure iduru kori.
8. Ido itawuje baicorewu piji, iegarewo akieji.
Pemegarewuge emode taiado inoiei, aro pemegare ii du koia.

1. Ino Aroe n Eimejera, awiapagado inogwamagudui aiduji, akaba imago pagado awogai, aro jetororewu koia.
2. Akaba akogado atugareji, paga karega, awogaire ia jereboe ero jetororewu bokwa.
3. Onare iiwuge etaidure turugoduwo ii tuwo iragoja kedodo, ere ido imugudo boeco tada, bire jii jeboe ereore.
4. Itaroe okwa puredugodunure, iwabo jore tuku imororato.
5. Iwiabuture jawu meri keje, ire iwia tugu aro boeto, imearudaei are towuje akera tabo boeji.
6. Imode ikana jado akai: ire nono moto ki aru akemore awogai du reore.
7. Amagodo ake tabo imago jipagi, itaroe okwagodunure. Akaba ae biado ipiji: imode nono ure turawuje motoia towuge ereore.
8. Imearududo amearudu kurii ii baaregodu tabo duji, ikijoru padure awugeje; ioruduwado kakoduwu awara jiba ikodumode, imode irego akai.
9. Ikinorudo onare iiwuge epiji, ino Aroe Eimejera, boe puredumodukare ii akabo.
10. Ioruduwo irowo nono akaidu reore, ino Aroe Eimejeranure aki kodi. Ako Aroe Pemegarewu uwo irego ia moto boarewuji.
11. Pao Aroe Eimejera, are iedo akie koia; aroe jetorogodukodi are itawuje imorora amagadu piji.
12. Amearudu kuri koia ii, are onare iiwuge eeda kedodo, are onare iiwuge eiamedu boe eeda kedodo, atugarenure imi kodi.

1. Boe emago pemegawo ino Tori Aroe Eimejera ji, ure ikerado turugadu irugoduwo, ure ikerako boe udo turugadu irugodu bogai.
2. Imearudu kurire jiwu, ino bai moto ri rakarewu, ino bai raicigorewu ro rakarewu, ure ikinoru ikinorudowu, meriri aiarewu onare iiwu, ure boe epadui pumekejedu emagu ikera kaiwu.
3. Pao Aroe Eimejera, kaboba ure imeduce aegai? Kaboba imedu onaregedu rema awiapagawo ji?
4. Imedure nono boe enogwamudu reore, o meri ure nono boetugu akedu magai taci je du reore.
5. Pao Aroe Eimejera, ako barudo turawuje akabo, akera bu torekaridoge etaogeje, jeredudu umode tudawuje epiji.
6. Baigabe ewududo onare iiwuge ewugeje, edo taodo boe joki, atugo barigu ei, eregoduwo du bogai!
7. Akera raido baru piji, ikinorudo ia moto tuginoiwu  kejewuge ekera piji.
8. Emagore tu tuwadararodaeji, ere tugana aogado tuwo boe eekiri pagado.
9. Ino Aroe Eimejera, iragodumode ai ia iragodu maiwu ji; ikera akomode meriri iku akorewu ure nono ikera pudogidu reorewu ji akai.
10. Akire are boe eimejeragedo tumorido, are atugare Davido cinorudo.
11. Ikinorudo ure boe ewidowu tariga rairewu piji, moto padui pumekejewu boe ekera piji. Emagore tu tuwadararodaeji, ere tugana aogado tuwo boe eekiri pagado.
12. Cedore ewo nono boe botugodu reore, erijodure tuwodui maidu tonaji; cedore areme ewo nono bai paru jakajaka reore, ere nono ia bai kurirewure.
13. Cege ja boe enogorobaduwo boe eke opoi puapodu jamedu tabo, cenagu barege eidoduwo, emagaguragawo boe joki.
14. Cenagu tapiradoge enoreduwo, cewororo oia kawo, boe eregodu kawo. Boe enoiogwari kawo cewororo tada.
15. Umode oino jiwu boe, eiwo pemegamode. O Aroe Eimejerare Pao cewu, jiwo pemegare.

Alef:   1. Inure akagaru kurido, boe eimejera ino Aroe Eimejera, imago pemegamode akieji boe jameduji jii je.
Bet:   2. Imago pemegamode ai meri jameduji, imode akie kurido boe jameduji jii je.
Guimel:  3. Pao Aroe Eimejera kurire, boe enogwa jerebari kuricigomode apo; boe emodukare kuricigo oto pa bu.
Dalet:  4. Boe emode aro boe awadudo turegodajiwuge etai tagoi aro kurirewu jitu tabo.
Hê:   5. Akagaru urugu kuricigore, iragodumode aro kurirewu bakaruji.
Waw:    6. Boe ereadodumode aro kurirewuji, imirema iragodumode akuricigoji.
Záin:   7. Boe emode amearudu kuri awadudo, emode aro jetororewu akaru kurido.
Het:    8. Paonure okudu oiagudureboe rema, butugure pudui boekoriji, uwabo okorobadure tumearudu kuriae tabo.
Tet:    9. Pao Aroe Eimejera pemegaguragare boe eiamedu boe ji, okudure ture toboe jamedu boe tabo.
Yod:   10. Pao Aroe Eimejera amaragodae eiamedu boe enogwa jerebariwo akabo, mearutorure aiwuge emago pemegawo ai.
Kaf:   11. Ereadoduwo aetui boe eidu uruguji, emagowo aro kurirewu boeji.
Lamed: 12. Ereadoduwo Adão ore ewiagai aro boeji, aetui boe jidu urugu kurirewuji.
Mem:   13.  Aetui boe jidu akedumodukare, aetumode boe ji boe ewodui puregodaji puregodaji du reore.
(Nun)  Boe rikirewure Pao rema tuwadaru jamedu tabo; boe emearudu kuriaenure ema ture towujeboe jamedu boe tabo.
Samec: 14. Paore tugera bararedo buturewuge eiamedu boe ji, ure jejorewuge eiamedu boe eedorodo.
Áin:   15. Boe eiamedu boe epagare tuioku kidu tabo awogai; boe ji turugadu dukeje, are eke maku tu tu etai.
Pê:    16. Are akera jado, are jereboe eiamedu boe etamogo taidu tabo.
Çade:  17. Pao Aroe Eimejera jetorore tudawara jamedu boe keje, ro jetorore ture toboe jamedu boeji.
Qof:   18. Rakoje puredure okwamagudure puduiwuge eiamedu boe ji, okwamagudu jetorore puduiwuge eiamedu boe ji.
Resh:  19. Ure pagudure puduiwuge etagemore bogaiboe towuje, mearudure enoiogwariji, ure einorudo.
Shin:  20. Pao jeture mearudure puduiwuge eiamedu boe ji, mare umode ro pegarewuge eeda kedodo.
Taw:   21. Inogwa jerebariwo Pao Aroe Eimejera apo; boe eiamedu boe emago pemegawo jii je ie pemegarewuji.

1. Itaroe, akogwa jerebarido Pao ji!
2. Iragoje tonaji, imago pemegamode Pao ji; inogwa akomode Pao ji jii je.
3. Tagaba tagidoru bu boe kurirewuge ewugeje, ime etore ewugeje: eroiwamodukare tuwo boe einorudo.
4. Ewimode, emode tugirimi moto kae, icare emearudaere tuwo toboe eeda kedomode.
5. Ure tugijoru bu Jacó o Aroe Eimejera kejewu, ure tubagare bogaiboe bu Pao kejewu, jiwo aidugirimode.
6. Aroe Eimejera ure baru, moto, pobo maerewu, jeture kejeboe jamedu boe towuje.
Iedure boe rikirewuji jii je;
7.  ure tugera braredo boe erorerure jiwugei, ure uke boire jiwuge enogwagedo, ure mugure baicorewu tadawuge einorudo;
8. Paore joku bokwarewuge eeku jado, ure jejorewuge eedorodo,
9. Paore tugera braredo ia moto tuginoiwu kejewugei, ure tugera raido marenaruei, ukoge bokwarewugei.
Pao mearudu kurire ro jetororewugei, mare ure ro pegarewuge etawara kodu pegado.
10. Sião, ako Aroe Eimejera jetumode boe ji boe kodui puregodaji puregodaji du reore jii je.

Paegarewo!
1. Tamago pemegado Pao ji, pemegare, ure turugadu boe eragoduwo Pao ji kodi - Boe enogwa jerebarii Pao apodu beture.
2. Paore tugera pemegado Jerusalemji pugeje. Ure, ure taodo boe jokiwu Israeldoge, eto pui.
3. Ure boe ewabo peagirirewuge epemegago, iogore ecebaeji.
4. Ure kuiejedoge enodo pa bu, makore ewogai ekie tabo tu tu je.
5. Pao Aroe Eimejera kuricigore, ro rakare, boe etaregodu modukare joruduwa oto pa kae.
6. Pao jeture marenaruei, ure pegareboe ewu moto okeaji.
7. Tagogwa jerebarido Pao ji meriri iku akorewu tabo.
8. Ure boetugudo moto joki, unure bubutudo turugadu butuwo moto kae. Ure boebutu botudo, ure pemegare boe eiboe botudo boe aoporudoge etaogeje.
9. Ure barege eke maku etai, ure poburewuge etore egoi tuge boi koiadu eke maku etai.
10. Pao biapagakare kawaru ro rakaji, biapagakare ime ekodu rakaji.
11. Pao biapagare pagudure puduiwugei, upagare tumearudu kuri bogaiwugei.
12 (1). Jerusalém, Pao akaru kurido! Sião, akogwa jerebarido Pao Aroe Eimejera ji!
3 (2). Ure awaiporo epa rakado, mako pemegare akorei akuri tada;
14 (3). Ure boe butugugodurewu bu ako moto okwa pa keje, ure akogwamogo trigo kudu tabo.
15 (4).  Ure tuwadaru maku moto kae, bataru re rakaguragare.
14 (5). Ure boedoguru kigadurewu butudo barege kugure ewu reore, ure boedoguru rirewu aodo boe joki jorugudu reore.
17 (6). Ure to pobo rirewu barigu, ure nono toriguru reoredu. Ioguduba rakoje raimode o biaku tada?
18 (7). Ure nowu pobo rirewu udo nono pobore tuwadaru tabo; umode bakuru arego, pobodoge eremode.
19 (8). Ure tuwadaru kagado Jacó biagai, ure to boe eroiagudu maku Israeldoge etai.
20 (9). Rokare oinono padure pumekejewu boe ei, ia emage eerudukare ui boe eroiaguduji.

1. Paegarewo!
Tawadaru jerebarido apo baru tada, tawadaru jerebarido apo baru oto keje.
2. Tupadoge eiamedu boe, tawadaru jerebarido apo; utugare eiamedu boe, tawadaru jerebarido apo.
3. Meri, Ari, Pao akaru kurido; urugurewu kuiejedoge eiamedu boe, akaru kurido.
4. Baru padu  jaerewu, akaru kurido; pobo mugui  baru aogejewu, akaru kurido!
5. Taiamedu boe, Pao ie kurido, ure taiamedu boe towuje tuwadaru tabo.
6.  Ure taragojedo taragojerewu keje jii je, ure taroiagudu akedu bokwarewu maku tagai.
7. Moto kejeboe jamedu boe,  Pao akaru kurido. Pabo maerewu tadawu barege kurirewuge, jewaduiewo jamedu boe,
8. Baigabe, boporira, bokwaru, boetugu  corewu, kodure Pao bataru rekodajiwu bakuru rakarewu,
9. Torekaridoge, boe aoporu boe, tudurewu iguru boe, noakodu iguru boe.
10. Boe tadawu barege, boe eegu barege eiamedu boe, merure tuguri tabo moto jokiwu barege, kodure baru oto jiwu kiege barege,
11. moto padui pumekejewuge eimejerage eiamedu boe,
12. Ipare, nogware,  codurewuge, boe etore kugure,
13. Tagogwa jerebarido Pao ie tabo. Emare ie kurire tu rugadu, emare urugu kodure moto, baru, ao kori.
14. Emare ure tuwobe eduru ko tao kae! Mearutorure jiwuge eiamedu boe, mearudu kurire jiwuge Israeldoge etore, enogwa jerebarido ji.

Paegarewo!
1. Tarago ia boe eragodu maiwu ji Pao ji. Mearutorure jiwuge ei tudo puidu enogwa jerebarido apo.
2. Israeldoge eegarewo ure tudowujewuji, Sião kejewuge eegarewo tugimejera ji.
3. Tagogwa jerebarido ji tareru tabo; tagera akodo ji meriri iku akorewu tabo, ka tabo.
4. U! Pao mearudu kurire tuwobei, ure tugera pemegado ei, tui einorudo du tabo.
5. Uwobe ewo tudugu tudo tuiegare tabo, eragoduwo taidu tabo tumugurewu boe keje.
6. Tui Pao akaru kurido turuwo tabo, tugedui tariga rairewu jitu tabo.
7. Tuwo tumorido boe epadui pumekejewuge ei, tuwo boe epadui pumekejedu eiwo pegado.
8. Tuwo eimejerage ekera gogudo, tuwo kurirewuge ewure gogudo meriri tabo.
9. Boewo oino ei bapera atugo akore du reore. Awu inodu uwobe ro jetororewuge enojaraere ema.

1. Paegarewo!
Taegarewo Pao ji uwai pemegarewu tada; taegaredo ji mugure kejewu baru kurirewu tada.
2. Taegaredo ji ro kurirewu boe koia, taegaredo ji, kuricigore kodi.
3. Taegaredo ji tagogwa akoi meriri iworewuto du tabo. Taegaredo ji tagera akoi meriri ikurewu padui pumekejedu jitu tabo.
4. Taegaredo ji tareru tabo, ka tabo, taegaredo ji meriri iku akorewu tabo, meriri iworewu tabo.
5. Taegaredo ji meriri aiarewu todure puidu jaruru tabo.
6. Ure ake tawujeboe eiamedu boe, taegaredo Pao ji.
Paegarewo!
CÂNTICOS DO BREVIÁRIO
(Por ordem de autores)
CÂNTICOS DO LIVRO DO ÊXODO
Ex 15,1-4.8-13.17-18
1. Itaidure iragoduwo Pao Aroe Eimejera ji, ure turugu peri perido, ure kawarudoge ewarigu pobo maerewuto mugure ewugejewuge ebo!
2. Idurunure Pao ce, iragodure jiboenure ema, ure ikinorudo awuji kodi.
Ino Aroe Eimejeranure ema, inogwa jerebarimode apo; ioga o Aroe Eimejeranure ema: imode ipujodo ji.
3. Tugobaigare ro rakarewunure ino Aroe Eimejerace: iere "Ro Rakarewu";
4. ure Faraó o tugobaigarege, o imaridodoge, ewarigu pobo maerewuto.
8. Ai akogwamu boekori tabo dukeje, pobo maerewuge ere tudo pui, pobutodogere taogado, ere tudo nono moto rire; pobuto kurirewuge ere tu pagado pobo maerewu oiadoda.
9. Onare ceiwu akore: "Itumode eregodaji, itaregodumode etae! Imode enoroe pedo, itaroe amogodumode; imode itariga rairewu tawuje tuia piji, imode ewido!"
10. Mare akaguru buture, pobo maerewu ure turorido eiogi, ewogware pobo ririgoduto meriri pe reore.
11. Ioguduba umode areore dururewuge etoiadoda, Pao Aroe Eimejera? Ioguduba umode nono areore? Apemegaguragare; are towujeboe boe epagudae rema, aro kurirewu urugure.
12. Are akera aogado, icare motore rugadu ewogwado tudo.
13. Mare are inorudowuge are erego amearudu kuricigo tabo, aro raka tabo, amuga pemegarewu kae.
17.  Pao, akire amode erego, amode etugu ako torekari aogeje, are pemegado amuga  cedukeje. Are apemegado akera tabowu awai keje.
18. Pao jetumode boe ji boe jameduji jii je.
Ex 15,1-6.17-18
1. Itaidure iragoduwo Pao Aroe Eimejera ji, ure turugu peri perido, ure kawarudoge ewarigu pobo maerewuto mugure ewugejewuge ebo!
2. Idurunure Pao ce, iragodure jiboenure ema, ure ikinorudo awuji kodi.
Ino Aroe Eimejeranure ma, inogwa jerebarimode apo; ioga o Aroe Eimejeranure ema: imode ipujodo ji.
3. Tugobaigare ro rakarewunure ino Aroe Eimejerace: iere "Ro Rakarewu";
4. ure Faraó o tugobaigarege, o imaridodoge, ewarigu pobo maerewuto.
5. Ewogware poboto tori reore, pobutore turorido eiogi.
6. Pagimejera, akana ro raka remawunure, akana tabore are onare aiwuge epeagirido.
17.  Pao, akire amode erego, amode etugu ako torekari aogeje, are pemegado amuga  cedukeje. Are apemegado akera tabowu awai keje.
18. Pao jetumode boe ji boe jameduji jii je.
CÂNTICO DO LIVRO DO DEUTERONÔMIO
Dt 32,1-12
1. Baru,  awiapagado inogwa bataruji; moto, awiapagado iiabijiwu iwadaruji!
2. Ire boe eeruduwado jiboe uwo turawuje moto kae bubutu reore; iwadaru uwo taodo nono boedoguru magai taodo boe joki du reore, pobore magai taodo boebutu joki du reore, bubutu butu  magai boe enoe tugudu joki du reore.
3. Inogwa magudumode Pao ieji; taiamedu boe, mato, Pao akaru kurido!
4. Torinure ema, ure toboe pemegaguragare, utawara boe, boe jetorogodaenure emage; Aroe Eimejera pemegarewunure ema, ro arodukare, ro jetorore, ro rikirewunure ema jii je.
5. Ore kiogakarewuge ere turo pegado ji, boe pegajagurewu!
6. Awu inodu tabona tare tukutaido Pao ji, matadurewu boe, joruduwa bokwarewu boe?
Tao karega ure ema, duwu ure tadowuje? Ure tadowujewu, jeture aiwu karega ure ema?
7. Awia jetudo mariguduwu meri kae, awia tugu boture puregodaji puregodajiboe etae; anorado aoji, ureadodumode awiagai. Anorado aedagamagei, egomode ai.
8. Pao baru tadawu ui boe ekado puiato dukeje, ure Adão ore edo taodo moto joki dukeje, ure moto okwa pa bu boe epadui pumekejedu etai, tore enodo pa reore.
9. Mare Pao ogere uwobe remage, oroere Jacó rema.
10. Boe makodurewu tadare Pao  jorudure tuwobei, ia boe biororewu, boe ekiarigodae keje. Ure pado pemegado taidu tabo ji, taidu magai tuioku oia co jitu reore.
11. Aroeceba kodu magai tuwaradu oieidu, ure turokagado torei tore ekodumodedu bogai du reorere, oinore Paore cigodo jado, ure tuwobe erego cigodo aogeje.
12. Tu Aroe Eimejera ure ekodo jetorodo, ia aroe eimejera tuginoiwu kodukare ebo.
CÂNTICO DO PRIMEIRO LIVRO DE SAMUEL
1Sm 2,1-10
1. Iwabore tuiegaredo Pao ji, ierirare taogado Pao bogai; inogware turokowo onare iiwugei, paga karega, iegarere Paoi boe einorudo duji
2. Ia ro pemegarewu ukare nono Pao pemega reore, ia ro rakarewu ukare nono Pao ro rakare.
3. Tagaba tawadaru makaguragado tawadaru ocaro tabo, tawadaru ocaro kaba taobiji.
Paga karega, joruduware boe jamedu jiwunure Pao ce, joruduware boe emearudae biadodurewuji jamedu.
4. Ro rakarewuge ewaigare tubodo puapo, ure tugado, mare ro rakakarewuge eduru kogure epeagajeje.
5. Okwa amogodurewuge ere tumagu ture ko boeji; marenarue, uke boire jiwuge etamogodure. Ore bokwarewudo kuri buture ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto, mare ore makarewudo ore bokware.
6. Paore ure boe ewido, ure boe eedo, ure boe edo turawuje tuiaoroto, ure edo tugirimi nowu piji;
7.  Pao koiare ure boe enoe kurido, ure boe emarenarudo boece.
8. Paore imedu duru bokwarewu udo taogado moto urugudu piji, ure oroe bokwarewu tawuje boe gigudu piji tuwo edo tumugudo kurirewuge ebo, boe emuga kurirewu keje.
Awu moto bure joia jeonare  Pao ji, ure moto mugudo aogeje.
9. Ure mearutorure jiwuge ekodu pemegado, mare mearutorukarewuge ere taodo boeco kao.
10. Iaboe umodukare tumorido tupopei tuduru keje du tabo. Onare Pao jiwuge emodukare tumorido; ure to boiaruru jarurudo ewugeje; Paore tugogado moto okwa pa jamedu boeji.
Pao umode boe eimejerado tudugarece, umode ture boekaguru reko ao jokiwu udo taogado turo raka tabo.
CÂNTICOS DO LIVRO DE TOBIAS
Tb 13,2-8
2. Pao Aroe Eimejera, akuricigore jii je, aetui boe jidu ure jii je, joru oto pa akedu bokwarewu kae!
Paga karega, are boe etogorido, akogudure boebo jamedu, are boedo turawuje jewaduiewoto, are boedo tudawuje piji pugeje: iaboe iaboe umodukare  cinorudo akera piji.
3. Israeldoge, tukutaido ji, akaru kurido boe eegai!
Ure tado tagaodo moto joki,
4. tawo urugu awadudo boe etoiadoda, tawo eeruduwado, ia Aroe Eimejera bokwae tubiji.
5. Ure pagogorido paro pegarewu koia, tumearudu kuri koiare umode paginorudo.
Tawia tugu inoba rore pai duji, tukutaido ji taro pemegarewu tabo.
6. Taro jerebarido Pao apo, boe eimejera o joru oto  pa bokwarewu akaru kurido.
Imirema, imode akaru kurido awu imugure kejewu moto tuginoiwu keje; ure boe eerududo turo rakarewuji ro pemegarewuge eno moto keje!
Ro pegarewuge, taekirimi ae, taro jetorogodudo jekai.
Umode togududo tagabo, mearudu kurire tai kodi!
7. Itogeare itaroe jamedu boe tabo iegarewo jeture baru jiwu Pao ji.
8. Pao mearudu kurire jiwuge, tamago pemegado ji, boe parudo ji, tawadaru jerebarido apo taegare tabo.
Tb 13,8-16
8. Pao Aroe Eimejera mearudu kurire jiwu boe eiamedu boe, tamago pemegado ji, boe parudo ji, tawadaru jerebarido apo taragodu tabo!
9. Jerusalém bakurirewu pemegarewu, Pao ure akogorido aro pegarewu koia.
10.  Mare aegaredo ako Aroe Eimejera ji, ure aiwo aidugirido kodi. Amago pemegado Boe Eimejera o joru oto pa bokwarewuji. Uwo tuwai pemegado atoda pugeje, uwo rekodure ia moto tuginoiwu kaewuge etarego akae pugeje, taegarewo jii je.
11. Arugumode nono jorugu rakarewu reore, boe epadui pumekejedu eiamedu boe emode akagaru kurido.
Mugu jaegirirewuge etaregodumode to mea tabo, tuwo tubujodo Aroe Eimejera ji akoiadoda.
12. Ako moto, moto pemegarewu umode etai, paga karega, kejere cenogwamagudumode Pao ie kurirewuji.
13. Aegare kuricigomode  akore eigoia, Pao umode eto pui pudae, umode eiwo aidugirido.
14. Mearudu kurire aiwuge eiamedu boe eiwo aidugiri kuricigomode, eegaremode ako boe butugurewu keje.
15. Itaroe, awadaru jerebarido Pao apo, emare Pao Aroe Eimejera rema kodi; paga  karega,  uwai pemegadodumode pugeje Sião keje, mugumode  boe jameduji jii je.
CÂNTICO DO LIVRO DE JUDITE
.
Jt 16,1-2.13-15
1. Tarago Pao ji ka tabo, tagera akodo ji ka arudugodurewu tabo.
Boe parudo ji taegare tabo, tagogwamagududo ieji, akaru kurido.
2. Pao Aroe Eimejerare ure boe erugodui puidu akedudo, ie kurirewu "Aroe Eimejera" rema,
13. paragoduwo pagogwa jerebari tabo Aroe Eimejera ji, pawo pageroia maiwu ko Pao ji.
Akire akuricigore, Pao Aroe Eimejera, bopaguduianure aki, aro raka boe ekare tumorido ji.
14. Are towujeboe jamedu boe erowo nono akaidu reore, paga karega, awadaru koiare boe jamedu boe todure.
Are akogwamudu arego boe eewo, icare boe jamedu boe jere.
Iaboe iaboe bokware tuwo tudugu awadaru kuda.
15. Torekaridoge eparu ure tamagadudo, pobodoge etamagadure jamedu, toridoge ekugudugodure piobori kugudu reore aegai.
Mare mearutorure awadaru jiwuge, ekurimode akabo turo jamedukeje.
CÂNTICOS DO LIVRO DA SABEDORIA
Sb 3,1-6
1. Ro jetororewuge etaroe emugure Pao iera keje, emorora amagadu modukare tuwimode duji.
2. Matadurewuge eegai, ere nono birewugere, etaguru ure nono boe pega reore.
Etui pabijidu ure nono  eeda kedo iure, emage rema emugure boe butugurewu keje.
4. Emearudure boekoriji boe eegai, mare epagare tuiemode jii je du bogai.
5. Boe erokagadodui ei du rekodaji, eiwo aidugirimode, paga karega, Paore turokagado ei, ere tudo turugadu jekai.
6. Paore turokagado ei meriri ekurewu barigudui  joru todu reore; ure tugeragu ei pudae nono boe eno mea pemegarewure.
Sb 3,7-9
7. Ro jetororewuge erugumode, emode nono perireboe jo magai bai ki to du reore.
8. Emode tugogado boe ji, emode tumorido moto padure pumekejedukejewu boe ji. Pao jetumode ei boe jameduji jii je.
9. Mearudu kurire jiwuge, emode boe pa boe rikirewuji; mearutorure jiwuge eedumode apo tumearudu kuri tabo ji; paga karega, mearudu kurire jiwuge eonare o boe pemegarewuji.
Sb 9,1-6.9-11
1. Iogamage eno Aroe Eimejera, okudu oiagudurewunure aki, awadaru ro rakarewu ure boe jamedu boe towuje,
2. aeruduwa tabo are imedu towuje, jetuwo are towuje boeji,
3. jetuwo moto jamedu boeji turo jetororewu tabo, boe butugurewu tabo, turo moturewu tabo; uwo tugogado boe ji boe jetororewu tabo.
4. Mugure akabowu boe eeruduwa mak'inai; akaba iwarigu akore epiji;
5. Atugarenure imi, imugare atugareredonure ema. Imedu ro rakakarewunure imi, iragoje raimodukare, iroiwakare iwo boe pa boe jetororewuji.
6. Joruduwa rakare tumedage etoiadowu imedu, boe karega ure ema, tuioruduwakai aeruduware jiboe ji.
7. Are akeragu ii awobe eimejerawo imi, iwo ikogado akore imei, akore aremei du bogai.
8. Are ido awai pemegarewu towuje amugure kejewu torekari aogeje; are ido ia altar mugudo awu amugure kejewu bakurirewu tada; ure nono are towuje boe paru towu baru tadawu awai reore.
9. Mare boe eeruduwa mugure akabo, Pao Aroe Eimejera, duwu joruduware are towujeboe boe paru piji jii je.
Mugure akabo ai boe etowuje dukeje; joruduware kaboba pemegare aegai, joruduware jetorogodure awadaru rekodaji boeji.
10. Arego mato amugure kejewu baru piji, arego amuga urugurewu piji;  muguwo itabo imaragodae keje, tuwo ioruduwado pemegare aegai boeji!
11. Emare ure boe pa boe jamedu boeji, joruduware  boe jamedu boeji, umode ikodu pemegado tuioruduwa tabo, turo raka tabo  jetumode ii iragoje utonaji.
Sb 10,17-21
17. Paore mori maku ture pemegadowuge etai, ero morice. Ure ekodu jetorodo awu moto keje awara pemegarewu boeji.
Meriji ure boetugudo ei, boecoji, ure jorugudo ei baru oto piji.
18. Paore edo pagado pobo maerewu bakowuto, ure edo pagado pobo re rakarewu kajeje.
19. Ure onare eiwuge ewogwado pobo maerewu tada, ure ewarigu pobo maerewu ko raicigorewu piji kugaru kae.
20. Ro pegarewuge ewarigudure dukeje, ro jetororewuge ere akagaru pemegarewu kurido, ere togwa jerebarido tuiamedu tabo jeture puduiwu akera tabo, ure einorudo kodi.
21. Paga karega, ure mako bokwareboe eia barido, tuioruduwa tabo, ure biegarewuge ekeru kiwuje emago awaduwo.

Eclo 14,22;15,3.4.6a
14,22. Jemarure boe eeruduwa jiwu imedu jiwo aidugirire: ure tumearudae tugu tuwabo tada boe eeruduwa o boe biarewuji,  utawaraji; tumearudae tabo jemarure turomode duji.
15,3. Umode kuno boe butugurewuji, umode kududo boe eeruduware jiboece, umode tugerabraredo ji,  butu kawo.
4. Mearutorumode ji, pogurudodu moduka, umode udo taogado tumedage etoiabiji.
6a. Pao umode ie akedu bokwarewu mak'ai.
Eclo 31,8-11
8. Ro pega bokwarewu imedu jiwo aidugirire: rekodukare meriri ekurewu rekodaji, ukare tubagare bogaiboe bu boe enoroe keje.
9. Ema pa? Pagogwa jerebariwo apo, paga karega, ure boe tuginoiwu to turagoje kimo tabo.
10. Meriri ekurewu ure turokagado ji mare butukare kejewu imedu, boe pemegarewu akedu bokwarewu makudumode ai.
Roiware tumearutoru kawo boe eroiaguduji, mare rokare ino; roiware turo pegawo, mare ro pegakare.
11. Boe puredumodukare oroe pemegarewuji; ro jetororewuge ei tudo puidu enogwa jerebarimode apo ro pemega koia.
Eclo 36,1-6.10-13
1. Pao Aroe Eimejera, ore boe jamedu boe  cewu, akogududo akoiagududo  cedabo, ceerududo aruguji, awudugugodui cedabo duji.
Ai boe epagududodu udo taodo moto padui pumekejedu joki, aidukare tuiemaruwo awogaiboe eiogi, ewo boe pa tu aki Aroe Eimejerare aki duji, ewadoduwo aro kurirewuji.
2. Akera aogado boe tuginoiwuge etogi, eeruduwo inoba aro raka kurire duji.
3. Amagai eerududo cebemega jitu du reorere ceerududo aruguji ewugeje,
4. ewo boe pa, egowo cenago reore, ia Aroe Eimejera bokwae apiji.
5. Aro kurirewu kuo pugeje,
6. akana ro rakarewu ocarodo pudui!
10. Jacó uwobe epadui pumekejedu eto pui, ewo boe pa Aroe Eimejerai tu aki rugadu duji, ewo aro kuricigorewu awadodudo, ewo tugeragu akoroeji boe magai marigudu du reore.
11. Akogududo are akonaregedu boetojiwudo emawu awobe Israel apo!
12. Akogududo amugure kejewu ako bakurirewu Sião apo!
13. Jerusalém korobadudo aro boe tabo, awobe enogorawu arugu periperirewu tabo.

17. Tawiapagado iwogai, pemegarewuge etore, tawodudo okureboe botu magai pobo okwai du reore.
18. Bokadoboe kowudu ro reorere  taro pemegarewu padudo boe joki.
19. Tarodo nono okureboe kigadurewu ro magai tuwodu tabo du reore.
Tarago taragodure jiboe ji, Pao ie kurido taro pemegarewu tabo.

Is 2,2-5
2.  Ca! Oinore boemode ia boiwu keje: Pao uwai mugure kejewu torekari rico raimode tumedage ekori, ia boe aoporudoge ekori.
Boe eiamedu boe etumode toro ae;
3.  ia boe makaguragarewuge etaregodumode nono, tagoi oino du tabo: "Marigu paruduwo Pao o torekari ao kae, paduwo Israeldoge eno Aroe Eimejera uwai kae,
Uwo paeruduwado tudawara boeji, pagoduwo utawaraji paiamedu tabo. Paga karega, ui boe eroiagudu aregodumode Sião piji, Jerusalém piji bataru umode tudawuje".
4. Emare umode tugogado moto padui pumekeje duji, umode tugogado boe makarewugei. Emode to imaridodogedo tudariga rairewu boece, emode tuiebaradogedo to meriri otorewudogece.
Boe epadui pumekejedu emodukare tariga rairewu aogado pui pugeje, boe emodukare turokagado turugoduwo du bogai pugeje.
5. Mato, Jacó uwai, mato, pameruwo Pao urugu tada!
Is 9, 1-6
1. Merure boeco kaowu boe eerudure ia jorugu urugu rakarewuji.
Ia jorugu urugure, padure boe ewi tugu kudawuge eiogi.
2. Are awu boe emagaguragado, are boe eegare ko tao kae etai.
Eegare kuricigore aegai, ure tugeragu to boepa tadaboeji tuiegare tabo du reore.
Rugodure puiboe eegare magai tui tugeragu turugodure jiwuge enoroe jitu reore.
3. Are ipo padure eidoru kejewu kado, are ure etogoridowu iwara kado jamedu, Madian o meri keje du reore.
4. Paga karega, tugobaigare rugodure tabowu bure tadawu jamedu boe,  ukudawu rorogodure boe eku tabowu jamedu boe, kowudumode joru tabo.
5. Icá, ia negedurogu buture pagai, ia boe etonaregedu makudure pagai.
Ro raka mugure kanaora keje. Iemode: "Boe eebogodumode jiwu", "Okituwarewu", "Aroe Eimejera ro rakarewu", "Boe eimejera jeture boe ji boe butugurewu tabowu".
6. Jetui boe jidu umode taodo tu tu je, boe butugurewu akedu moduka.
Umode tumugudo Davi muga keje, jetumode ji, tuwo udo taogado, rakoje rakawo boe jetororewu keje.
Pao Aroe Eimejera, jeture moto jamedu jiwu, romode inoduji taidu tabo.
Is 12,1-6
1. Pao Aroe Eimejera, inure tukutaido ai; paga karega, boekorire ai, mare awudugugodure pugeje, icare are iegaredo.
2. In Aroe Eimejera, ure ikinorudowu, rakojere itabo, imearutorure ji, ipagudukare iaboe iaboece. Idurure Pao rema, inogwa jerebariaenure ema, ure ikinorudowunure ema.
3. Tagudumode taegare tabo, ure boe einorudowu poborice;
4. tagagomode oino nowu meri keje: "Tagogwa jerebarido Pao apo, tagogwamagududo ie pemegarewuji, tareadodudo ro kurirewu boeji: "Ie kodure boe eiamedu boe ekie kori."
5. Tawadaru jerebarido taragodu tabo Pao ji, ure kuricigoreboe towuje kodi. Tareadodudo moto jamedu boe keje ro rakarewu boeji!
6. Sião kejewuge, tarago taegare tabo, Israeldoge eno Aroe Eimejera kuricigore tagoiadoda dukodi".
Is 26,1-4.7-9.12
1. Boe emodukare tumorido jiwu pago bakurirewu Sião rema; o motori rakarewu icoru panure Pao Aroe Eimejerace.

3. Ewabo mugu rakare boe butugurewu tada, emorora amagadukare pudui, emearutorure Pao ji kodi.
4. Tamearutorudo Paiji jii je, emare bai motori mugu rakarewunure ema pagai kodi.
7. Imedu ro jetororewu utawara boare, kodu jetorogodure; paga karega, akire are udo turugadu, are kororogodudo.
8. Cegodui awu awara jetororewu jitudu tabore,  cebagare awogai jii je.
Pao Aroe Eimejera, cedaroe akemore jiboere, kiarigodure bogaiboere, akie rema.

Amode akogado boe ji dukeje, ime eiamedu boe eeruduwamode jetororeboeji.

14. Inoiogwarire nono piroje akore; itoragudure nono metugue kugure etoragudure. Ioku metugodure tui taogado du koia, inogwamagudui oino ai du tabo: "Akerabraredo ii, ino Aroe Eimejera!"
17. Mare are ikinorudo iiaoro piji, are iro pegarewu barigu ikujebiji.

Ure turawuje tuiaoro towuge epaga modukare amearudu kuriae akedu bokwarewu bogai.

Boe etuomage ireadodumode tore ewiagai awadaru rikirewuji, amearudu kuriae akedu bokwarewuji.
20. Ino Aroe Eimejera, ikinorudo, akaregodu marigudo awo akerabraredo ii! Du tabo ceragodumode ekeroiaji jii je  cei tukutaido ai  awai tada du tabo.

10. Tagaiwodo, taerududo Pao aregodui turo rakarewu tabo duji; jetumode boe jamedu boe ji tugana tabo. Icá, tui  tumoridoduwu mori aregodumode apo, ure tugeragu jiboe aregodumode otodai.
11. Jeture barege kugure ei du reorere, jeture tuwoboe ji, ure todomu barege kugure etore kugurei, ure tore enogwaridowu barege kugure emugudo tugubi, ure jeture boe kaowuge eto pui tugera tabo.
12. Ioguduba ure pobo maerewu remagu tugera keje? Ioguduba ure baru oto remagu tugera ja tabo. Ioguduba ure moto urugudu remagu toroe tabo? Ioguduba ure torikaridoge emodudu remagu meriri oto tabo? Ioguduba ure boe aoporudoge emodudu remagu boe motudu epa tabo?

15. Poborogu metui ia ruwobo tada du reorere, ia kugaru ri rogu metui meriri boe remagudure kejeboe reorere, oinore moto padui pumekejedure Pao jekai. Pobo aiare tabowu motodoge ewarigodure moto urugudu kori Pao ro rakarewu jekai.
16. Líbano kejewu jerigiguru umodukare turugadu tuwo boe eno mea barege ekowu. Boe karega ure moto padui pumekejedure Pao jekai.

Mugure tori kejewu boe, tamagodo; boe enoiogwari rutuwo tuiegare tabo torekaridoge etaobiji.

14. Jii je imagokare iaboeji iaboeji; ire iia mi, ire iwudugudo ii.
Macare inoiogwarire oino, aredu ako magai tuguri jirigodu tabo du reore, ake tudure ito, iduru akedure imearudui  boekori jitu koia.
15. Torekaridoge, boe aoporudoge imode rugadu epegado, imode jeture kejewu boebutu, boe jamedu boe,  kidudo. Imode pobo jamedu kidudo moto ki arurewu reore. Imode kurugadoge, pobo ja boe, ekidudo.
16. Dukeje imode ikeragu joku bokwarewuge ekeraji, imode erego ia boe eerudu eerudukare jiwu awaraji, imode eko ia boe eerudukare jiwu okwa jore puwugejewu awaraji, awara koborirewuji.
Imode jorugudo boecoce etododai, imode awara mekirewu boe boado. Inodu jamedu boe imode towuje etai, imodukare ikera rawuje epiji.

 21. Enogwamagudure aroe eimejerai ira ceduji, ia aroe eimejera roiwa kai tuwo einorudo duji!. Tamagodo pui jice woje:
Ioguduba ure awu inodu awadudo marigudu? Imi rugadu! Ia imeduia karega! Ia Aroe Eimejera bokware ipiji! Imire Aroe Eimejera ro jetororewu, ure boe einorudowu,nure imi, ia bokware ipiji!

24. Tu Aroe Eimejera kejere boe jetororewu, boe ero raka, mugure.
