Ure ido nono ia imedu magai umode tugera maku aredu ai du reore, ure tugera pemegado ii ia aredu magai tugera pemegado pudui tuwo tugera maku ia imedu ai du reore.
11. Moto magai  boe botudo du reorere, ia boepa magai boe a botudo du reorere, du inodu reorere Pao umode  turo jetorogodurewu botudo, umode boe eiamedu boedo togwa jerebarido pudabo.
61.1.  Sião, aigoiare imodukare iia mi; Jerusalém, aigoiare imodukare itamudo, jii aro jetorogodurewu urugumode ia jorugu ja reore du kae.
2. Dukeje icare boe eerudumode aro jetorogodurewuji, moto jamedukejewu brae eimejerage eerudumode aruguji; eiamedu boe emode ia akie maiwudo, aregodui Pao jabijidu.
3. Amode nono ia boe etaogajejewu urugurewure iera keje, ia boe eimejerage etaogajejewu reore Pao iera keje.
4. Boe emodukare akiedo: "marenaru", oino, pugeje; boe egomodukare "boere tugera ra pijiboe", oino, ako motoji. Mare emode akiedo "Imearudu kurire jiwudo", oino; boe egomode: "Ure tugogedowudo", oino, ako motoji. Paga karega, Pao jorudu pemegare ai kodi, ako moto ukogemode.
5. Ia iparedu magai tugera maku tumearudu kurire jiwudo ai du reorere, oinore ure atowujewu umode tugera maku akai.  Oredu jekaraenure toredujece, du reorere Pao jekareaemode aki.

4. Boe emago modukare "Boe etukare jiwudo", oino ai pugeje;
Boe emagomodukare "Boere tugera ra pijiwudo", oino ai pugeje.
mare boe egomode: "Itaidure jiwudo", oino ai.
Boe egomode oino ako motoji: "Ukogerewudo".
Paga karega, Pao jorudu pemegare ai, dukodi ako moto ukogemode.
5. Ia iparedu magai tugera maku taidure jiwudo ai du reorere,
oinore ure atowujewu, mugumode akabo.

12. Pawo tukutaido Pao Aroe Eimejera ji, duwu makore pawogai tuwo paeonado pemegarewuge eonare jiboe ji, turugu tada.
13. Ura padawuje boecorewu piji, ure parego tumearudu kurire jiwu tonaregedu o boe pemegarewu kae,
14. duwu ure paro pegarewu okwado, ure paginorudo tugu tabo.
15. Kejere paerudure paeku tabo paerudukare jiwu Pao ji; boe eiamedu boe etumana boetojiwunure ema,
16. kejere baru tadawu boe eiamedu boe, awu moto kejeboe jamedu boe towujedure: boe eerudure jiboe jamedu boe, boe eerudukare jiboe jamedu boe
Baru tadawu ro rakareboe jamedu boe, tupadoge eiamedu boe etowujedure keje, etowujedure ai.
17. Rakojere jii je, boe jamedu boe otodai, boe jamedu boe rakoje kimore koia jamedu.
18. Emare Pao uwobe etao rema, duwuge uredunure emage; emare jewodure birewuge epeijiwu boetojiwunure ema. Dukodire  mugure boe eiamedu boe emuga boetojiwu keje.
19. Paga karega,  Pao aidure boe pemegarewu jamedu boe muguwo tada.
20. Aidure ture towujeboe jamedu boe, awu moto kejeboe, baru tadaboe jamedu boe, ewudugugoduwo pui, ui tugu jamedu boe redo i padui pugajejedukeje boe etai, du koia.
CÂNTICO DA PRIMEIRA CARTA DE PAULO A TIMÓTEO
1Tm 3,16
16. Pagimejera Jesus Cristo ure tawadudo boe ekodukeje, Pao Utaroe Pemegarewu jore keje, tupadoge eerudure ji, kogadodure boe epadui pumekejedu etai, moto kejewu boe emearutorure ji, akaru kuridodure baru tada.
Adoração dos Magos
CÂNTICO DA PRIMEIRA CARTA DE SÃO PEDRO
1Pd 2,21-24
21. Cristore tuiwodo pagai, parowo nono turo reore, kode pagoduwo rekodaji!
22. Ro pegarewu bokware, batararodu bokware jamedu.
23. Boe emago pegare ji, mare ukare inodu kirimi; boe erorerure ji, boe egorerure ji, mare aidukare tuwo tumorido: ure tumagu ure tugogadodu jetorodo boe jiwu iera keje.
24. Ure paro pegarewu reko tugodu, tuwiri tada i padui pugajejedukeje, duma pawiwo paro pegarewuji, paewo Pao jetororewu keje. Tujebae tabore iogore pai.
CÂNTICOS DO APOCALIPSE
Ap 4,11;5,9-10.12
4.11. Pao Aroe Eimejera, ure turugadu boewo akagaru kurido, arugu kurido, aro raka kurido!
5,9. Paga karega,  are boe jamedu boe towuje, akaidu koiare boe etowujedure; boe jamedu  rakojere, akagore boe jiagu oino dukodi.
Pagimejera Aroe Eimejera, akire are arugadu bapera makuduwo akai, awo nowu kruca padure kejewu jado!
Paga karega, cenaire are amagu awi kae, aku tabore are ceginorudo, are cemagu Pao ai, boe eiamedu boe etodui pui du piji, boe ewadaru padui pumekejedu, boe eiamedu boe epadui puidu piji.
10. Are Pao o burejoiagedo pagi, are boe eimejeragedo pagi, dukodire paetumode awu moto kejeboeji.
11. Ure turugadu boewo ure tuiwodowu Cordeiro akaru kurido, urugu kurido, ro rakado, joruduwa rakado, boewo togwa jerebarido apo, boewo tubujodo ji!
Ap 11,17-18;12.10b-12a
11.17. Cenure tukutaido ai, Pao Aroe Eimejera ro rakarewu, are oino, are marigudu, amode jii je, are boe eimejera remawudo aki, are amugudo amuga keje boe eimejerai aki du tabo.
18. Boe epadui pumekejedu ekodu kagirire ai, macare akodu kagirii eidu aregodure, amode akogado jerewuge eidu, birewuge eidu aregodure, dukejere amode atugarege profetadoge pemegarewuge, pagudure akie cewuge, biegarewuge, kurirewuge ero pemegarewu mori maku etai.
12,10. Icare Pao ro rakarewu ui paginorudodu aregodure, nowu tonaregedu, tumearudu kurire jiwu, ro raka tabo.
Paga karega, mako pegare pawiemagei Pao jekaiwu rekodudodure.
13. Ere tumorido ji  Pagimejera Jesus Cristo jiwae koia, tui tumagu tuwi kae Pao bataru bukeje.
14. Dukodire, aki, baru, aegaredo, mugure baru tadawuge eiamedu boe, taegaredo!
Ap 15,3-4
3. Pao Aroe Eimejera ro rakarewu, are towujeboe kuri remawunure! Boe eeku kidae rema! Jeture moto padui pumekejedu jamedu boe jiwu Pao Aroe Eimejera, boe jetororewu, boe jokodurewunure akawarace.
4. Pagimejera, ioguduba pagudu modukare ace? Ioguduba umodukare akie kurido? Tu akire apemegare mito tu je.
Boe epadui pumekejedu jamedu boe etaregodumode tuwo tubujodo ai, tuiorudu awadui, ai akogado boe ji, boe jetororewu tabo duji!
